d: A young woman with a troubled past becomes a live-in housemaid for a wealthy family. However, the family's seemingly perfect life quickly unravels when she discovers the dark secrets hidden beneath their pristine surface.

Mr. Venkat, a married man obsessed with pleasure and indulgence, becomes involved with a poor young woman who truly loves him. A tragic turn leads to him raping her, and after her death, unsettling supernatural events begin to haunt his life. Her spirit returns, seeking justice and forcing Venkat to confront the consequences of his brutality.

A descendant of the Vanara clan is pushed into conflict when a modern-day Ravana seizes his only bike for an election rally. What starts as a petty injustice soon erupts into a fierce fight for self-respect and dignity.

Siddharth's life is a string of misfortunes, losing love, money, and dignity, making him the unwitting star of a slum-based comedy of errors. Hope only reappears in the form of Shravya, a no-nonsense single mother. However, just as Siddharth begins to rebuild his life and pursue a chance at love, his past resurfaces to threaten everything.

Anuj is a 28-year-old bachelor who feels like he has missed the train when it comes to marrying a perfect girl. Now, even his family members have become impatient, and Anuj's funny ride is in full swing. The story is filled with hilarious moments along with plenty of family emotions. It's an innovative family comedy film perfect for the entire family to enjoy.

A gang targets transgender people to exploit them, pushing them toward prostitution. As they struggle against fear and discrimination, a young man named Acharya steps in to stop the rowdies. Their fight reaches the Janata Court, which intervenes to protect the community and uphold their dignity.

t: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
d: SpongeBob and his Bikini Bottom friends set sail in their biggest, all-new, can't-miss cinematic event yet: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants. Desperate to prove he's a big guy, SpongeBob sets out to show his bravery to Mr. Krabs by following the Flying Dutchman, a mysterious swashbuckling ghost pirate, on a seafaring comedy adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the ocean, where no sponge has gone before.

Two souls meet in the present and are mysteriously drawn into a journey through their past lives, from divine realms to historical eras like Devaloka, Vasco da Gama's voyage, and pre-independence Andhra Pradesh. As memories resurface and destiny unfolds, they must confront whether their love can transcend time or if fate will repeat itself once again.

Madham is a gripping tale of injustice and resistance. When a marginalized family is falsely accused and brutalized by the system, they face relentless persecution. With no escape and justice favoring the powerful, they choose to fight back. A powerful story of survival, defiance, and the cost of oppression.

Kalyan, a software employee known as the perfect family man, unexpectedly grows close to Siri, an orphan who hides her fake job certificates. When Siri later stays at Kalyan's house, she discovers that his family isn't actually his real family. The story then unravels who they are and why Kalyan lives with them.

Set against the Tamil Eelam war backdrop, the story follows brave doctors working in an underground bunker, risking their lives to save both allies and enemies. As they battle danger, moral dilemmas, and relentless chaos, their unwavering compassion and humanity shine through, highlighting courage and resilience in the darkest times.
A heartfelt tribute to the Marathi-medium schools celebrating their enduring values, rich culture, vital learnings, and timeless nostalgia.

Three men from different cities with contrasting personalities fall in love with two elder sisters and their younger sibling. As rivalry, confusion, and funny situations unfold, the story follows who finally wins their hearts and marries them, delivering a fun-filled romantic comedy.

A powerful psychological drama about a dominant man consumed by anger and ego. When a woman enters his life, his choices trigger devastating consequences that shatter relationships and force him to confront guilt, loss, and the true cost of being alpha.
A heart-touching story of love, emotions, relationships, and destiny.

A present-day romance collides with an unfinished love from a past life, leading to unexpected twists, emotional turns, and a mysterious destiny full of surprises. A family entertainer filled with comedy, drama, and an important message about today's real-life challenges.

Set in the 12th century, the story follows Mahadevi, born in Udutadi, who dedicates her life to unwavering devotion toward Channamallikarjuna. Guided by the revered Allama Prabhu, she embarks on a profound spiritual journey toward Kadalivana Srisaila, seeking enlightenment, purpose, and divine truth.

Rappata follows how neglecting education at the right age can derail a child's entire future. While parents invest their time, money, and hopes to guide their children toward a better life, poor choices and ignorance lead to conflict, regret, and lifelong struggles. The story delivers a strong message: without education, the chances to build a secure and meaningful future slowly disappear.

In an Andhra village divided by caste and controlled by a corrupt president, youth leaders Surya and Dathu clash for dominance. When Rishi arrives to study rural development, he unintentionally shakes up their rivalry. As love, ego, and a buried land scam surface, the youth must decide whether to stay divided or unite for the village`s future.

Saraswathipuram is a village where education is highly valued. Nilakanta works as a tailor in the village. Wise and kind from childhood, he believes in karma, but unfortunately, karma seems to curse him. No matter how powerful the opponent, he fights bravely for his life. Who is that rival?
Freedom fighter Neera Arya joins India's first women`s army, founded by Subhas Chandra Bose, highlighting untold stories from India`s independence movement and themes of courage and patriotism.

t: Ka Tain Mola Mohni Maar Diye Re
d: Golu falls in love with Mamta, who rejects him. Frustrated, he acquires a divine supernatural power called Mohni in Chhattisgarh and uses it to make Mamta fall in love. However, the use of Mohni brings dangerous consequences, attracting evil forces.
An aspiring filmmaker's peaceful retreat turns into a nightmare when a killer targets her loved ones, forcing her to confront a horrifying truth hidden within her own script.

Twenty-five years after a once-rebellious love story found its happy ending, time, ego, and changing relationships begin to test Ankur and Puja's bond. As generational gaps widen and family ties strain, emotions clash, and connections fracture, raising a powerful question: can love still heal what life has broken?
Maamagudam is a Tamil movie directed by Action Star Arasu. The movie features Action Star Arasu and Bayilvan Ranganathan.
Mero Jutta Khoi is a Nepali movie directed by Kumar KC.
A young doctor and a farmer's daughter fall in love after a ruthless gang seizes their land, leading to a violent showdown when the gang leader comes after him.

Set over a single, harrowing night, the story follows Jansi and her eight-year-old child as they are caught amid looming Third World War tensions and hunted by three ruthless men Lal Chetta, Khan Bhai, and Ranga Reddy, more dangerous than wild animals. With survival at stake, Jansi relies solely on her intelligence and resolve to outwit her pursuers and bring the nightmare to an end.

Jeni and Priyanka are best friends and promising medical students with big dreams. But their world shatters when Jeni is brutally raped and dies. Devastated and furious, Priyanka sets out to seek justice, only to confront the harsh realities of the legal system and the painful truth about power and justice.
A biopic on the legendary Telugu singer Ghantasala Venkateswara Rao Garu.
Kuhee and Anup look back at their broken past and try to get back the home that once held their love and happiness.

The Bed unfolds entirely through the perspective of a bed, which silently witnesses lives, emotions, secrets, love, pain, and the many untold moments that happen around it. Through this unusual narrator, the story explores relationships and hidden truths in a deeply unique way.
Rebellion and royalty didn`t just come, they`re in his blood. The Powerful and Majestic reign of the Raja Saab will set new rules across the board.
The film is a biographical account of Pujya Bapji Maharaj, portraying his life journey and the lifelong work he devoted to society and spirituality.

Abinash, his son Arup, and daughter-in-law Monimala continue their constant bickering even after shifting to a new flat, with Arup endlessly stuck between them. When circumstances force them to find another home, Abinash revisits their old house only to discover a tenant now lives there. What follows is a chain of hilarious misunderstandings and escalating family drama, leaving their future up in the air.

Days before his daughter's wedding, Kanhaiyalal loses everything to a bank scam, forcing him to plan a desperate heist. As the ceremony looms, a relentless cop closes in to uncover Kanhaiyalal's secret. The tension builds as the honest man fights to survive. Will Kanhaiyalal be caught, or will he save his family?

Josemon has spent his life avoiding responsibility, letting his sister Sarah sacrifice her dreams to support the family. His stagnant world is shaken when Kaleena, an artist commissioned to paint the church, enters his life and challenges his way of seeing things. With a powerful local politician observing from the shadows, Josemon is pushed into an uneasy journey of self-discovery, forcing him to question whether he can finally find a purpose worth fighting for.

Burdened by a troubled past, a rickshaw driver named Laalo finds himself mysteriously trapped in a remote farmhouse. In his isolation, he begins to see visions of Lord Krishna, who guides him on a profound journey of redemption. What begins as a physical struggle to escape becomes an internal battle to heal from his past and find hope.
The surviving Garrity family must leave the safety of the Greenland bunker and embark on a perilous journey across the decimated frozen wasteland of Europe to find a new home.
Two down-on-their-luck performers form a Neil Diamond tribute band, proving it's never too late to find love and follow your dreams.

A light-hearted family comedy about a modern couple facing relationship and lockdown challenges. Through humor, it weaves in social themes like family values, karma, and human contradictions, even drawing God into a dilemma about answering human prayers.
Rebellion has a voice. Justice has a price.

When a marriage function turns into havoc, the story of a con woman unfolds - one woman, many husbands, zero remorse. A light-hearted drama where weddings repeat, husbands change, and trouble follows.
A new concert film capturing Jin's ground-breaking first solo tour. The BTS member's unique musical journey comes to the big screen.
A family thriller where a household's hard-won peace is threatened by a high-stakes conflict. Loyalties are tested as festivity gives way to danger.

After his wine is rejected, Ram Sathyanarayana travels to Spain. He meets Manasa and gets pulled into unexpected problems. The film shows how he solves the issues between two women in his life in this family entertainer.

A young man`s life turns upside down when he finds himself caught between two women, leading to an unexpected love triangle filled with emotions, misunderstandings, and tough decisions. As relationships get tangled, he must confront his feelings, face reality, and choose what truly matters, blending romance with heartfelt family drama.

Thirty years ago, a prominent zamindar family lived in Bangalore, consisting of Maari and Dr. Mamtha. It was a time when IT and biotech companies were entering the city, even as Bangalore's underworld operated in full force. The environment was filled with real estate disputes, gang violence, and romantic entanglements, all unfolding alongside rapidly growing business ventures.

Jeevarathinam, a village panchayat member, is invited to oversee a wedding, only to be drawn into a simmering family conflict rooted in power and buried grudges. As the night unfolds, he is forced to confront the true weight of leadership and whether he can resolve a crisis spiralling out of control.

Raj Kunwar, a fearless court marshal from Assam, takes on the impossible, confronting deadly militant groups and fighting to pull them back into the light. Armed not with violence but with conviction and belief in change, he dives deep into conflict-torn communities, risking everything to replace guns with hope, rebellion with purpose, and terror with a sense of belonging.

Vijay and Arjun Ranawat, owners of a successful construction company, clash with criminal don Kabir Chopra who demands a share in their business. When Akash is blackmailed with a video threatening his family, hidden schemes and dangerous plots unfold. The story builds to a thrilling climax as loyalties, secrets, and power struggles are revealed.

t: Thata Thai Gyu Ta Ta Thaiya
d: A simple misunderstanding turns three nobodies into the face of a national scandal. Caught between the law and a vengeful mob, these "rascals" must survive the chaos to accidentally expose the truth.
Take It Easy Urvashi is a Marathi movie directed by Sunny Bhushan Mungekar. The movie features Sunny Bhushan Mungekar, Ananda Karekar, Janardan lavangare and Nutan Jayant.

Adopted by two retired British spies, Happy Patel believes he's perfectly English-unaware he's actually Indian! After failing the MI7 exam 7 times, he's finally sent to Goa on a "simple" mission involving a kidnapped scientist and a suspicious fairness-cream empire. Caught between rival crime lords and struggling with his own identity crisis, Happy must discover his true self and save the people of Goa!

Set in a remote village, this story follows a community where everyone, from children to the elderly, is trapped in endless labour from dawn to dusk. With no exposure to learning or the world beyond their village, generations grow up without questioning their reality. The film explores how the absence of education shapes lives and what happens when that darkness is finally challenged.

Set in the scenic Wayanad, a mischievous student falls for his classmate, sparking playful and heartfelt moments as he navigates her strict father, caring mother, and protective brother. A lighthearted, feel-good story of first love and village life.

After a natural disaster destroys their village, Rudra, Mooppan, and a few survivors rebuild their lives near another river. Their struggle worsens when a deadly illness spreads and outsiders bring violence and fear. Antony supports Rudra through every hardship, but is eventually killed, leaving her alone to face life with courage.

A skeptical man investigates a family's mysterious tragedy caused by a land dispute and alleged voodoo, but years of disturbing incidents force him to question reason itself when science fails and madness prevails.
Maa Surkanda is a Garhwali movie starring Rajesh Malguri, Poonam Saklani, Sawan Gairola, Padam Gusain and Rakesh Gaur in prominent roles. It is directed by Ashok Chauhan.

In rural Rajasthan, a crime investigation exposes how black magic and superstition are weaponised to manipulate and exploit the vulnerable. As the case unfolds, the truth behind the so-called supernatural reveals a dangerous nexus of fear, fraud, and human greed.

Sach Ki Khoj is a powerful and inspiring film about a common man's fight for justice against influential, politically connected criminals. The film highlights the struggles ordinary people face when the system, including law enforcement, sides with the powerful.

A fearless police inspector investigates four brutal murders, only to find CCTV footage showing his own face at the crime scenes. Haunted by fear and doubt, he must uncover whether he's unknowingly committing the crimes, has a dangerous double, or if something far more sinister is at play. Can he solve the mystery before the law catches him?
There was a gang of rapists who had absconded from the police. Finally, the police department assigned a brilliant officer to the case. Can he catch them?

Pushpangadan, a 45-year-old flower mill owner and coffee planter, finally agrees to marriage after years of failed proposals. As the wedding preparations conclude, his three eccentric uncles, one settled in Quilon, one a martial arts master from Vatakara, and one a quarrelsome alcoholic, arrive with their families the day before the ceremony, setting the stage for unexpected chaos.

In the magical world of writer Churu Lal Sharma, his unlucky creations Rahu and Ketu spring to life, causing hilarious chaos instead of fighting corruption. When the mischievous Meenu Taxi steals Churu's mystical notebook, the bumbling duo is dragged into absurd adventures that land them in the middle of a drug mafia. From comic missteps to unexpected courage, Rahu and Ketu transform from clueless pawns to unlikely heroes in Rahu Ketu, a whimsical out-of-the-world comedy about fate, free will, and rewriting your own story.

Love - Laughter.. Bullets- Crackers... Drugs - Thugs.. Sadness - Madness .. Jailbreak- Heartbreak ..

So, Fuel Up, Gear Up, Level Up and Fasten your seat belts for the wildest and wackiest road trip of all time.

Ambalika, a research scholar, works under Professor Moidul Islam, who lost his family in a childhood flood. As their bond grows, he comes to see her like a daughter. Meanwhile, outside forces provoke student groups, leading to campus clashes. When the Vice Chancellor resigns for standing up for justice and equality, students unite to continue the struggle and uphold these values.

A delivery boy takes an alcohol-running job to fund his father's surgery. During a wealthy client's party, a gunshot triggers mass unconsciousness, amnesia, and identity confusion as a murder scheme begins to surface.

t: Chatha Pacha: The Ring of Rowdies
d: Chatha Pacha: The Ring of Rowdies is a high-energy action-comedy set in Fort Kochi, where a ragtag group of ex-convicts forms a wrestling club that sparks rivalries and attracts the law. As showdowns heat up inside and outside the ring, it's not just about fame; it's about survival, brotherhood, and redemption.

Jockey features a world and a sport never before captured on film. Get ready to witness adrenaline-pumping goat fight sequences, a gripping story, and breathtaking visuals that redefine action cinema.

Set in the present day, Draupathi 2 travels back to the 14th century, when South India was torn between the brutality of the Madurai Sultanate and the power of Delhi Sultan Tughlaq. Amid this conflict, Hoysala Emperor Vallalar III protects his people through diplomacy and alliances with petty kings. Their sacrifices, along with acts of betrayal, alter the fate of the kingdom, revealing how political ambition and interference can destroy both royal power and ordinary lives.

Set in the misty calm of Maya Forest Resort, five friends arrive for a carefree bachelor party. Their noisy celebration sparks a tense clash with a quiet family man staying nearby, turning a night of fun into the beginning of something far more unsettling.

A terrifying journey into the supernatural, where fear and faith collide with long-buried secrets. As the mystery unfolds, the characters are forced to confront shadows from the past, leading to a series of shocking revelations and a bone-chilling climax.

Kakababu embarks on a quest for a legendary treasure, unravelling ancient mysteries and confronting deadly adversaries. As danger lurks at every turn. What secrets lie within the legendary treasure Kakababu seeks as he unravels ancient mysteries and battles deadly adversaries. Will his relentless pursuit lead to glory or peril?

An edge-of-the-seat thriller that will keep you hooked from start to finish! Baby Girl delves into intense emotions, suspense, and unexpected twists, exploring the choices we make when life pushes us to the edge.

A fiercely ambitious young man, Marty Mauser, is determined to forge a career in a sport that commands little respect: professional ping pong. Loosely inspired by the life of the legendary player Marty Reisman, the film chronicles Marty's relentless journey to achieve greatness and elevate his sport to the global stage, revealing the high personal cost of chasing an improbable dream.
A man's illusion of love turns tragic when misplaced desire and misunderstanding pull him into consequences he never anticipated.
The film is about an aspiring director who pitches three different stories, depicting pressing ideological and social issues in society, to a producer with whom she also has a hidden agenda.
In Primate, a group's tropical vacation turns into a terrifying, primal tale of horror and survival.
In the near future, a detective stands on trial accused of murdering his wife. He has 90 minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced A.I. Judge he once championed, before it determined his fate.

In a village crushed under a brutal landlord's rule, fear silences the poor, and justice is denied. When a young woman constable challenges the system and an innocent family is burnt alive, outrage erupts into a violent uprising. What follows is a costly fight to reclaim dignity, justice, and the power of the Constitution.
During the events of the 1971 Indo-Pak war, a new generation of young Indian warriors was getting ready to defend the nation from an even bigger threat to the Indian motherland.

Inspired by a real-life tragedy, the story explores the shocking death of a fresher allegedly caused by ragging at a city university hostel, reopening wounds and igniting urgent conversations about abuse, accountability, and a system that failed to protect its own.
Vangala Viriguda is a Tamil movie starring Guhan Chakkaravarthiyar, Vaiyapuri and Ponnamabalam  in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Guhan Chakkaravarthiyar.
When ghosts come calling on guests at a hotel, all hell breaks loose.

Haunted by childhood loss, a quiet young man from rural Idukki finds love with an introverted woman he meets by chance. When prejudice and misunderstanding threaten to separate them, a heartfelt public confession turns resistance into acceptance and leads them toward a hopeful future.

In 1917, two music students bond over a shared passion for folk music at the Boston Conservatory. Years later, an unexpected letter sparks a journey through the Maine backwoods to preserve traditional songs. This reunion ignites a deep love affair and a musical legacy that will shape their lives in ways they never imagined.
A powerful tale from the heart of Tulunadu, brought to life through gripping storytelling and rich visuals.

Kathir, a weaver, marries Veni, who joins his workplace. When Kathir becomes consumed by work and money, Veni's love and support help restore balance, guiding them both toward personal growth and a stronger life together.
One mad father, one fearless son, unlimited friendship, and a love story that turns life upside down. This roller-coaster of laughter and emotion delivers nonstop entertainment.

Guru Pangi teaches in a remote village, where his kindness, humility, and love for the people make him widely respected. He is in love with Puja, but when her parents ignore her feelings, the couple elopes on her wedding day. A year later, Puja becomes a mother, but tragedy strikes when their daughter dies under mysterious circumstances. How did the child die, and who is responsible? The story unfolds in search of the truth.

A simple plan spirals wildly out of control as Siddha tries to help a love story while Palaksha schemes to fool his own father, Halappa. One harmless prank meant to scare Halappa turns dangerous, trapping everyone in a night of panic, confusion, and laugh-out-loud chaos, while the village celebrates outside, his house becomes a comic disaster zone.

A powerful corporate leader begins to lose his grip on reality as terrifying hallucinations and buried trauma resurface. As the line between truth and illusion fades, Vikalpa pulls the audience into a chilling psychological mystery where nothing is certain, not even the mind.
Kab Hohi Milan is a Chattisgarhi movie starring Shalini Vishwakarma and Riyaz Khan in prominent roles. It is directed by Dharmendra Choubey.
A man certain of his guilt faces a world certain of his innocence, and the truth shatters them both!

Mohan Bosman, a highly successful businessman, has decided to take a drastic step following the sudden, tragic death of his family and significant financial losses. However, a young, unemployed lover Mahadev and a shrewd, foxy thief, Mangu, have plans of their own that could ruin Mohan's diabolical plan. What happens next will shock you.
Tomar Jonno is a Bengali movie starring Supriyo Dutta, Anusmita Sarkar, Mauni Chatterjee and Sanjeev Guha Roy in prominent roles. It is directed by Subir Pal Chowdhury.

A simple man with a burning dream of becoming a singer struggles to balance ambition with the responsibility of providing for his family. As hardships test his resolve, the journey reveals the sacrifices, setbacks, and quiet strength behind chasing a dream.
A nationwide lockdown traps Anita at home just as her life spirals into uncertainty, forcing her to confront a mysterious challenge she never saw coming.

A no-nonsense cop`s arrest of a powerful rowdy`s son sets off a deadly chain of events when the accused rapist is murdered after his release. A chilling warning signed by Bose sparks a manhunt, raising unsettling questions about vengeance, justice, and a hidden link to the officer himself.

Deep in a jungle homeland, a sacred tribe and a devoted mahout live in harmony with nature. When a ruthless smuggler threatens their land, divine signs and human courage unite the villagers and forest rangers in resistance. At the centre of the battle stands an elephant, the silent guardian fighting for the forest's survival.

Six former medical students reunite after 15 years during the 190th reunion preparations of Medical College, Bengal. The gathering rekindles memories of friendship, lost love, and unfinished dreams, especially for an NRI doctor whose return to Kolkata reopens an emotional chapter tied to his past and a love he never forgot. As nostalgia deepens, the reunion evolves into a tribute to friendship, sacrifice, and the enduring bond forged during their medical journey.

In Bengaluru, a stunt artist runs a Stunt Training School for orphaned children, treating them as his own family. His life is brightened by Ramya, the heroine, whose love adds depth to the story.

Meanwhile, terrorists plan a bomb blast. Children from the school stumble upon the plot and are kidnapped to Kashmir, prompting the hero and heroine to race to save them.

Guided by the divine wisdom of Sri Raghavendra Swami, this spiritual sequel follows Srinivasacharya's transformation into the great saint Sri Jagannatha Daasaru. A moving tale of faith and inner trials, it culminates in the creation of the Harikathamruthasara, a literary masterpiece of the Haridasa tradition.

A priceless Nizam-era coin is stolen from the Hyderabad Museum, sparking a thrilling chase through crime circles. Small-time thief Vijay joins forces with Shiva and Sadha to intercept a black-market deal, only to discover the coin is a duplicate. Drawn deeper into a dangerous web of deception, they face double-crosses, hidden motives, and relentless twists as they hunt for the real treasure.

A driven man chases his life's dream, navigating relentless hardships, emotional setbacks, and complicated relationships along the way. Each obstacle tests his resolve, shaping the person he must become to reach his goal.

When a day spins dangerously out of control, Samuel Joseph drags veteran Circle Inspector Antony Xavier into the most critical case of his career. With time slipping away, Antony must race against the clock to uncover the truth before it's too late.
Dhrutarashtrudu is a Telugu movie starring Dhanraj, Ne Ne Shekhar, Niva Sahay, Vandhana Dharani, Geetha Sri and Likhita Sri in prominent roles. It is directed by Suresh G.

From the dust-laden fields of Rayalaseema comes a story shaped by truth and tradition. Devagudi follows three childhood companions divided by caste and tested by fate. In a land where silence is strength and love becomes rebellion, one moment shatters their world. Inspired by real events, it stands as a tribute to character rising above caste.

CID officer Shivani Rathod is on the hunt for a relentless serial killer, while Yogi and his team dive deep into eerie paranormal investigations. As both teams hit dead ends, an unexpected link between their cases unravels a chilling truth. Who is the killer Shivani seeks, and can Yogis team decode the supernatural puzzle before it's too late?

Valavaara is a coming-of-age drama set in the picturesque landscapes of Sakleshpur, Karnataka. The story revolves around familial bonds, sibling rivalry, and responsibility, following the journey of Kundeshi, a young boy from a farming family, as he navigates love, loss, and the quest to find a missing cow that ties into his family's struggles.

A young girl struggles to solve the riddle of the relationships around her, feels deeply confused, and, in her journey to find answers, is introduced to the different colors of life. Finally, after much contemplation, one color emerges.
Jagannath arrives in Hyderabad seeking revenge against those who ruined his life. The film is a gripping tale of love, betrayal, and vengeance.

Devam, raised in a village and now a police officer, reflects on his lost college love with Diya while helping a couple whose son disappeared 24 years ago on Sharad Purnima. As he takes up the case, his mother reveals a hidden truth: she once found an abandoned infant and raised him as her own, intending to return him to his parents. That child is Devam, leading to an emotional reunion with the family he lost long ago.

In a rural village, a salesgirl arrives unexpectedly and soon goes missing under unclear circumstances. The film unfolds through a series of events that follow her disappearance and explores the impact it has on the village.
Before the world taught them rules, friendship taught them courage.

In a lively Ernakulam college hostel, three friends juggle politics, pranks, and the madness of student life. But when an unexpected twist unsettles their carefree world, comedy and chaos spiral in ways they never imagined.

In a decaying Mumbai theatre, a broken former producer and his son are drawn into a tense night of deception when two cunning intruders arrive, all chasing a hidden fortune. As greed, memory, and past wounds collide, trust shatters and dark secrets surface, turning the hunt for gold into a psychological battle with an unexpected conclusion.

Just Married.com follows best friends Jolly and Sunny, wedding planners who discover that four marriages they organized were flawed due to a fake priest. Four years later, they reunite with the couples to fix the past, uncovering love, conflict, and second chances along the way
Granny is a Tamil film directed by Vijaya Kumara, starring Vadivukkarasi, Dhileepan, Singampuli, Gajaraj S and Ananth Nag in prominent roles.

Siddu, a popular YouTube vlogger celebrated for creative and viral content, accidentally pivots to paranormal investigations, specifically ghost hunting in a notoriously haunted town. With cameras rolling, Siddu and the team venture into the unknown, hoping to capture definitive paranormal evidence. What unfolds is a suspenseful and mysterious journey, blurring the lines between content creation and genuine horror.

Prashanthi gives up her dreams for love, only to fall into abusive relationships first with her lecturer and later with her husband, Omkar, who pretends to support her but turns violent and manipulative. After enduring trauma, betrayal, and a heartbreaking miscarriage, she secretly strengthens herself, escapes his control, and rebuilds her life by starting a successful business. When Omkar's abuse becomes public and reaches court, she refuses divorce, not out of love, but to ensure no other woman suffers the same fate.
Karuppu Pulsar is a Tamil movie starring Attakathi Dinesh in a prominent role. It is directed by Murali Krishan.
A recluse on a remote Scottish island rescues a girl from the sea, unleashing a perilous sequence of events that culminate in an attack on his home, compelling him to face his turbulent history.

Imagine being stuck on a deserted island with your toxic boss! A survival horror drama about an employee and a toxic boss, Linda and Bradley, who survive a plane crash and are stranded on a deserted island. Forced to rely on Lindas survival skills, they struggle to stay alive while confronting buried tensions and unresolved conflicts.

Royal Challengers Bengaluru Women, top of the table this season, face Delhi Capitals Women, who booked their fourth consecutive final with a dominant eliminator win, a clash of consistency vs hunger for the title.

Aashaan dreams of cinema until a 150-member film crew crashes into his life. Suddenly, the magic is right before his eyes. As he chases his big break in the industry, he collides head-on with its harsh realities. Essentially a "movie within a movie," the film uses humour, music, and deeply relatable emotions to capture the tensions, dreams, and resilience required to bring a creative vision to life.

Madan, a naive teenager, gets caught up in adult desires after being shamed at school. He finds an unlikely mentor in Sadanand, a street-smart photographer who charms women under the pretense of work.

As Madan learns the tricks of attraction, he crosses paths with a girl seeking real love. When his true intentions are exposed, she walks away, leaving him heartbroken.

Meanwhile, Sadanand faces a life-changing crisis, leading him to seek redemption and inspiring Madan to choose sincerity and respect over deception, embracing genuine love and connection.

Amid the chaos of a vibrant Telugu wedding, Surya races against Laggam Time to confess his love to the bride-to-be, only to trigger a groom's disappearance that sends the entire celebration into comic mayhem.

A young man defies his father to chase his dream of becoming a film hero, while a village girl with the same ambition is broken by the film world's dark truths. Betrayed and scarred, she returns seeking justice, choosing between peace and revenge.

Featuring the global K-Pop sensation Stray Kids and a live performance from their record-breaking world tour, alongside exclusive behind-the-scenes footage and intimate interviews with the band, Stray Kids: The dominATE Experience is an epic concert film that gives fans both a spectacular front-row seat and unique access to their favourite band.
Red Label is a Tamil movie starring Lenin, Azmin Yasar, R V Udhayakumar, Anumohan and Munishkanth in prominent roles. It is directed by K R Vinoth.

When Anand, an unemployed man lost in occult beliefs, pulls his wife Lalitha and daughter Meera into dangerous tantric rituals, their home descends into fear and madness. As Meera begins communicating with a mysterious entity called Honey, the line between reality and delusion blurs, leading the family toward a terrifying breakdown.

An inspirational true story of hope and resilience. It follows two athletes, a cancer survivor and a national swimmer, who face setbacks, fall apart, and fight their way back to life, rediscovering purpose and strength along the way.
Godaan is a tale of compassion, culture, and social reality. A reminder of our roots and a question of how far we have come in preserving our values and traditions.

Daanveer, a famously stingy but clever man, outwits a tricky uncle-nephew duo who try to fool him and earns their respect. When a priest demands a donation, Daanveer pretends to die to avoid paying, only for the priest to reveal himself as Lord Shiva. Praised for his cleverness, Daanveer is forgiven, lifts his miserliness, and vows to use his wealth for good, saving his wife and dedicating himself to charity.

A story of fearless love, lived with pride and passion. Suraj, known for his charm and quiet confidence, meets Vaishali, a bold, free-spirited girl who believes in loving on her own terms.

What starts as a spark turns into a romance that can't stay hidden. Each step challenges them, and every moment tests their bond. When fate finally intervenes, Rubaab takes a turn no one expects.

In Hyderabad, a chilling series of murders rattles the city, each victim found with the same organ missing. As fear spreads, the police race to uncover who the killer is and what connects the crimes, leading to a tense hunt where the truth finally comes to light.

Four friends reunite at a resort after years apart, sharing stories of girls who left a mark on their lives. Their tales of humor, charm, and adventure weave a delightful mix of friendship, love, and life's unexpected turns.
Maya faces the masked killers one final time in a brutal, full-circle reckoning of survival and revenge.

A village grocer falls for the girl of his dreams, only to be blocked by local superstitions and rigid traditions. Populated with quirky rural characters, this hilarious comedy follows his chaotic quest to bypass village sentiment and win her love.

Three girls stop for the night at an old hotel and sense a restless spirit haunting the place. When a young man arrives, unaware of the truth behind his father's murder, the ghost of his late father reveals that his skeleton still lies buried beneath the ground. Strikingly similar to his father, the hero uncovers the truth, takes revenge, and exposes those responsible for the murder.

In the village of Rudraram, divided between the Karmani and Dharmani lineages, Chandu and Bujjamma are born into rival sides of a long-standing feud and grow up as sworn enemies. When love unexpectedly blossoms between them, it disrupts the village's belief about loyalty, identity, and fate.
Gilli Mappilai is a Tamil movie starring Divya Thomas, T.S.R and Crane Manohar in prominent roles. It is written and directed by K. N. Padmaraja.
Sukran is a romantic comedy thriller that tells an engaging story while maintaining elements of love and friendship. In other words, it is also a love triangle.

A broken young man living behind shame and a borrowed identity is forced to confront himself when love and loss enter his life, pushing him toward quiet courage, self-acceptance, and the strength to stand as who he truly is.

Set during the daring Agra chapter of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj's life. The story follows his strategic brilliance, struggle against political betrayal, and the trials of Mughal captivity, highlighting the loyalty of his companions and one of Indian history's most legendary escapes. Bravery, strategy, and emotion drive a tale that celebrates Shivaji Maharaj's indomitable spirit.

t: The Return of the Army Man
d: The murder of an innocent civilian by the Gange's war fighters ignites the fury of Tiger, an army man who embarks on a relentless path of revenge. As he delivers justice, the law ultimately stands with him, blurring the line between vengeance and righteousness.

A medieval princess on a quest to avenge her father's death awakens in a realm between life and death, where she encounters an idealistic young man from the present day who shows her the possibility of a future free from bitterness and rage.
Fuelled by divine love, Kaada`s journey evolves from a hunting legacy into a thrilling saga of adventure, action, and romance, prompting him to leave his old ways behind.
A ten-year journey traces Madhusudan, aka Maddy, from a middle-class final-year degree student into the dark worlds of jail and the underworld.

A man cursed by God battles fate while striving to save a government school. Alongside the woman he loves, he faces relentless hardships in his struggle to break free from the curse and protect what matters most, seeking redemption and purpose.
If you are a representative of the production house, please share the details of the film with synopsis@bookmyshow.com

A devoted temple priest raised under the protection of Goddess Dakshina Kaali finds his faith shaken when an evil sorcerer deceives him into standing against the very deity who nurtured him. As dark forces threaten the village and the sacred shrine, the divine mother rises to protect her devotee, restore his faith, and battle the evil that seeks to destroy her temple.
Mangal Shootra portrays the tender bond between husband and wife, weaving human emotions and family values into a heartfelt story.
A manhole cleaner and a vegetable vendor fall in love during secret meetings in a train bathroom. When she stops appearing, he begins a dangerous search to find her.

Two friends wake up in their office to find the city overrun by zombies after a mysterious outbreak. As they struggle to survive, hidden tensions, broken relationships, and selfish choices turn their escape into a deadly game. Will they make it out alive?
A jobless graduate, torn between love, friendship, and responsibility, sets out for a new life abroad, but a shocking tragedy brings him back home, where he finds purpose, truth, and redemption.
In a world full of love stories, two friends are on a mission to stop one.

Vaibhav grows up carrying loss and a broken bond with his only parent. Hiding pain behind rebellion and humor, he longs for love. Years later, despite success and admiration, a forgotten teenage connection resurfaces, forcing him to confront the emptiness he never escaped.

In southern Kerala, the ancient Puthusserikkavu Mana is home to dark spirits. The wizard Meghanandha Brahman lifts the family's curse and fathers Ragu Ram with the maid Gayathri. Years later, Ragu Ram arrives at Lala Park, a kingdom on the Kerala-Karnataka-Tamil Nadu border, setting a destiny that will change the kingdom forever.

Ajeesh Hariharan, known as Junior Prince on social media, is a carefree youngster dreaming of stardom. His ordinary life flips overnight when the shoot of a superstar's film lands in his neighbourhood, unexpectedly pulling him closer to his ambition.
A police officer's pursuit of truth in a shocking prison crime intertwines with the lives of a widowed prison guard and a soon to be released inmate, unravelling a web of morality and redemption.

Shweta, an Indian doctor obsessed with the belief that cleanliness is godliness, is forced to confront her dark past when her childhood abuser continues to live freely. As buried trauma resurfaces, she sets out to carry out a perfectly clean act of justice, only to spiral into a dangerous game of obsession, morality, and murder.
They say India is a land of villages, and this is a story rooted in village life, meant to be experienced with the whole family.

A generation on the edge, where minor crimes surge, humanitarian values erode, and adolescence drifts into darkness. These shifts spark an urgent reckoning, begins on parenting, justice, and the relentless price of ambition.

Radha and Satya, once brought together by love, drift apart as work consumes their lives. Married with a young son, Radha longs for Satya's attention as their fourth wedding anniversary approaches on 29th February, prompting her to plan a heartfelt surprise that tests their bond.

Dasu's life takes a dark turn after his marriage when Avantika emerges and murders Panni Parvati, the grandmother who arranged the union for property. Cursed into a sinful spirit, Avantika roams in search of Amma, long dead, while Sivakumar, a police officer en route to Shweta City Resorts, is drawn into the supernatural force of Atmashakti.

In Chhattisgarh, love is easy, but finding a Sarkari Damad isn't.

Anurag, a 30-year-old man looking for a suitable match, is being rejected everywhere because he doesn't have a Sarkari Naukri, the ultimate status symbol. Even the family of the girl he loves demands the same! Now he must decide: earn the job, elope, move on or break the system itself.
Four bachelors and two young women meet at a secluded resort, where playful adventures and unexpected fun spiral into suspense when a shocking murder shakes their getaway.
Mohan Vallabh Jodi No. Ek is a heart-touching Gujarati feature film that beautifully portrays love, values, struggle, and the relationships between individuals and society.

In Kerala's history, the period of Smartha Vicharam reflects a rigid patriarchal society within Namboothiri households, where women had no rights or freedom. During this time, a Namboothiri woman courageously turns Smartha Vicharam itself into a weapon to rise against oppression and fight her own enslavement.

Abhi is forced into an unwanted marriage escapes on the wedding day. On the same train, Kriti, also a runaway bride, is fleeing her own fate. Strangers brought together by chance and misunderstandings, their journey turns into one of conflict, connection, and self-discovery. As emotions unfold, they must face a question: Does running away truly set you free?

A psychological crime thriller about a gifted chess player whose fragile mind turns violent as he begins torturing those who defeat him, leading to a string of mysterious disappearances. Unaware of his dark actions, his wife seeks help from psychologist Vishnu, while an inspector investigates the growing trail of missing players. What unfolds during the treatment and whether the truth is uncovered forms the core suspense of the film.

A businessman's family is thrown into turmoil when his son marries the woman he loves, only to face constant conflict with a hostile mother-in-law. As tensions escalate, the daughter-in-law, a devoted follower of Meldi Mata, places her faith in divine justice, believing Mataji's blessings will guide her through the endless struggle.

Operation Padma follows Intelligence Officer Veda, who uncovers a deadly plot to assassinate former Home Minister Nandi Kishore. The mastermind behind the conspiracy hires Kuldeep, a ruthless assassin with a flawless record. To counter the threat, Veda assembles a special unit `Operation Padma` with strategist Madhura and agents Vasu, Ramana, Padma, Rupa, and Avantika.

As Kuldeep closes in, the team engages in high-stakes surveillance, undercover missions, and psychological tactics. With secrets unravelling and trust on the line, it becomes a race against time to stop a killer who never misses. Can they save Nandi Kishore before it's too late?

Bahduh's life is shattered when David and his men brutally murder his parents. As the years pass, vengeance consumes him, shaping every choice he makes. When he finally achieves revenge, Bahduh is forced to confront a devastating truth!

In a whirlwind of misunderstandings, two rival neighbours, Vibhuti and Tiwari, find themselves on a riotous road trip with their wives, only to get tangled up with lovable gangster brothers, Shanti and Kranti, who turn a simple journey into an unforgettable comedy of errors.

Yogida is the story of Yogi, an honest police inspector who uncovers the murder behind a staged suicide. Punished with a transfer to Vyasarpadi, North Chennai, she takes on feared don Shekar Babu and his grip over crime, police, and politics, choosing justice over compromise.

When a relentless serial killer paralyses a quiet town, a frustrated Police officer uncovers a cryptic clue that links the modern-day slaughter to a string of events from decades prior. To catch the killer in their midst, they must unmask the secret that many are willing to keep closed.

A reckless young man's crime forces his respected father to choose duty over love, a decision that changes both their lives forever. Behind bars, the son is forced to face his mistakes and discovers the true meaning of life, unfolding a powerful story of conscience, sacrifice, and transformation.

In the 1960s Goa, brothers Arjun and Mahadev grow up amid poverty and struggle. Arjun escapes into dreams of flying, guided by his imaginary friend Kaju, but a sudden tragedy tests their bond. With Uncle Raghu's support, they face fear and hardship, as Arjun's dream of flight becomes a fight to rise above adversity, or risk being grounded forever.

When two unempowered women decide to seize control of their fate, their desperate choices spark a chain of risky moves that pull friends and foes into chaos. What begins as empowerment quickly turns into a hilarious, high-stakes comedy of errors where survival depends on wit, luck, and timing.

A heartburn of lovers, without any inhibitions of their ages, people eagerly call him to tell their love stories. The radio program becomes an instant hit with people, meanwhile, a young woman named Asha calls him and tells him her love story.

Himmat, a kind-hearted nursing student mocked for his innocence, decides to reinvent himself as a tough badmash. What starts as a playful transformation spirals into a high-energy journey of love, conflict, and ambition, turning a simple boy into a force to reckon with.

Gharga is not just a place; it is a mystery hidden from the world. Strangers arrive with secrets, unclear motives, and truths they refuse to reveal. As more people cross its borders, the line between hunter and hunted begins to blur. Desire, guilt, and danger collide as the land silently watches every move.

Zaara, a relentless sister seeking answers in her brother's unresolved case, challenges Inspector Arjun, after days of failed investigation. As faith in the system erodes, Zaara and the Inspector pursue the truth through parallel paths. Driven by conflicting beliefs, their journey turns Anomie - The Equation of Death into a tense psychological thriller that leaves one haunting truth behind.
Harpalde Shakti Na Amar Ajavada is a Gujarati movie directed by Jitu Bhai Jadeja. The movie features Jeet Upendra and Mehul Buch in pivotal roles.

In a small Bihar village, Arun, Mukesh, and Binod grow up dreaming of a bigger life, but Arun's forced child marriage to Reshma sets them on a path of loss and separation. A fresh start in Mumbai helps them rediscover themselves, until the past pulls Arun back home to confront unfinished bonds of friendship, love, and justice.

A hyperactive young man named Vikas finds his life turned upside down when he is forced to travel with two very different girls, Chitra and Spoorthi. As their unexpected journey unfolds, he begins to understand the value of life, the depth of family bonds, and the mindset of today's generation. The film explores powerful emotions and friendship.

DSP Dev, a disgraced police officer seeking redemption, is handed one final chance to crack the biggest black money racket in the state. But the case takes a shocking turn when the faces he must confront are not hardened criminals, but women and children hiding a far darker truth.
Get ready to witness a heart-touching journey of love, commitment, and the power of promises. Explore the depth of emotions when two souls, destined to be together, face the odds of life.
A story of hidden emotions and unspoken love, it delves into feelings buried deep within the heart, weaving together romance, drama, and action.

Five friends are left in shock when one of them is found dead. While it appears to be a suicide, the police suspect murder and begin an investigation. The remaining four must uncover the truth and reveal a hidden motive. Dark secrets emerge as they struggle to confront the reality.

Kailash and Aazhi, in love for six years, find their relationship shaken by a heated argument one night. When the words "Let's break up" are spoken, what seems like a routine fight turns into a life-changing moment. That single incident sets the story in motion.

A shy young man living under his overprotective father's shadow finally dares to fall in love with his confident colleague. When his father sabotages the relationship by creating a love triangle with another man, chaos follows. Caught between rivalry, misunderstandings, and self-doubt, he must find the courage to stand up for his love, confront his fears, and claim his own identity.
A thought-provoking, four-dimensional novel-based film inspired by true events, it explores the harsh realities and deep flaws of the education system laid bare during the pandemic.

Surya, a National Geographic photographer with a rare speech disorder, travels to Ooty to photograph a rare bird and unexpectedly meets Charu, a spirited orphan facing a forced marriage. As Charu plans an escape by choosing another man, she unknowingly grows closer to Surya, leading to a fateful moment where love must choose between truth and sacrifice.
A man and his wife struggle against the system after he is wrongly declared dead.

When a young woman and her innocent pet dog become targets of public rage, the villages buried violence explodes in shocking ways. What follows is a chilling journey into mob justice, moral policing, and the dangerous pleasure people find in punishment.

Two unemployed youths from neighbouring villages devise a plan to escape hardship and build a better future, but their ambition draws them into a web of corrupt village politics and ruthless bureaucracy. As their dream spirals into a desperate struggle for survival, their friendship, loyalty, and love are pushed to the breaking point in a harsh search for dignity.

A romantic story set in a village, centred on the blossoming love between a young boy and girl whose lives repeatedly cross at a local flour mill. Amid simple routines and rural charm, a heartfelt bond grows, capturing the innocence and warmth of first love.

On the brink of separation, a couple's final getaway to a secluded estate unravels into a haunting journey of love and fate, where secrets the house refuses to forget blur the line between love and heartbreak.

A delicious mix of confusion, chaos, and comedy set in the streets of Surat, where a simple situation spirals into a massive mess. A chain of hilarious misunderstandings creates complete "garbad," turning everything unpredictable and endlessly entertaining. Packed with witty moments and nonstop fun, it's a light-hearted family entertainer where the biggest mistakes lead to the funniest memories.

Set on the wild Yorkshire moors, Wuthering Heights follows the intense, ruinous bond between Catherine Earnshaw and Heathcliff, the orphan her family takes in. When Catherine marries into wealth, Heathcliff's heartbreak twists into vengeance, unleashing years of conflict that echo through the next generation. It is a haunting tale of love, obsession, and the lasting scars of choices driven by pride and desire.

A carefree young man remains oblivious to the girl who truly loves him until his best friend's wedding forces him to confront his real feelings. In a race against time, he stumbles through chaos, emotions, and self-discovery, realising that true love isn't always dramatic; it's the bond that quietly stands by you.

A family thriller centred on a clash of generations, where a father's belief in hard work and values collides with his son's faith in smart, modern success. As tradition meets new-age thinking, the conflict unfolds through mystery, romance, and suspense.

A chaotic comedy about a filmmaker trying to navigate a troubled film production, Funky delivers a rapid-fire, humour-driven look at the madness behind making movies, blending eccentric characters, unpredictable situations, and punch-line-heavy fun.
Ramu, a serial killer, sends web messages to victims and the police department. Can the police catch him?

The story revolves around Prem whose dream is to do a love marriage since he saw the film `Love Story` but he gets married to Suman in an arranged marriage. Will Prem find his love in Suman? Watch the movie to find out!

Jayakrishnan arrives in Makaram Thuruth, a small village in central Kerala, determined to prepare for the IAS exam. Recognising his ambition, his well-wisher, Advocate Sreedharan, supports him fully and arranges a secluded place for him to stay, allowing Jayakrishnan to focus entirely on his studies.

t: AT: Welcome to the Dark Side
d: Shivan and Akash, seemingly strangers, rise against Kali, who runs a high-tech empire of imported drugs and illegal media through the dark web. A deadly race ensues to locate a mysterious rogue hacker who holds the encryption keys to this digital underworld. Crucially, this missing figure shares a shocking secret connection to both the hunters and the villain.

After a political assassination fails, 23-year-old Palash becomes a fugitive, hunted by the very system he once believed in. As he flees through the conflict-ridden Sundarbans, his understanding of ideology, resistance, and identity begins to shift. Caught between labels of extremist and revolutionary, anti-national and patriot, his journey becomes a gripping character study of belief, survival, and an unbroken spirit that refuses to die.

When a cold-blooded killer, Victor Mahadev, and his ruthless gang hunt two boys into a dense forest, a wildlife photographer, Venba Subbaiya, is accidentally pulled into their deadly game. Trapped deep in the wilderness, survival becomes the only law as a brutal battle unfolds over who will live to see the next dawn.
After a divorce, a writer falls in love with a publisher who wishes to marry her.

A weekend camp at a heritage resort turns deadly when a young woman is found murdered after a wild party night, leading to a secret lockdown and a covert investigation. As suspects shift and secrets unravel, a seemingly simple case exposes a chilling truth where nothing is accidental and the killer has been hiding in plain sight.

He falls in love with an angel who appears only in his dreams, a love that ends in heartbreak. Yet the same emotions spill into his waking life, unchanged and unresolved. Carrying that love in his heart, he sets out to reclaim the angel he lost in his dreams, this time, in reality.

A bold romantic comedy centred on Shiva, a charming college boy juggling three very different relationships. As he struggles to keep them secret, love, lust, and chaos collide in a playful mix of adult humour, romance, and comedy.

A boy whose story begins in a cemetery, where most stories end, arrives in a town for the sake of a friend. There, two rival gangs are locked in constant war. Chandra, a gang leader, turns the boy into a weapon named Nakshatra. As Nakshatra finds love in Bhoomi, he must choose between loyalty, friendship, and love.
Sky is a Telugu movie starring Murali Krishnam Raju, Shruti Shetty and Anand Bharath in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Pridhvi Pericharla.

An elusive thief, eyeing his final score, encounters a disillusioned insurance broker at her own crossroads. As their paths intertwine, a relentless detective trails them, hoping to thwart the multi-million dollar heist they are planning.

The narrative follows the intertwined lives of people connected to La Paradise, an urban massage therapy centre. It centres on Mathan, a man struggling to distinguish between the reality of love and its fictionalised ideals. Through a sharp lens of social satire, the story explores adult themes and human behaviour within this unique urban setting.

Ruthless bootleggers, a corrupt government official, and a merciless village leader dominate the underground liquor trade. As pressure mounts, alliances fracture, and the village erupts into a storm of violence and betrayal, leaving a trail of bodies in its wake.

When Amaravathi calls, fear answers. This gripping narrative combines spine-tingling visuals and powerful performances into an edge-of-the-seat thriller that explores a chilling summons from the unknown.

A woman's life shatters when her husband dies by suicide just months after their arranged marriage. Refusing to accept the surface truth, she investigates with the help of the police and her father-in-law, uncovering clues that seem to explain it all. But just as the mystery appears solved, a chilling revelation exposes a far darker reality.

Three men with contrasting beliefs about love cross paths with a woman who holds her own uncompromising values. One sees love as sacred and lifelong, another believes in living freely without commitment, and the third aspires to renounce worldly ties and preach spirituality. As their lives intertwine, the story questions whether they can remain true to their ideals when love and desire truly test them.

A struggling interior designer and an aspiring IT professional form an unlikely bond while navigating life in an unfamiliar city. Their mutual support is put to the test when success comes to one, leaving the other behind.

Seetha, an aspiring chef, narrowly escapes a fatal accident that changes her outlook on life. As she sets out to thank those who unknowingly saved her, she falls in love with Abhishek, a stranger hiding a secret. When the truth emerges, Seetha must choose between love, honesty, and her own path forward.

t: Mahashivratri 2026: A Night With The Divine (Live Screening)
d: A spiritually immersive live event celebrating the sacred night of Mahashivratri, bringing devotees together for an evening of devotion, reflection, and divine connection, continuing the revered format from the previous year.

d: Experience the ultimate showdown as the world's greatest cricket rivalry takes over the big screen. Witness every high-octane moment and feel the thrill of this historic clash live in stunning cinematic glory.

t: Sri Lanka Vs Zimbabwe ICC Mens T20 WC 2026
d: Sri Lanka locks horns with Zimbabwe in a high-stakes T20 World Cup clash, where experience meets fearless ambition under the global spotlight. Expect explosive stroke play, tactical bowling battles, and a contest that could redefine the momentum of the tournament.

Five friends get lost in a no man's land and seek shelter in an abandoned house. They find an ancient chest at the house and open it to unleash a mythical demon. The story explores the lives of these five friends that go on a toss once ancient mysticism starts to play with their minds.
When a young man finally gets the chance to take over his father's business, he walks into an unexpected world instead of a boardroom, and ends up juggling love, lies, and a legacy no one saw coming.
Inspector Seetharam, hoping to reunite with his estranged sister after years apart, must track down a brutal, psychotic serial killer terrorising the town of Anegadde.
A journey of two individuals who set out on a travel to explore life & relationship in a different perspective.
A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.
Maharani is a Bhojpuri movie starring Rishabh Kashyap, Sanchita Banerjee and Saba Khan in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Veeru Thakur.

Siva, an ambitious youth aspiring to be a police officer, wins Sivani's love and marries her, only for her to be abducted the very next day by a powerful minister intent on forcing her into marriage. With a dangerous criminal also hunting her, the story centers on Sivani's strength and whether Siva can rescue her from his enemies.

Arjun, a hot-headed young man, idolizes his father Shakthi, an honest police inspector who dreams of seeing him become an IPS officer. Parallelly, three morally conflicted assassins are assigned to transport drugs worth crores. When their paths collide, choices trigger betrayal, test legacy, and set the stage for redemption where one man's future could mean another's downfall.

The story follows Krisha, a young girl who falls into a trap set by a boy named Shaswat, who hides his real name and identity. Unaware of his true intentions, Krisha is drawn toward marriage, only to face the disturbing reality of deceit and forced religious conversion.

After being dismissed from the royal palace, small-town inventor Chanan Singh returns to his village in disgrace. When a royal glider crashes into his fields and threatens his livelihood, he is drawn into a clash of power, ego, and injustice, forcing him to fight for dignity and redemption.
Hi-Fi Bako is a Gujarati movie starring Muni Jha, Prenal Oberai, Samarth Sharma, Bhavini Jani and Kalpesh Patel in prominent roles. It is directed by Nishith Brahmbhatt.

Kailash and Aazhi, in love for six years, find their relationship shaken by a heated argument one night. When the words "Let's break up" are spoken, what seems like a routine fight turns into a life-changing moment. That single incident sets the story in motion.

Set in 1970s Mysore, Sarala Subbarao follows Sarala and Subbarao as they navigate love, tradition, and personal aspirations within marriage. Their journey explores the strength of relationships and the values that shape a lasting union, questioning what marriage truly demands.
Chetu's life, a poignant dance between tradition and tragedy, as Hulivesha becomes his solace and legacy, amidst turmoil and loss, his story fades into mystery.

Driven by circumstances, a man plunges into the dark world of crime, momentarily losing sight of his family. As consequences unfold, he finds solace only in his father and mother, who stand by him until the end. Suri Anna's story is a stark, gripping reminder to the youth: crime is not the answer, and family is the ultimate support system.

After years of friction between boss Karthik and his subordinate Sumithra, the two enter a "fake marriage" to appease family expectations, promising to part ways in six months. However, following a serious argument, Sumithra leaves for good, prompting Karthik to cope by living with a mannequin resembling her. When Sumithra discovers his peculiar obsession, she must confront the depths of his feelings for her.
Do dil, ek seher, aur ek imperfectly perfect prem kahani!
A gripping tale inspired by a true event.
Shatak: Sangh Ke 100 Varsh traces the 100-year journey of the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh, exploring its evolution from its founding years to its present-day influence.
Dreamy Singh is a Hindi movie from SRG Films International.
Blending romance, drama, humour, and emotional moments, Mixing Preethe is a journey of self-discovery that highlights how love can transform lives and redefine destiny.

t: Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die
d: A "Man from the Future" arrives at a diner in Los Angeles, where he must recruit the precise combination of disgruntled patrons to join him on a one-night quest to save the world from the terminal threat of a rogue artificial intelligence.

Surya, an honest yet hot-tempered cop known for his encounter killings, is transferred to Neyveli following another controversial case. Soon after his arrival, a murder involving a woman named Vinisha shakes the town. As Surya dives into the case, he must navigate between truth and deceit to protect both love and justice.
Vidyarthi Vidyathinigale is a Malayalam movie starring Manoj Vivan, Bhavana App and Chandan Shetty in prominent roles. It is directed by Arun Amukta.
