If you are a representative of the production house, please share the details of the film with synopsis@bookmyshow.com

In 2075, ten-year-old Iris discovers Arco, a mysterious boy from a distant future who falls from the sky. As he struggles to return to his own time, Iris shelters him and becomes determined to help him find a way back.

Drawn back to Chennai by a call from his former lover, Dheeren checks into a secluded guest house where unsettling events and vivid dreams begin to haunt him. As dreams and reality blur, he realises the visions are clues tied to his past and his ex-lover's fate, forcing him to confront buried truths before the guest house claims him next.

In a politically charged setting, a prominent Home Minister steps in to resolve a troubling case involving missing schoolchildren, while a determined Crime Branch DSP uncovers shocking events during the investigation, blending action with public service and intrigue.

It is a love story about a broken man who falls for a woman, only to discover that she is the sister of his former lover's killer. As her love begins to transform him, the ghost of his past returns seeking revenge, forcing the couple to confront a terrifying supernatural threat and fight for their survival.

After losing their son Hamnet to plague, Agnes and William Shakespeare grapple with grief in 16th-century England. A healer, Agnes must find strength to care for her surviving children while processing her devastating loss.
In 1977, a technology expert flees a mysterious past and returns to his hometown of Recife in search of peace. He soon realizes the city is far from the refuge he seeks.

Sixty-year-old Ramanna sets out to revive the long-abandoned Kambala to fulfill his mother's wish and mend a decades-old feud between the Manjottiguttu and Mahabala families. As political conspiracies, legal battles, and violent rivalries threaten the event, the village must confront its past to reclaim its pride and unity.

A heartfelt journey of love and relationships, following Shubh and Shraddha as their college romance grows into marriage. As life tests them with financial struggles and emotional challenges, their bond is pushed to its limits, revealing whether love can endure life's many ups and downs.

Despite astrological opposition to their union, Vikram and Pranjal decide to marry. But the arrival of Shweta sparks misunderstandings and tragedy, leading to an accident that leaves Pranjal in a coma and spiraling into madness. Standing by her through it all, Vikram chooses unwavering devotion, binding their love beyond time.

A poignant and socially rooted cinematic work, the film reflects the realities of our land through the silent struggles and emotional journeys of ordinary people. Told with honesty and sensitivity, it encourages viewers to look beyond appearances, understand life from another's perspective, and recognise the quiet strength within human relationships.

A filmmaker and an actor confront threats from powerful anti-social forces to release a hard-hitting documentary that exposes corporate corruption. As intimidation escalates, they risk everything, even their lives, to ensure the truth survives beyond them.

Santi, known as "Promoter Boudi," plans to build an old-age home and orphanage on a prime plot, but a ruthless developer wants it for a shopping mall. As past secrets resurface, a battle begins between compassion and greed.
A numerology-obsessed junior lecturer from Ongole falls for a woman bound by a frightening marriage belief, sparking a fun-filled rom-com where love challenges fate itself.

In a future where myths are realised through medical science, a string of mysterious deaths plunges the city into chaos. Arjun Hayagriva, a brilliant Police Officer, must solve the crimes while fighting to save his failing marriage. It is a high-stakes hunt where ancient legends meet modern medical evolution.
Wad Daw is a Khasi movie directed by Section Syiemlieh. The movie features Pyllaitmitre Lypon and Rimika Dkhar in the pivotal roles.

Baidyanath is a tech-savvy and modern elderly man who lives alone in his flat. His son resides in America, and his housemaid Lakshmi handles the daily chores. Despite having his close friend Ramakant by his side, a troubling thought haunts him: "When I die, will there be four shoulders to carry me to the cremation ground?"
Super Hit is a Kannada movie starring Gilli Nata, Gowrav Shetty, Pramod Shetty and Dragon Manju in prominent roles. It is directed by Vijayanandha.

Shakti is an inspiring tale of women's strength, resilience, and self-respect. Centred on a sensitive and powerful subject, the film sheds light on the injustices faced by women, particularly the harsh realities of prostitution, while tracing a woman's courageous journey to reclaim her identity, dignity, and rightful place in society.

A fallen young Namboothiri, hiding as a temple priest, unexpectedly falls in love with the daughter of a disgraced priest. But their fragile bond is tested by betrayal, lingering rivalries, and a shared search for redemption.

In the town of Avarathi, a barber community lives under the brutal control of a ruthless broker who exploits, humiliates, and silences anyone who resists. As fear and injustice rule their lives, a young man named Ashoka rises to challenge the oppression, leading a fight against exploitation, violence, and moral decay.

t: England vs New Zealand: Super 8: T20 WC 2026
d: In a clash built on history and heartbreak, England cricket team and New Zealand cricket team collide in a Super 8 showdown at the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026.

Set in Nagercoil, a devoted father's world is shaken when he discovers his daughter's relationship with a young man. A solitary journey into the open sea becomes a moment of reckoning, where love, responsibility, and choice quietly reshape their lives.

An epic love story of two people coming from completely different backgrounds and their ordinary life turning extraordinary due to a supernatural phenomenon: a "space-time vortex." Witness Indra and Nargis's journey to save the universe.

Set in 1999, the film follows a poor family that migrates in search of a livelihood, centring on young Kannan and his mother Padma, who toils in a quarry to survive. As illness, poverty, and social ridicule test them, Kannan takes on harsh work to care for his ailing mother, portraying a moving tale of resilience, maternal love, and dignity amid hardship.

An orphan who runs a small mobile shop falls in love with a college girl and wins her heart, but a misunderstanding tears them apart. As he searches for her in guilt and desperation, he uncovers a shocking truth in a journey shaped by love, trust, and loss.

Set against the backdrop of the 1971 Bangladesh Liberation War, Basudha, a young refugee, seeks shelter in India and falls prey to a powerful political leader. As exploitation and betrayal destroy lives, she rises to take revenge, fighting to reclaim her dignity and lost innocence.

On a day of chaos, a brutal attack and a sudden family emergency force enemies and lovers into the confines of an ICU. As fear, anger, and buried emotions collide, the truth behind the violence gradually unravels in a tense emotional thriller where every second counts.

After being expelled for robbing their college canteen, two misfit best friends get one last shot at redemption by enrolling five children from a nearby slum into school. What starts as a desperate deal turns into an unexpected journey of chaos, conscience, and change.

In a village in Kannur, a group of mischievous school friends spend their days in carefree adventure. Their world turns magical when the myths once whispered by their grandparents begin to come alive, blurring the line between legend and reality as the past reveals itself in unexpected ways.

Naina, a simple village girl chasing her dreams in Bhubaneswar, finds love with her charming colleague Prem, until one shocking night turns her world upside down. Arrested in a high-profile drug smuggling case, she must fight to prove her innocence as a dark conspiracy begins to unravel, testing love, trust, and survival.

Inspired by the life of a police officer, the film explores his personal and professional struggles amid political pressure and power abuse. As he battles guilt and systemic corruption, it raises a powerful question: Does political power control the police, or can the police rise above it to truly serve the public?

When an entitled young man drags his father to court for failing his duties, the shocked father responds in a powerful, unexpected way, unfolding a gripping courtroom battle that ultimately teaches the son the true meaning of responsibility, love, and family.
Continuing the legacy of its earlier installments, the film explores enduring love and emotional turmoil, as romance is tested against societal and familial pressures.

When a new Ghostface killer terrorises the quiet town where Sidney has rebuilt her life, her worst fears come true as her daughter becomes the next target. To protect her family, she must confront the horrors of her past and stop the bloodshed once and for all.

Across three Indian states, three young women defy family and tradition for love, only to slip into unseen cages of control and silence. What begins as romance and rebellion mutates into manipulation and loss of freedom, until the women strike back, turning captivity into a battlefield for survival.
It follows a clever yet lazy man who fakes his corrupt father's death to inherit his police job, only for chaos to erupt when his father unexpectedly wakes up from a coma.

Jerry, the son of a powerful tycoon, sets out to summit Mount Everest to fulfill his father's unfinished dream. Guided by a mysterious Sherpa and torn between ambition and his love for Shreya, Jerry's climb becomes a test of legacy, pride, and self-discovery at the world's highest peak.

Four friends known as the Cult Gang get a rare chance to star as heroes in a film, but the project collapses due to financial setbacks. Desperate to fund it themselves, they resort to kidnapping for money, only to become entangled with a dangerous faction leader, putting their lives and dreams at risk.
A grieving father dives into a VR memory game only to unearth a devastating secret of his lifelong idol, the world's adored superstar Frida Soman.

A brutal killer known as the Head Smasher live-streams his murders on the dark web, terrorising the city. Officer Rakshak is on the verge of catching him until a shocking twist swaps their bodies. Now, the cop and the killer are trapped in each other's lives, leading to a tense, high-stakes battle for survival and identity.

Sixty-year-old Ramanna sets out to revive the long-abandoned Kambala to fulfil his mother's wish and mend a decades-old feud between the Manjottiguttu and Mahabala families. As political conspiracies, legal battles, and violent rivalries threaten the event, the village must confront its past to reclaim its pride and unity.

A devoted single father's simple life is upended when his young daughter faces a sudden medical crisis. As he races against time and fading hope, they cling to fleeting moments of joy, discovering the true depth of love and resilience in the face of uncertainty.

A simple young woman, Simpal Yadav, is torn between her first love and her familys pressure to marry another man. Caught in a web of personal trauma, social stigma, and political tension, she must make a life-defining choice.

t: Pakistan vs Sri Lanka: Super 8: T20 WC 2026
d: Asian rivals reignite their competitive fire as Pakistan national cricket team face the ever-unpredictable Sri Lanka national cricket team in a decisive Super 8 battle at the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026.

t: India Vs West Indies: Super 8: T20 WC 2026
d: A high-voltage Super 8 showdown awaits as India's precision and depth meet the West Indies' explosive flair in a contest built for the big stage. With semi-final stakes rising, expect fearless cricket and momentum-shifting moments under the T20 spotlight.

t: Zimbabwe vs South Africa: Super 8: T20 WC 2026
d: Southern pride is on the line as the Zimbabwe national cricket team takes on the high-powered South Africa national cricket team in a fast-paced Super 8 encounter at the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026.

t: South Africa vs New Zealand: Semi 1: T20 WC 2026
d: South Africa and New Zealand are set to clash in a high-stakes ICC World Cup 2026 semi-final, with both teams eyeing a long-awaited shot at the title. Expect a fierce contest between South Africa's power-packed batting and New Zealand's disciplined bowling attack.
Aganipariksha is a Bhojpuri movie starring Khesari Lal Yadav, Akanksha Puri. Neelam Giri, Sushil Singh, Prakash Jais and Sonu Pandey in prominent roles. It is directed by Lal Babu Pandit.

In a small village in Magadha, Vishnu Singh struggles with constant complaints about his hot-tempered son, Ganesh. Fiercely protective of women, Ganesh lands in trouble after assaulting a student while defending his adopted sister. A college girl, Raksha, is drawn to his boldness and falls for him, and he eventually returns her feelings. But when his mischievous friends tease Raksha, misunderstandings arise, straining their budding romance.

t: India vs England: Semi 2: T20 WC 2026
d: India and England gear up for a blockbuster ICC World Cup 2026 semi-final, promising a clash of cricketing heavyweights. With India's explosive top order and England's dynamic all-rounders, a thrilling battle awaits on the road to the final.

In a city crippled by injustice, a powerful drug syndicate operates beyond the reach of the law, leaving the police helpless. When the system fails, Eshwar rises as a vigilante, taking justice into his own hands. The story follows his relentless mission to dismantle the drug mafia and restore order to the city.
Vadam explores the hero's extraordinary bond with his bull and is based on Vada Manju Virattu. The film emotionally highlights family relationships.

In a charming village, a teenage girl passionately pursues her musical dream. However, life's harsh realities challenge her innocence. As she faces these trials, she embarks on a journey to rediscover the profound connection between music and life, seeking a new harmony in the symphony of her dreams.

Rani, a small-town girl, dreams of becoming a singer and joins a reality show. Encouraged by Raj, she enters the entertainment world, only to face exploitation and emotional trauma. As Rani spirals into depression, Raj takes on the system to protect her. The story explores the dark realities of fame, the toll of social media obsession, and the need for compassion in an industry driven by profit and image.

Mridul, a retired Army man, returns to Assam with his wife and two grown-up daughters after many years of working outside the state. Once home, he visits his elder sister's place only to get entangled in fixing the marriage of his nephew Indu. It's not just him; his whole family, the entire village, is involved in the most bizarre marriage that has taken place in the village in a long, long time.

When every villager suddenly receives a crore, greed replaces purpose, and the community begins to collapse. As obsession with money pushes them toward ruin, a spiritual awakening reminds them that life is built not on wealth but on love, compassion, and human connection.
Jayakrishna is a Kannada movie starring Raj Ananda Ram, Rashmitha Shetty and Pranathi Ganiga in prominent roles. It is directed by Raj Ananda Ram.
During a single night between sunset and sunrise, a moral conflict erupts into a nerve-shredding fight for survival.

In a quiet village where gossip spreads faster than the wind, a swaggering young man becomes the talk of the town after his wedding night sparks unexpected rumours. What follows is a hilarious chain of misunderstandings, ego clashes, and small-town chaos. Mension House Mallesh is a lively rural entertainer packed with satire and nonstop laughter.

Sangeetha moves into a new flat with her husband, only to experience strange and unsettling incidents from the very first night. As she senses a mysterious presence linked to a Buddha idol left behind, she sets out to uncover the truth and reclaim peace in her home.
This film delves into a chilling plot by a group of anti-social elements who devise a catastrophic plan to destroy humanity and profit from the ensuing global chaos.

The film centers on a gripping investigation to uncover the real killer behind a mysterious murder. Suspicion falls on two key figures: the friend who offered the couple shelter and the wife of the victim. As the plot unfolds, the story delves into how both characters navigate the chaos and attempt to escape the tangled web of the crime.
When a woman brings her partner to an isolated hill house to reveal a life-changing secret, strange events begin to occur as her past collides with her present.
The film presents an unconventional, absurd, and surreal take on everyday socio-political life.

A young interior designer from Kochi dreams of becoming a social media celebrity. As she chases online validation and curated perfection, she gradually finds herself trapped in a digital persona that distances her from her true self.
When James receives a mysterious letter from his lost love Mary, he is drawn to Silent Hill, a once-familiar town now consumed by darkness.

Tighi is a tender, heart-warming story of two estranged sisters brought together when their mother falls ill. As they reunite under one roof after years apart, old memories help them understand each other again, until a secret their mother has kept for decades is revealed.
Set around an ancient ritual where faith is expressed through physical endurance.

An intense murder investigation unfolds when a man refuses to accept a death casually deemed natural by the police. As he digs deeper, what begins as doubt turns into a relentless pursuit of truth, uncovering layers of deception, danger, and powerful emotions that refuse to stay buried.
Chellamada Nee Enakku is a Tamil movie starring Vashi Karan, Neha Sri and Boss Venkat in prominent roles. It is directed by Anand Shivam

A string of brutal murders grips the city, placing one man under intense suspicion. As two relentless police officers dig deeper, buried secrets begin to surface. In this gripping Chhattisgarhi suspense thriller, nothing is as it seems until the final twist.
One girl. Zero memory. Two men present entirely different narratives about her history. In a world that resets every day, who can Aditi trust when she can't even trust herself?

Maridasa, a cheerful college-going boy deeply attached to his mother and his love interest, unexpectedly falls into the trap of an underworld don and his associates. Their grip on his life turns his once-happy world into a nightmare, pushing him into a struggle he never intended to face.

A young woman's life unravels when her car begins behaving on its own, sparking paranormal events marked by a blood-stained hand with a missing finger. As the haunting grows stronger, she investigates and uncovers a buried past of betrayal and vengeance driving the spirit's return.

On the verge of marriage, TV anchor Karthik's life unravels when an embarrassing video leaks online. With his best friend Vasu and hacker Chitti, he dives into chaotic cover-ups, racing against time to save his reputation before everything goes viral.

A struggling boatman is given six months to earn half of a wealthy family's fortune to marry the woman he loves. Desperate, he goes undercover as a police officer and sets his sights on a risky scheme, only to find himself caught in deception, mystery, and a high-stakes battle for power.
A devoted mother is shattered when her 12-year-old daughter goes missing. As she turns to the police for help, unexpected twists deepen the mystery. What really happened?

Rooted in Odisha`s fading wedding ritual of Kandana, where brides once expressed their emotions through poetic wailing during the bidayi, the film explores a tradition that has gradually disappeared since the 1990s.

During a college documentary shoot at historic Bhide Wada, Jai Sabnis captures a chilling incident on camera that puts her in grave danger. Pressured by her family and boyfriend to stay silent, she finds herself torn between fear and truth. Drawing strength from the legacy of Savitribai Phule and Mahatma Jyotiba Phule, Jai chooses to stand up against a powerful system, risking everything in her fight for justice.

t: Yaarra Antha Paiyan Nanthan Antha Paiyan
d: Vijay and Shalini's strained marriage collides with Deepika's loneliness after her husband's death. A secret affair sparks but turns dangerous when Sivakumar, a corrupt sub-inspector obsessed with Deepika, begins to hunt her. Trapped between forbidden love and a ruthless predator, how long can the truth stay buried?

CI Honey Davis hunts a serial killer who robs and murders women, only to discover he is the man who killed his wife. Meanwhile, two drug dealers flee with the killer's loot, and their paths converge at the home of novelist Manohar Shivdas, who hides a murder of his own, leading to a tense three-way confrontation.
Ghangtaul follows an IAS officer who leaves his village for the big city, only for fate and the pull of life to lead him back to where it all began.

Set in a Bangalore slum, the story follows five mischievous children named after the five elements, each reflecting their unique traits. Their carefree lives change when an accident caused by a dangerous pothole injures Akash's mother. Determined to make a difference, the children try to fix the problem themselves, but their journey tests their courage, unity, and hope for change.

After his honest police officer father is murdered, Riyas joins the force and navigates love, betrayal, and revenge to uncover the truth behind the killing and ultimately finds peace with Justina and their child.

In 1985 North Karnataka, during Chandappa Harijana's reign, Ram and Sithara celebrate her birthday. When Maran secretly records them and attempts to blackmail Sithara, an enraged Ram confronts him. In a fit of anger, Ram misbehaves with Maran's wife to teach him a lesson.

Cockroach is a bold, hard-hitting drama that explores an unlikely bond between a street-side sex worker and a contract killer. Set against the hypocrisy of a morally decaying society, the film questions who the real dirty ones are. Dark, intense, and uncompromising, Cockroach holds a mirror to a world that applauds violence yet judges survival.

A young man living with his mother in a village falls into heavy debt after arranging his sister's wedding. As a ruthless debt collector begins threatening him, his worried mother seeks police protection to safeguard her son.

Samar, a charismatic college leader, wins over the reserved Jasneet, and they fall in love. But jealousy and political rivalry spark a misunderstanding that makes her believe he betrayed her. Before he can reveal the truth, tragedy strikes. Can their love survive?

A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman, and the bride is born. What ensues is beyond what either of them imagined: murder, possession, a wild and radical cultural movement! and outlaw lovers in a wild and combustible romance.

On the mysterious Kerala-Tamil Nadu border stands a forest no one dares to enter. Whispers of those who vanished within, and tales of unseen supernatural forces, have long haunted the surrounding villages.

Told through Nithya's point of view, the story follows her battle with PTSD after a fire accident at home. As she recovers, she begins seeing the face of her missing boyfriend, Michael, in every man she meets, intensifying her trauma. Her search for answers slowly reveals what happened to Michael while forcing her to confront the darkness within her own mind.

A selfless young woman uses the power of a magical pen to uplift the underprivileged in her village, never thinking of herself. But as her efforts grow, a question emerges: Is she truly changing society or slowly losing herself in the process?

After a soldier is martyred in war or a terror attack, a bold proposal captures the nation's attention: every Indian contributes 1 rupee as a collective tribute. The initiative supports the bereaved family and builds memorials in the capital and the soldier's hometown, turning personal sacrifice into a symbol of national unity.
Enhypen [Walk the Line Summer Edition] comes to theaters. Follow their journey from debut to million-seller artist to record-breaking Tokyo Dome show, 2025 grand prize win, and Coachella stage.

A Kashmiri Pandit family in Jammu takes their grieving grandfather, who has memory issues, back to Kashmir. He seeks emotional closure after his wife's death and reconnection with their displaced community's heritage.
Marm - Ek Bhed is a Gujarati movie starring Vaishakhee Shah, Mir Hanif, Grancy Kaneria and Parmeshwar S. Sirsikar in prominent roles. It is directed by Kanu Prajapati.
Divyaa is a Tamil movie written and directed by RJP.

A social work student visiting Kamathipura for her research becomes an unexpected witness to a bizarre dilemma when a local pimp and several sex workers struggle to perform the last rites of an unknown elderly sex worker because no one knows her caste or religion.

A family follows a 200-year-old tradition of visiting a forest temple when a woman becomes pregnant. When a nine-month-pregnant woman is taken there, she encounters unexpected danger, uncovering dark secrets behind the temple and the mysterious forest.

At a Madurai police station, the son of a powerful Chennai gangster is brutally beaten by four policemen and dumped outside the city, only to be found murdered the next day. Blaming the officers, the gangster unleashes ruthless revenge on them and their families. As fear and suspicion mount, one officer races to uncover the real killer before everything spirals out of control.

A man raised on strong moral values by his father tries to uphold them in a changing world. But when his own children reject those ideals, he is forced to confront the painful divide between generations.

2 Way highlights a social issue where three influential young women sexually assault a young man to prove they are no less than men. When the victim seeks justice, he is instead blamed and accused, exposing the power of influence and society's bias against male victims.

Welcome to the Red Lorry Film Festival 2026, where cinematic excellence met artistic expression and shifted the gears of Indias film culture in its first grand edition in March 2026.

After such a successful test-drive with 111 carefully curated films across 14 categories, spanning 16 languages from 16 countries, the Red Lorry Film Festival is raring to go for a bigger, bolder lap, in a brand-new avatar as 3.0 in Mumbai.

This time around, get ready to be enthralled by premiere screenings and movies from across the globe and sneak previews.

So, hop onboard!
A compelling crime drama that explores human emotions, relationships, and the struggles of individuals trying to find their place in society, unfolding through an intense and engaging narrative.

Anthony is a Tamil movie starring Kayal Vincent, T.J. Bhanu, Arul Dass, Nizhalgal Ravi and Kalaivalari Saga Ramanathas in prominent roles. It is directed by Sukirthan Christhuraja and Jenosan Rajeswar.

t: Aurora: What Happened to the Earth?
d: Aurora's debut concert film shows her biggest headlining showa sold-out performance for 18,000 fans at Mexico City's Palacio de los Deportes.

The story follows Raghav, a troubled artist living in isolation after personal loss and betrayal. His life gradually intertwines with several other wounded souls, each carrying their own struggles and emotions. Through their connected lives, the narrative explores the complexities of the human mind and the search for inner peace.

Raj and Muskan fall in love despite their families being bitter Hindu-Muslim rivals. When it is revealed that Muskan is Balwant Singh's lost daughter and Raj is Salim Khan's son, the truth reunites the families and highlights a message of communal harmony.
Keluthi is a Tamil movie starring Kannika, Yuvaraja and Karate Raja in prominent roles. It is directed by Yuvaraja.

Ditching traditional melodrama for raw grit, the story offers an authentic dive into the Indian judicial system. Set within the corridors of a district court, it highlights the human cost of bureaucracy and the grueling struggle for justice through a stark, realistic lens.

Hema and Arun meet after a road accident, and their bond gradually deepens. But with Hema already married, their growing closeness begins to complicate her life, setting the stage for an emotional conflict over love, loyalty, and choice.
After being left at the altar in Rome, a man decides to go on his honeymoon alone.

The story revolves around a critical deadline set for 10 a.m. the next day. As time runs out, the characters are caught in a tense race against the clock, trying to escape a dangerous situation and survive the unfolding crisis.

Jalebi Rocks is a heartfelt and inspiring film about Vidya Pathak, a 48-year-old housewife. It`s a family film that creates a satisfying and unforgettable experience for every family member. Jalebi Rocks celebrates resilience, self-worth, and the indomitable spirit of a woman who refuses to be defined by her age or circumstances. It is a story of achievement, proving that it is never too late to pursue one`s dreams and create a fulfilling, meaningful life.

Inspired by his teacher, who named him Bhagat Singh and shaped his values, a tribal boy grows up rooted in strong morals and unwavering courage. Standing firm against injustice, he takes on evil forces despite overwhelming odds. Ustaad Bhagat Singh is the story of a man who fights not just with strength, but with integrity and purpose.

Youth follows 15-year-old Praveen as he enters adolescence determined to find true love before school ends. Through a series of relationships and heartbreaks, he gradually discovers the real meaning of love, shaping his maturity and outlook on life.
Adi's world is transformed when he adopts Nidhi, but their happy home is soon threatened by a string of unsettling occurrences.

In 1997, University Exam Controller Moushumi Sen disappeared amid a 50-crore scam. While headlines claimed she fled to London, a silenced cop suspected a darker political conspiracy. Two decades later, journalist Anupam reopens the case, unearthing a labyrinth of institutional rot.

Aadu 3, the third installment of the popular franchise, is an epic fantasy in which a chaotic twist unleashes a Pandora's box of reincarnations across multiple timelines. What follows is nonstop madness, outrageous twists, and a full-blown comic spectacle.
Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan.

A humorous thriller that follows the story of Murugan, a young man with impeccable timing and a sense of humor. As he navigates through a series of hilarious events, he finds himself entangled in a thrilling adventure that tests his wit and courage.

Amal holds on to memories of his father, while Lopa tries to avoid hers as they carry the pain of losing their child years ago. During a journey to bring his mother home, they stop at a place tied to Amal's past, where encounters with strangers lead them to reflect on love, loss, and life in the shadow of death.

In a world where everyday conversations quietly shape societal norms, Lechindi Mahila Lokam unfolds as a sharp, dialogue-driven satire on gender roles and expectations. Through witty exchanges and layered humor, it exposes the contradictions and conditioning embedded in daily life. Beneath its lighthearted tone lies a thought-provoking take on empowerment, identity, and the shifting voice of women in society.

A powerful corporate syndicate traps the Chief Minister of Kerala in a conspiracy, causing his reputation to crumble under the weight of mounting allegations. Determined to uncover the truth, his son John Varghese steps into a dangerous web of deceit and power to clear his fathers name and restore his familys honour.

Giri and Raaji grew up together in a small village; their love and bonding also grew, but changing fortunes and misunderstandings drove them and their families apart. While Raaji moves ahead with her studies, Giri searches for his path through music with his village band. Life takes them in completely different directions until circumstances bring them face to face again. What really unfolds between them forms the rest of the story.

Kanmani, a young police trainee grieving her father's suspicious death, discovers an amnesiac man named Dev who may hold the key to the truth. Desperate to restore his memory, she marries him on an astrologer's advice, triggering a chain of events that uncovers Dev's violent past and his connection to her father's murder.

Youth follows 15-year-old Praveen as he enters adolescence determined to find true love before school ends. Through a series of relationships and heartbreaks, he gradually discovers the real meaning of love, shaping his maturity and outlook on life.
Kaanadha Sudar is a Tamil movie starring Giju Padikkal and Sathya Vijayan in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Janagan A.

Nine-year-old Prakruthi, a physically challenged girl, lives happily with her loving family and her loyal dog, Rocky. When a mysterious ex-convict named Murali enters their lives, Rockys growing suspicion leads to a chain of emotional events and a tragic sacrifice that reveals the true meaning of loyalty and redemption.
Happy Raj is a Tamil movie starring G.V. Prakash Kumar, Abbas, Sri Gouri Priya and George Maryan in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Maria Raja Elanchezian

Set in the heart of Chitradurga, the story weaves together the lives of Ramachari and Chamaiah, rooted in deep family ties and regional legacy. As a murder mystery unfolds, the events surrounding a grand religious procession become a turning point, revealing hidden truths and long-standing conflicts.

The film unleashes a blood-soaked, high-octane horror-action-comedy where a young woman must survive the night at the Virgil, a demonic cults mysterious and twisted death-trap lair, to avoid becoming their next offering, leading to a brazen big-screen battle of epic kills and wickedly dark humor.

In a quiet hill village, young Mallika shares a deep bond with a tree she calls her friend. When her family plans to cut it down for her sisters wedding, she fights tirelessly to save it ultimately inspiring change and being honoured for her courage.
Bhuter Prem is a Bengali movie.

A campus entertainer that follows a group of college students navigating friendship, rivalry, love, and ambition. What begins as carefree fun soon turns into intense competition as campus pride and personal egos come into play.

During the era of the East India Company, a failed witchcraft ritual in Asthinapuram unleashes a dark curse that haunts the village for generations. Years later, a young man must confront this terrifying past to save the woman he loves from its deadly grip.

t: Vaazha 2: Biopic of a Billion Bros
d: Four friends, Hashir, Alan, Ajin and Vinayak are considered losers and troublemakers by parents, family, and the school management. They face immense social pressure as they reach adulthood, which embarks them on an emotional journey of self-discovery and acceptance, where they finally learn to take up their responsibilities and find success and peace, not in a traditional sense but by dealing with life on their own terms.

t: Vaazha 2: Biopic of a Billion Bros
d: Four friends, Hashir, Alan, Ajin and Vinayak are considered losers and troublemakers by parents, family, and the school management. They face immense social pressure as they reach adulthood, which embarks them on an emotional journey of self-discovery and acceptance, where they finally learn to take up their responsibilities and find success and peace, not in a traditional sense but by dealing with life on their own terms.

A young woman addicted to social media reels dies during a dangerous challenge and returns as a vengeful spirit, possessing another girl to continue her obsession. A man must confront fear, love, and supernatural forces to save the woman he loves.

Prem embarks on a journey to find the love he lost in his younger days. As time passes, he realizes that the deep emotional bond he once shared with someone special is missing from his life. Along the way, he faces many challenges and meets people dealing with their own struggles. Through it all, Prem stands strong and waits patiently for his true love. He believes that love, not fate or astrology, will guide and shape his life.

Set in rural Odisha, the story follows Kamini, a young Odissi dancer trapped in an abusive household. As trauma begins to blur her reality, she turns to divine Shakti, leading her down a haunting path of faith, illusion, and rebellion where the line between victim and avenger fades.

It's a survival story of a young girl, Diksha, who was kidnapped by a cab driver during an office cab ride; however, she survived in the jungle, and her defence coach Arshad, found her and finished the kidnapper's whole gang.

After her husband's death, an educated woman is cast out and rebuilds life in a village with her children. Amid struggles, they discover a simple "inner peace" practice that spreads harmony across communities, transforming lives and gradually bringing calm, unity, and peace to the world.
Justice always claims victory over evil-doers.

When 26 children go missing from Kerala, two criminals set out to find one of them. What begins as a small search soon expands into a dangerous pursuit across the country, uncovering shocking secrets and a much larger conspiracy.
Under distress in the civil war of the 1980s, a family's attempt in a Northern Sri Lankan village to marry off their daughter is troubled by the unexpected events in their house on the wedding eve.
A family's pride and conflict collide as one man chases motocross glory, driven by grit, spirit, and the edge of danger.

A contented and peace-loving man's world shifts when an unshakable desire to earn more takes root. Driven by the need to protect his family and secure their future, he embarks on a relentless pursuit of wealth only to discover that the true cost of safety may lie beyond money.

After losing his parents to a ruthless enemy, Kesar is raised by a loving family and grows up determined to protect them. As danger returns, he stands his ground, fighting for love, justice, and redemption.

Aafaa is an emotional journey that explores love, loss, and the quiet battles within. As lives intertwine and choices shape destinies, every decision leaves a lasting impact. More than a story of winning or losing, it reflects on what truly matters when everything begins to slip away.

A man marries the woman he loves, only to discover that she is possessed by a vengeful spirit. As their wedding night turns into a nightmare, love, horror, and chaos collide, unraveling a story of revenge, emotions, and unexpected twists.
Maragathamalai is a Tamil movie starring Santhosh Prathap, Deepshika Umapathy, Thambi Ramaiah and Kalaikko Varman in prominent roles. It is written and directed by S. Lathha.

Bapu and Ramana`s lives spiral when love, betrayal, and a dangerous chain-snatcher Vikki collide. What begins as a fight for love turns into a web of revenge, forcing everyone to face the consequences of their choices.

In a quiet village, a school teacher notices a troubling absence of girls in her classroom and begins to investigate. As she uncovers a dark secret, she faces fear and threats from those determined to hide the truth, risking everything to stand against a cruel practice and fight for justice.

An NRI returns home after ten years, chasing love, but a single mistake awakens an ancient darkness feared by the village for generations. As the threat grows, love turns deadly, and his life hangs in the balance.
The police attempt to arrest a psychic psychopath but another group of people accidentally finds him. But, is he really a psychic or not? Is it a deceiving plot to confuse the police?

A humble devotee of the Goddess Maariyamma is haunted by visions of a past life as a betrayed prince. Guided by divine signs, he discovers a hidden land of ancient treasures and buried truths. When greed threatens the sacred forest guarding this legacy, he must rise as a chosen warrior to reclaim his dynasty's justice and fulfill a destiny spanning lifetimes.

An ordinary man gets caught in a conflict between the underworld and the police. As tensions rise, he must navigate this dangerous situation while protecting himself and those close to him. The story unfolds as a gripping tale of survival, courage, and resilience in the face of escalating threats.

After battling inner demons, Kaalidas, Part 2, turns more complicated as cop Kaalidas faces eerie murders striking across the city. Veiled provocateur Stephen unleashes deadly chaos inside and out, forcing a twisted hunt for crime, punishment, and the hidden truth.
Hunted by mercenaries, Brandon Beckett and his legendary father mount an impossible rescue mission.
An explosion of guns and roses, betrayal and trust, and, above all, love and loss.

A fun-filled comedy-drama about a reckless alcoholic who ignores all responsibilities for a life of thrills, only to find himself in a hilarious mess when he falls in love and must choose between his old habits and a new future.

When two overlooked women hit their breaking point, they take bold, reckless steps to change their lives. With limited power and unexpected allies, they dive into a chaotic plan that quickly turns into a comedy of errors. As trouble grows and the stakes rise, the real question is whether they'll pull off their escape from misfortune or get swallowed by the chaos they've created.

A young doctor's life spirals into a nightmare after a series of strange encounters and unsettling incidents. When his girlfriend's behaviour takes an eccentric and disturbing turn, he is hauled into a desperate struggle to survive the worst crisis of his life.

A man sets out to make a name for himself, but his journey takes a dangerous turn when masked forces begin spreading chaos by exploiting faith and emotions. Backed by powerful figures, they threaten the nations harmony, pushing him into a high-stakes battle to stop them.

Wildlife photographer Vidhu and nature-lover Nisha escape to a southern hill forest for a romantic getaway, but their trip turns terrifying when they encounter a mysterious Wolf Man. Seeking refuge in a remote farmhouse run by an eerily sweet elderly couple, they uncover a chilling secret as no couple who enters ever leaves. Trapped between the beast outside and monsters within, they must escape before it's too late.

When Earth is destroyed, its fragments and encoded legacy scatter across the cosmos. Light-years away, a barren planet named Taxila awakens as these remnants spark new life, transforming humanitys end into a new beginning for the universe.

In a village riven by a deadly feud, the system overlooks the brutal murder of a leader. His son, denied justice, takes revenge with the help of allies, but the aftermath unleashes deeper violence, betrayal, and a relentless cycle where justice begins to blur into destruction.
Kaada, a handsome techie who has a psychopathic disorder becomes the love interest of Pallavi. Later, their fantasies to kill people traps them in a life and death situation.

Munuswamy Naidu, a feared dacoit, rises to power as an MP. Gopal joins Munuswamy Naidu's gang after his release from prison, but he soon turns against him, secretly protecting the innocent while leading a double life. The truth behind Gopal's past and imprisonment finally comes to light as he commits murders and plans another assassination.

Set in Pollachi, the story follows a powerful landlord, Sivalingam Mandradiyar, who becomes obsessed with a rising actor, Kukanth Kumar, believing he is the next M.G.R. He pours his wealth into shaping the actor's career and political future. But as ambition and fame grow, so does the risk of downfall. Will it lead to power or ruin?
A heartfelt story of two brothers, highlighting their profound bond, love, and the sacrifices they make for each other.

The family's journey to Sreekandapuram to settle the late Bharathan Nair's second wife and son takes a dark turn when an issue from his past resurfaces, leading to an unexpected crime. Forced into a desperate cover-up to protect their future, the family must navigate a treacherous path of secrecy and mounting pressure, determined to overcome any obstacle by any means necessary.

A young man stands against overwhelming odds to protect the girl he loves and the honor of his family. His journey is a fierce battle of courage and sacrifice, as he confronts those who threaten to tear his world apart.

Three friends from a small village-Aasha, Sweeti, and Geet move to Chandigarh dreaming of a lavish life. They get caught up in a dangerous blackmail racket targeting the city's wealthy elite, but things spiral when their greed takes over. After a tragic loss, Daman steps in, determined to seek justice. Will he avenge his family, or will the web of Mitha Zehar destroy them all?

Set in the final days before a wedding, the story follows Emma and Charlie as one revelation sends their relationship spiraling into tension, uncertainty, and emotional chaos.

What starts as a seemingly perfect romance quickly unravels in unexpected ways, turning intimate moments into unforgettable drama.

A once-famous mystery novelist loses his memory in a tragic accident that also injures his daughters. A reputed psychiatrist offers to help him recover, but beneath his caring faade lies a dark obsession, as he secretly manipulates his patient. The story follows the novelists struggle to break free from trauma and uncover the truth.

Set against the misty green landscapes of Madikeri and Bhagamandala, Peter is a gripping suspense drama that delves into secrets, crimes, and human emotions that refuse to stay buried. It's an edge-of-your-seat suspense drama that unravels mystery, emotions, and shocking truths in the heart of Coorg's haunting beauty. Peter takes you on an unforgettable, suspenseful journey where love, crime, and betrayal collide.

A couple's pursuit of a dream life leads them to a mysterious location harboring dark secrets. Their journey unfolds through themes of love and betrayal within a paranormal framework that keeps the audience guessing until the end.

A young woman chasing lost dreams ends up in a Tuscan villa by chance, where a small lie about being her host's fiancee spins into unexpected romance, misunderstandings, and life-changing connections. Can love bloom amid the chaos of her own deception?

t: BTS World Tour 'Arirang' in Goyang: Re-Broadcasting
d: Pop royalty BTS returns to the global stage with their highly anticipated world tour, marking their first large-scale tour in approximately four years. Spanning 34 cities across the world with a total of 82 shows, the tour opens with landmark concerts in Goyang, South Korea, and Tokyo, Japan, marking a new record for the most tour dates by a K-pop artist.

t: BTS World Tour 'Arirang' in Goyang: Live Viewing
d: Pop royalty BTS returns to the global stage with their highly anticipated world tour, marking their first large-scale tour in approximately four years. Spanning 34 cities across the world with a total of 82 shows, the tour opens with landmark concerts in Goyang, South Korea, and Tokyo, Japan, marking a new record for the most tour dates by a K-pop artist.

In every family, there is a guiding force, the Murabi. This Odia feature film explores the collision and convergence of two contrasting philosophies: one rooted in discipline and control, the other in joy and freedom. As life brings these worlds together, the story unfolds into a heartwarming journey that challenges, inspires, and ultimately redefines the true meaning of family, love, and togetherness.
Pallichattambi is a Malayalam movie starring Tovino Thomas in a prominent role. It is directed by Dijo Jose Antony.

Sethu, a timid health center worker caring for his troubled brother, finds his quiet life disrupted when a stranger enters his home. What follows pulls him into a web of secrets, suspicion, and escalating tension.

Arjun Acharya, a financially troubled man in his late 30s, unexpectedly inherits his grandfather's massive ancestral palace, Acharya Niwas, in a remote North Indian town called Mangalpur. Seeing an opportunity to fix his life, Arjun plans to host his sister Meera's long-delayed wedding at the palace. However, the town is gripped by a terrifying curse. Dismissing it as superstition, Arjun pushes forward with wedding preparations, only to encounter increasingly sinister supernatural events within the palace. As the truth behind Acharya Niwas begins to unfold, Arjun must confront an evil far more powerful than he imagined to protect his family and survive the wedding that could seal their fate.
When a young woman`s quest to discover her roots intersects with a grieving father`s journey to faith, they find redemption and purpose in the ancient city of Bhubaneswar, India.
A temporary small-town sheriff who uncovers dark mysteries after a local bank robbery.

In a remote village in 1996, where a single television brings the community together, its sudden disappearance sparks chaos and suspicion. As the search begins, one man gets entangled in the mystery, leading to unexpected consequences.

Denied a job, Sujata opens her own dhaba, inspired by the PMs call for self-reliance. After marrying Karan, who saved her from local goons, she benefits from government schemes during elections and openly supports the ruling party. This makes her a target for the opposition, forcing her to fight for her beliefs and survival.

Phula, born to a Murli, is forced into religious servitude despite her dreams of education. Though she becomes a celebrated folk artist, her life is marred by betrayal, abuse, and the loss of her child. Her tragic end during a performance highlights the grim reality of cultural exploitation and gender-based injustice.
Shiv Nandini is a Bhojpuri starring Koonal Aditya and Kajol Srivastava in prominent roles. It is directed by  Shiv Kumar Tiwari.

In a quiet village, Prathap's dream marriage takes an unexpected turn, leading to a public fallout that drives his wife away. He embarks on an emotional journey to win her back, as love and hidden truths test their relationship.

A documentary exploring the traditional Poi Kal Kuthirai folk dance, highlighting its cultural significance in rural Tamil Nadu while reflecting on the lives of farmers and the challenges of preserving heritage.

A happy couple dreams of having a daughter, but the sudden loss of the wife shatters their lives. The father, left alone, spends years searching for his child after their separation. When he finally finds his daughter, their reunion sets them on an emotional journey of rebuilding a lost bond and facing life's hardships together.

After a devastating cyclone displaces a fishing community, they seek refuge only to fall under the control of ruthless drug dealers. Amid the turmoil, a carefree young fisherman is forced to grow up after a personal tragedy, torn between love and his duty to protect his people, as he rises to stand against oppression.

A carefree young man in Vizag tries to avoid leaving the country by deliberately getting into trouble, only to find himself in a dangerous situation involving a DCP's daughter. As he uncovers a deeper conspiracy tied to his sister's safety, he learns about two former friends-turned-rivals who have harmed his family and the village's farmers. Now, he must confront them to protect his sister and deliver justice.
In the dense forests of the Eastern Himalayas, moths are whispering something to us. In the dark of night, two curious observers shine a light on this secret universe.

In a traditional village divided by caste yet bound by coexistence, education remains rare, especially for girls. Amid this, Lavanya and Parthu from different families fall deeply in love. Torn between duty and desire, one sacrifices for family, the other for love, shaping a poignant story of loyalty, longing, and heartfelt devotion.

When a lost nuclear device resurfaces in the enemy's hands, India orders the execution of its own captured spy. A rogue agent defies orders, uncovering a conspiracy that may ignite World War III. Inspired by real espionage, honey trapping and nuclear threats, Mr. X is a relentless race against time that never stops from the word go.

A teenage boy working as a room boy in a hill station hotel lives under the control of a cruel manager. When the manager is brutally murdered and a missing person case resurfaces, the investigation begins to uncover the boy's hidden connection to both incidents, revealing a deeper mystery.

A food delivery agent, who aspires to be a film artist, becomes embroiled in a murder case with hidden motives. As the police investigate a series of crimes linked to a gang, he must fight to prove his innocence in a tense thriller filled with unexpected twists.
A haunting tale of innocence caught between illusion and fear, as reality blurs and a vulnerable soul struggles to find truth amidst growing uncertainty.
A middle-class boy facing the hardships of life discovers the truth and ways to get successful and rich in the modern-day lifestyle.

The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert. Eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them - but what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

t: BTS World Tour 'Arirang' in Japan: Re-Broadcasting
d: Pop royalty BTS returns to the global stage with their highly anticipated world tour, marking their first large-scale tour in approximately four years. Spanning 34 cities across the world with a total of 82 shows, the tour opens with landmark concerts in Goyang, South Korea, and Tokyo, Japan, marking a new record for the most tour dates by a K-pop artist.

t: BTS World Tour 'Arirang' in Japan: Live Viewing
d: Pop royalty BTS returns to the global stage with their highly anticipated world tour, marking their first large-scale tour in approximately four years. Spanning 34 cities across the world with a total of 82 shows, the tour opens with landmark concerts in Goyang, South Korea, and Tokyo, Japan, marking a new record for the most tour dates by a K-pop artist.

A father`s blind love spoils Srinivas, who comes to assume forgiveness and repeatedly makes mistakes until he lands in jail. His parents die of grief. Upon returning home, he learns the truth, reforms himself, serves the village with the sarpanch, marries, and lives on in repentance.

When Amrutharaj, a groom from an all-male household repeatedly rejected by brides' families, falls in love with Sneha Marcose, their journey toward marriage ignites a chain of hilarious chaos inside his unruly home.

On a silent Christmas Eve, Shekhar is forced to face the unthinkable: deciding whether to end his mother's life. In the stillness of that dark night, as machines beep and hope fades, he is torn apart by love, guilt, and duty. The choice he makes shatters his family and leaves him forever changed, carrying the weight of a decision no one should ever have to make -breaking the fragile ties within.
An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the center of London. Chaos erupts as the military and police initiate a mass evacuation within a limited timeframe.

Based on a true story, the film follows an investigation into the disappearance of a boy from an orphanage run by priests. After children report the case via email, a special team is formed to uncover the truth, leading to a deeper probe into hidden secrets.

On an ordinary day, a shocking murder takes place inside a quiet house where three strangers find themselves trappeda petty thief, a desperate father, and a delivery executive. As suspicion and secrets surface, they discover a hidden stash of illegal money, turning fear into greed and pushing them into a dangerous battle for survival.
A gossip-loving woman ignites chaos by exposing secrets in her village, but when she is silenced, the real storm begins, revealing that truth, not gossip, was holding the community together.

Born mute until the age of ten, a boy defies all odds to become a celebrated rap singer. But as love, fame, and social conflict collide, his world spirals into turmoil, driving him to the brink. In his darkest moment, he discovers the true soul and purpose of his art.
An Indian family deeply devoted to a divine mother goddess lives by their faith, believing her blessings guide and protect them through every challenge.

The story follows Arya, whose life takes an unexpected turn as separate journeys begin to collide, triggering a chain of chaos and consequences. As relationships are tested and hidden truths emerge, he finds himself caught between survival, power, and emotions, where every decision carries a cost in an unpredictable game of fate.

Set in the 16th century during the reign of King Krishnadevaraya, the story captures a gathering of great saints and poets whose devotional compositions not only glorify the divine but also inspire meaningful social reforms.

A man travelling through a remote village misses his only bus and is forced to stay overnight. As he waits for the next day's journey, he discovers that time itself seems to have stopped in the village, where clocks don't work and nothing follows a normal rhythm. What begins as a simple delay turns into a strange and intriguing experience that challenges his sense of reality.
A family embarks on an emotional journey, stretching every limit to fund their son's dream of becoming a pilot.

Bir Aaij Kar Birsaa follows Bir, a police officer who strays into corruption but returns to his values after his fathers rejection. Inspired by Birsa Munda, he rises against injustice, confronts a powerful contractor, and leads an Ulgulan to fight oppression.

A college student in love is asked to read a book before confessing his feelings. As the book unfolds through different storytelling styles, it shapes his understanding of love, leading him back to her with a new perspective.

A fantasy tale about a father and son who swap lives through time travel, stepping into each others worlds and experiences. As they relive past choices and glimpse different perspectives, they confront mistakes, relationships, and the desire to change their present.

In the village of Palakadali, the Sarpanch, VRO, and medical officer meet brutal and mysterious ends, each death shrouded in secrecy. Police investigations reveal thirty fingerprints on the initial victims, yet only a single, perplexing print is found on the last. As authorities delve deeper, they uncover a chilling web of retribution, hinting at a community driven by a quest for justice for past wrongs. The solitary fingerprint becomes the crucial key, pointing to a calculated act of vengeance from within the village. The narrative culminates as Palakadali's dark history collides with the present, forcing the community to confront its secrets and seek a difficult closure.
Get ready for a powerful story filled with drama, emotion, action and desi entertainment.

Balu leads a peaceful, happy life with his wife and young daughter until an unexpected tragedy leaves his child hospitalized and in need of a crucial 50-lakh surgery. Left with no other options, this desperate father is forced to plunge into the dangerous and ruthless world of the mafia to secure the funds. Drawing inspiration from the mythological Sugreeva, Balu must rely on his raw strength, sharp intellect, and survival instincts to outsmart the underworld, protect his family, and fight his way back to their ordinary life.

t: Kangula: Maa Kali Ra Danda Nacha
d: Set in the real village of Kangula, Odisha, the story follows a carefree boy from a Danda Naacha troupe whose life changes during the sacred festival of Kangula Maa. As devotion, rivalry, and destiny collide, faith paves the way for a powerful divine turn.

Divorcing couple Rishab and Lakshmi meet counselor Dr. Gangadevi, who recounts a story about Shantanu and heiress Janvi. As they listen, the couple discovers an estranged connection and begins to understand the relationship between them.

A fruit vendor, denied a gun licence due to his low status, stages a fake attack with his friends to get around the system. But as the investigation deepens, it reveals a darker, deeply personal motive tied to his past.

After losing his parents at a young age, Mallu grows up as a daily wage worker under the care of a kind-hearted mentor who instills admiration and values in him. Living a simple life, he works tirelessly and saves money, finding purpose in his struggles. When an unexpected opportunity earns him a large sum, Mallu uses it to build a childrens school named Puneeth Nivasa, turning his hardships into a meaningful mission that impacts others.

A wealthy entrepreneurs life shatters after a tragic accident leaves him presumed dead. When he returns, he uncovers a shocking betrayal by those closest to him, forcing him to confront deceit, loss, and the destructive impact of addiction.

A feared rowdy-turned-politician, Gedela Raju, is murdered on the night of his political rise in Kakinada. As the investigation unfolds, seven interconnected lives-driven by secrets, ambition, and betrayal-lead back to one shocking truth behind his death.

Michael is an upcoming American biographical musical drama film directed by Antoine Fuqua and written by John Logan, based on the life of the American singer, songwriter, and dancer Michael Jackson. Jackson is played by his nephew, Jaafar Jackson, in his film debut.

Dabish follows DSP Rudra, a fearless officer posted to a politically charged district, who takes on a brutal rape and murder case on his first day. As he digs deeper, he uncovers a web of corruption and powerful forces, risking everything in his relentless pursuit of truth and justice.

Inspired by a shocking series of real-life mass murders in Kerala, the film follows a protagonist who commits six brutal killings in broad daylight. As the story unfolds, it probes the psyche behind the violence and the unsettling questions it leaves behind.

Rooted in Gujarati folklore, Behrupiyo follows an ancient curse born from a fateful ritual inside a royal household that doomed an entire village. Years later, when three friends arrive at a heritage property tied to that dark past, they awaken a lingering evil marked by whispers, warnings, and a growing sense of dread, proving that some curses never fade; they only wait.

A gruff professional wrestler's solitary life takes an unexpected turn when he crosses paths with an effervescent young woman whose zest for life challenges everything he thought he knew about himself.

A commando returns home as a Republic Day chief guest and forms a quiet bond with a Ph.D. student during his journey. As duty calls him away, he leaves behind an unsent letter, raising questions of love, fate, and whether their unfinished story finds closure.

Dev, Das, and Leela are three strangers burdened by personal struggles who are brought together by fate and a mysterious task: help one another. As they step into each others lives, they discover strength, healing, and purpose, proving that sometimes, human connection is the greatest miracle of all
The story follows a young man who rises against social evils and injustice in his community. Through courage and determination, he takes on powerful forces to bring change and inspire hope.

Kara is set in Ramanathapuram in 1991, against the backdrop of the intense war between Iraq and the United States. Over the course of 16 days, Karasaami is forced to confront parts of his past he had chosen to leave behind. As he strives to protect and support those who depend on him, he faces unexpected consequences and life-altering turns.
An extremely inhuman, cruel, rude, and dishonest man named Ashok Patel embarks on a quest for forgiveness to reconcile with his past.

After losing his mother at a young age, Keshto is left alone in the village with nothing but her values of kindness and selflessness. His life changes when the woman his mother once worked for decides to raise him as her own, giving him a new home, guidance, and a chance at a better future.

Jaan Abhi Baaki Hai is a heartfelt romantic drama set in small-town India. When a free-spirited tourist unexpectedly enters his world, a young man finds himself falling deeply in love. What begins as a fleeting encounter soon becomes a transformative journey - one that pushes him to grow, find purpose, and discover that life still holds much more in store.

Prem is an Ayurvedic practitioner whose life takes an emotional turn when he meets Pooja. As love blossoms between them, they must navigate the challenges posed by her illness, shaping a heartfelt story of romance, care, and resilience.

SwingFisher 6EB1CH follows a passenger flight carrying fugitive billionaire Prajapathi that spirals into chaos when mercenaries and covert agents collide mid-air. Amidst the unravelling mission, special agent Shivani Roy fights for control while a mysterious protagonist wakes up in the aircraft's bathroom with no memory and a deadly secret hidden inside him.

Dinesh Kumar Srivastav, aka Dino, a sincere, socially awkward, trivia-loving nerd, is secretly in love with his co-worker, the beautiful Meera Ranganathan. Way out of his league! So, when the entire office travels to Japan for the annual company offsite, a heartbroken Dino makes a wish at the famous Fortune Bell that Meera be with him for just one day, not realizing that this one wish will throw his and Meera's lives into total chaos!

In a city, a father and daughter share a strong bond. Suddenly, some people interfere in their relationship, leading to an unexpected separation. The father goes missing, and in his absence, the daughter realizes her mistake and the depth of his love.

t: Lakho Mein Ek Pawle Bani Hum Bahurani
d: Lakho Mein Ek Pawle Bani Hum Bahurani is a Bhojpuri movie starring Jay Yadav and Amrapali Dubey in prominent roles. It is directed by Ajay Jha.

Four college friends rescue a woman from a river, but a horrific act by some of them sets off a chain of guilt and fear. When the woman is later found dead, the incident begins to haunt them, leading to a series of mysterious deaths as the truth slowly unfolds.

Ram, a simple village boy, moves to Guwahati for work and forms a deep bond with children at an orphanage. When they are abducted by a terrorist gang during a picnic, he risks everything to rescue them.

Dinesh Kumar Srivastav, aka Dino, a sincere, socially awkward, trivia-loving nerd, is secretly in love with his co-worker, the beautiful Meera Ranganathan. Way out of his league! So, when the entire office travels to Japan for the annual company offsite, a heartbroken Dino makes a wish at the famous Fortune Bell that Meera be with him for just one day, not realizing that this one wish will throw his and Meera's lives into total chaos!
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India's greatest warrior king, Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya.

Pitt Siyapa is a quirky comedy about Nimmi, a sharp young girl who turns her father's death into a bizarre business hosting virtual funerals for NRIs. With a team of misfits, she delivers chaotic, emotional send-offs. When an NRI, Mickey, enters her life, things spiral into hilarious mayhem, jugaad, and unexpected romance.
A magical, musical, maddening ride where the music will unleash a thrilling adventure of a lifetime!

In their pursuit of status and success, renowned surgeon Dr. Dipankar Sanyal and his wife Shalini drift away from their daughter, Disha. Lost in loneliness, Disha turns to the digital world, leading to a crisis that shatters their privileged life. Stripped of prestige, they must confront their past and seek redemption.

Dinesh Kumar Srivastav, aka Dino, a sincere, socially awkward, trivia-loving nerd, is secretly in love with his co-worker, the beautiful Meera Ranganathan. Way out of his league! So, when the entire office travels to Japan for the annual company offsite, a heartbroken Dino makes a wish at the famous Fortune Bell that Meera be with him for just one day, not realizing that this one wish will throw his and Meera's lives into total chaos!

Darahas travels to America in pursuit of love, only to return deported and broken. Back home, he is drawn into a dangerous cat-and-mouse chase between the police and Satya Logistics. Forced to fight for survival, the wounded lion must rise and reclaim his strength.

Witness the ultimate Revenge Week showdown as LSG takes on defending champions RCB at the Ekana Stadium. With star players like Virat Kohli and Rishabh Pant leading their sides, expect a high-intensity clash where every run counts. Experience the electrifying atmosphere and live match action on the big screen at PVR INOX!

A newly married couple navigate the playful push and pull of married life, as the spirited wife takes charge, turning everyday conflicts into a series of fun and heartfelt moments. A light-hearted entertainer about love, laughter, and the beautiful chaos of togetherness.

Based on a true incident, Aampung follows a determined youngster's journey of honouring her mother while staying true to her passion in pursuit of a better life. Through hardships, sacrifice, and perseverance, she learns that success comes not from abandoning one's roots but from embracing them.
The story follows a young couple whose love blossoms amid family tensions and emotional challenges, testing their bond as they navigate relationships and life's obstacles.
Gagan, Kiran, and Shukrata work together in a small export company. Kiran suggests a betting game to Gagan, who starts playing in hopes of clearing his commitments, but things do not go as planned.

When a little girl is hunted to be killed by a powerful politician and his ruthless criminal network, an unassuming dog groomer becomes her guardian angel as her fate dangles between survival and certain death.

Dev agrees to marry Tithi after a painful breakup with Mayra, but their carefully planned destination wedding in Kutch takes an unexpected turn when Mayra returns as the wedding planner. As festivities unfold and hidden tensions rise, Dev is forced to confront unresolved feelings and choose between his past and his future.
Inspired by true incidents, a motorbike in the village makes everyone`s dreams come true when you pray and offer some alcohol to it. Is it the bike, a rumour or what?

Angam Attahaasam is a raw gangster drama set in Trivandrum, following 24-year-old Ajay Chandran as he battles his past and the city`s underworld. Caught between loyalty, survival and redemption, Ajay navigates a world of shifting alliances and brutal enemies. In a place where lines blur and trust is a gamble, his fight is not just for power but for his soul.

Every 17th night, a student mysteriously disappears from a haunted hostel, until three village boys uncover a chilling pattern. As supernatural encounters intensify, a hidden web of deceit, immoral acts, and fake occult practices begins to unravel.
Bhulakkad is a Bhojpuri language movie directed by Praveen Kumar Guduri. The movie features Arvind Akela Kallu and Chandani Singh in the lead roles.

Two strangers, a tennis player and a software engineer, find their lives intertwined after a late-night journey turns dangerous. Trapped by ruthless goons, they must rely on courage and each other to survive.

A young and ambitious police officer takes up his first posting in a hill station, only to find himself drawn into a web of crimes. As the mystery deepens, his determination is put to the test in uncovering the truth behind the incidents.

Hyderabad is gripped by fear as a serial killer reenacts famous paintings through gruesome murders. ACP Krishna and investigative journalist Radha delve into the chilling mystery, tracing clues that point toward a former student and a school principal. With the clock ticking, they must unravel the killer's twisted motive before another masterpiece turns deadly.

A group of children passionate about superheroes set out to make their own superhero film. As they navigate challenges along the way, their journey becomes a story of friendship, creativity, and the lessons they learn.

In a misty North-East town haunted by superstition, a series of gruesome killings tied to a forgotten goddess spreads terror. Officer Tribhuvan uncovers a cult driven by desperation and twisted faith, blurring the line between myth and reality. When his daughter goes missing, he faces an unimaginable truth that could unleash chaos beyond control.
Phool Khilal Anganva Mein is a Bhojpuri language movie directed by Rampal Singh. The movie features Manisha Yadav and Manoj Tiger in pivotal roles.

A quirky 29-year-old named Sathya embarks on an unexpected journey of laughter, unlikely friendships, and self-discovery. Through hilarious misadventures and chance encounters, he slowly sees life's bigger picture - its surprises, joys, and second chances. Part rom-com, part drama, wholly feel-good, this story celebrates the beautiful mess of being human and finding happiness where you least expect it.

Five youngsters become addicted to a mysterious fantasy game that grants every wish instantly. As reality begins to blur, one girl suddenly disappears and is presumed dead. Realizing the game holds the truth, the others re-enter it to uncover its hidden rules. They discover every wish comes at a cost and must make a painful sacrifice to bring her back, forever changed by the consequences of their desires.

A wealthy businessman is mysteriously murdered in his own office, leaving the police without clues and the case shrouded in confusion. As the investigation unfolds, a deeper conspiracy comes to light, leading to the truth being revealed and justice finally served.

A frustrated actor in Mumbai connects with a retired banker in Frankfurt through an online audition and ends up teaching him acting via video calls. Their sessions unfold across two cities, pushing both to confront emotions and truths they have spent years avoiding.

This time, the fan favorite champions - now joined by Johnny Cage himself - are pitted against one another in the ultimate no-holds-barred, gory battle to defeat Shao Kahn's dark rule, which threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

A tense thriller centered on the mysterious murder of a powerful figure, where an investigation peels back layers of deception, hidden motives, and unexpected alliances. Blending suspense with drama, light romance, and touches of comedy, the story keeps the truth just out of reach until the final twist.
Gulkandi, with only three months to live, makes an unusual decision to fulfil a long-held romantic dream. Will her decision bring her happiness or leave her more broken as her final months slip away?

An abandoned child grows up with a dream of becoming an IAS officer to end the cruelty faced by orphans. As he struggles through hardship and injustice, he becomes entangled in a dangerous situation involving a crime, forcing him to fight to protect the innocent while staying true to his goal.

The story unfolds through two parallel love stories across different timelines. Years after a professor is separated from the woman he loves due to societal pressure, a similar romance between two students rekindles his past, bringing back memories of love, loss, and unresolved emotions.

Three oddball individuals come together under bizarre yet comical circumstances to pursue a common goal of making it big in the movie business. The amateur crew, comprising Director Giri, Villain Giri, and Heroine Giri(ja), embarks on a madcap journey that entails scamming top politicians and cops, turning kidnappers, and hatching the most outrageous escapades to get their film made. With their trusted allies, 5D Thomas, Super Super, and Mobile Raghu, by their side, will their dream become a reality? Will the underdog overcome the odds?

Jawaak follows four children, Sonu, Pehu, Papu, and Motu, burdened by poverty, bias, and emotional neglect at a tender age. Clinging to hope inspired by a famous advertiser, they set out on a journey to Chandigarh, believing it will change their lives.
The discovery of Dr. Sara's concrete-encased remains in a river barrel sets off a tense investigation into her murder and the hidden truths surrounding it.
In the picturesque Godavari villages, a kind-hearted auto driver and a spirited college girl fall in love, but their bond is tested by her father's expectations and unforeseen challenges.

t: Power to the People: John Yoko Live in NYC
d: John and Yoko's two historic 1972 concerts at Madison Square Garden, New York, captured John Lennon's only full-length performances after leaving the Beatles. The original stage footage has now been remixed, restored, and re-edited under Sean Lennon's supervision.

Witness the ultimate blockbuster rivalry as RCB takes on MI in a high-voltage showdown on 10th May. With superstars like Virat Kohli leading Bengalurus charge against Mumbais powerhouse lineup, expect an intense battle packed with big hits, fierce rivalries, and edge-of-the-seat moments where every run could define the game. Experience the electrifying atmosphere and live match action on the big screen at PVR INOX!

A single mother dedicates her life to raising her son, becoming his entire world. But as he grows and chases his dreams, love turns into distance, and care feels like control. Time creates a silent conflict between them until they must confront their emotions and rediscover the bond they once shared.

t: La Liga El Clasico - Barcelona vs Real Madrid
d: Experience the world's biggest football rivalry like never before, as Real Madrid and FC Barcelona face off in a high-stakes battle that could decide the La Liga title. Swap the small screen for the grand cinematic stage, where every strike and save is amplified by stadium-quality sound and a massive fan atmosphere. Join the local roar of the crowd this May 11th for an immersive 90 minutes of passion, drama, and pure footballing magic.

Witness a high-stakes battle as RCB takes on KKR on 13th May in a clash that could redefine the race to the Top 4.
