Experience the electrifying atmosphere and live match action on the big screen at PVR INOX!
An energetic student, Samkutty, revives a banned college festival, igniting a fierce rivalry that transforms celebration into chaos.
In a world where justice falters, a powerful guardian awakens. A superhuman rises in a rotten world to set things right in this high-octane fantasy entertainer.

When highly classified documents tied to national security are stolen, a dangerous espionage game unfolds filled with secrets, betrayal, and hidden agendas. As intelligence agencies race against time, one man finds himself trapped in a deadly mission where every decision could alter the fate of the nation.
Musalodiki Dasara Pandaga is a Telugu film directed by  D. Manohar. The movie features Anjali, Nasser, Anita Hassanandani and others in the lead roles.

In Ahmedabad, an ordinary family's life is shattered when a man posing as a law officer traps the father in a terrifying digital arrest, forcing him into a web of fear and financial extortion. As the situation spirals, his son races against time through a dangerous world of cybercrime to uncover the truth and save his family.
Teri Maya is a Uttarakhandi movie directed by Sanjay Singh Negi. The movie features Rajesh Joshi in the lead role.

Three close friends working as telecallers set out on a long trip to escape their stressful routine. A fun journey soon turns complicated as they become entangled in a mysterious situation, leading to the revelation of shocking truths.

With unprecedented access to the official archives and intimate recollections from the band, both current and past, Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition invites fans to experience one of the most iconic journeys in music history. Spanning five decades, this electrifying documentary charts the band's rise from the pubs of East London to the world's biggest stadiums. Featuring exclusive interviews with band members and contributors such as Javier Bardem, Lars Ulrich and Chuck D, as well as all-new animated sequences of the band's legendary mascot, Eddie, the film offers a rare and intimate look at Iron Maiden's uncompromising vision and unwavering connection with their truly global army of fans.

In the age of Kaliyuga, an orphan crosses paths with a ruthless man feared for his terrifying, unconventional methods of destruction. As their confrontation escalates, the orphan awakens invisible, mysterious powers that begin to guide his fight. But the battle runs deeper than the present. It stirs the ancient legend of Shikhandi, unleashing a reborn vengeance that binds past and present into one.

Set against the backdrop of a widely discussed government scheme, the story follows underprivileged homemakers whose lives begin to change through financial support. As they come together, they navigate challenges, build unity, and strive for a better future, highlighting the impact of empowerment and collective progress within their community.

At an elite engineering campus, students must survive a sudden zombie outbreak while navigating academic pressures and social hierarchies, blending horror with comedy and biting satire of privilege and competition.

Apu, a young boy eager to spend his summer in his grandfathers village, finally gets his wish when his grandfather comes to take him there. Surrounded by nature, cousins, and simple joys, Apu experiences the freedom of childhood, while his grandfather reminds his parents not to sacrifice his present for the pressures of the future.

Set against the devastating backdrop of the 1947 Indo-Pak partition, Shah Shani follows childhood friends Shah and Geetu whose deep bond is torn apart by the violence of separation. A powerful Dogri-language drama exploring love, loss and the enduring humanity that survives even the darkest chapters of history.

A wide-eyed dreamer leaves his village for the chaos of the city, chasing a place on the silver screen. Along the way, he finds an unlikely companion, another struggler chasing the same dream. Their journey leads them to a mysterious final audition that could change everything.

A well-educated man falls for his secretary, but a Brahmin priest's reading of his horoscope warns that his future wife will not survive the marriage. Pressured by fate and family, he marries a village girl instead. Once settled into his new life and fatherhood, he abandons his former love entirely, leaving behind a trail of broken hearts and unanswered questions.

A software engineer learns he is the reincarnation of Lord Shiva, destined to bring about the end of the world in just 13 days. As he struggles with this revelation, he must decide whether to accept his fate or fight to change it.

A righteous officer takes on a ruthless antagonist as a group of unsuspecting thieves get entangled in a murder case. What unfolds is a gripping tale of corruption, revenge, and the fight for justice.

A thrilling new chapter in the Guptodhon trilogy as Sona Da returns for his deadliest treasure hunt yet, where danger lurks at every turn. Packed with mystery, action, and adventure, Saptadingar Guptadhon takes the legacy of the beloved franchise.

After the 2006 Mumbai blasts, 200 kg of missing RDX remains unaccounted for, posing a looming threat. An ATS officer goes undercover in Koliwada, teaming up with local youths to track it down. As time runs out, they race against unseen forces to prevent another catastrophe.

When a desperate plea to an MLA for his ailing mother's treatment ends in humiliation and violence, a young man from a middle-class village family makes a fierce vow to rise, earn, and claim that very power for himself. Whether he succeeds in becoming an MLA forms the heart of this story.

A respected village headmasters peaceful life is shattered after the sudden loss of his wife, leaving him isolated and struggling with grief. As his health declines and loneliness deepens, he seeks control over his final days, but a profound spiritual experience during a traditional ritual leads him toward an unexpected sense of peace and acceptance.

A wealthy and lonely man falls in love with a brilliant poor girl, but her heart belongs to a gentle boy from a broken family whose silent suffering leads him toward a fatal illness, while another girl waits patiently in the shadows for the love that may never return.

Maa Karma Devi, a 17th-century devotee of Lord Krishna born into a Rajasthan Jat family, becomes the spiritual cornerstone of the Teli (Sahu) community. Her life is a timeless testament to unwavering, innocent faith that transcends generations.
Pashupati tries hard to make his father's dream of making education available to all a reality. However, standing in his way is Sambha, who has a vendetta against Pashupati.

When a carefree orphan and a runaway minister's daughter marry on impulse, their love is soon tested by financial struggles and powerful enemies, from corrupt politicians to jealous rivals. As they navigate these challenges together, they uncover hidden truths and discover that love can endure even in the face of the darkest threats.

t: Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)
d: An accompanying 3D concert film, documenting the Manchester shows and co-directed by Billie Eilish and James Cameron.
Unaware of the property's alleged witch haunting, a horror writer travels to an Irish inn to scatter his parents' ashes.

A carefree young man living in a small village spends his days avoiding responsibility until a sudden incident changes his life completely. Forced to confront harsh realities, he begins a journey of transformation where faith, resilience, and inner strength guide him through life's unexpected challenges.

A psychological romance that explores the fragile line between love, memory, and reality, following a woman whose emotional world transcends the physical. As she navigates longing, loss, and unseen connections, her journey blurs the boundaries between presence and illusion.

A fearless cop finds himself entangled in a world of danger and terror, while a terrified woman desperately searches for answers. Packed with action, suspense and spine-chilling thrills, Cheekh is a high-octane Bhojpuri thriller that promises to keep audiences on the edge of their seats.
A seemingly perfect marriage in Prayagraj takes an unexpected turn when one decision leads to a chain of misunderstandings, suspicion, and comedic chaos.

A high-energy action drama centered on strength, loyalty, and confrontation. The story unfolds through intense moments and gripping action as the protagonist faces powerful forces and personal challenges.

A heartwarming family film for all ages that celebrates the irreplaceable presence of a Bhauji in an Indian household. More than just a sister-in-law, she is the family's quiet strength, the one who guides with wisdom, laughs with abandon, and loves without condition. Through tender moments and gentle humour, the story weaves together the bonds of respect, affection, and belonging that make a family whole.
Some predators cannot be outrun. A gripping, edge-of-your-seat experience filled with heart-stopping twists and jaw-dropping moments.

When the pandemic cripples Mehermunda's centuries-old saree weaving tradition, most villagers abandon their looms and leave. Refusing to let his heritage die, Kamla ropes in his childhood friend Arjun to unlock the digital world. As they take the craft online, a struggling village finds new life, and Kamla moves closer to turning a fading legacy into national recognition.

A grief-stricken police officer is transferred to a remote village after the tragic death of his wife. What begins as a routine posting soon turns into a chilling investigation when a series of murders targeting women shakes the village, leading him toward a dangerous confrontation with a respected elder hiding dark secrets.

Set in a gritty marketplace, Sherr follows orphans raised by a kind-hearted guardian amid rising gang conflict. When a suspicious death reveals an organ trafficking racket, Shivu and Bhuvana uncover a dangerous conspiracy, battling crime, corruption, and betrayal in a high-stakes fight for justice and truth.

A hilarious and heartwarming journey of Naveena, a rustic village boy, and his crazy friends as he goes all out to win the love of Asha. Packed with romance, chaos, and nonstop fun - will love finally find its way?
Set in a village during the 1990s, the story follows Hari and Vani as they navigate a deeply emotional love story shaped by nostalgia, relationships, and the challenges that test their bond.

Born into humble beginnings and bound by social restrictions, a young woman defies every norm standing in her way to enter the wrestling arena, fighting not just opponents but a world that never believed she belonged there, all in pursuit of identity and self-respect.

Separated by distance, a father helplessly watches his sons growing aggression fracture the family until a brutal assault and ensuing police investigation uncover secrets that challenge their understanding of love, guilt, and protection.

The story follows a farmer who decides to question and test his faith, setting off a journey filled with emotional and life-altering moments. At its core, the narrative centers on a woman who struggles tirelessly for her family, facing hardships with resilience - until her path leads her to confront the very nature of divine power itself.
Georgekutty must outsmart the law one last time when his past returns, threatening everything he did to protect his family.
Shiv is a Gujarati movie featuring  Umesh Barot and Riya Jaiswal in prominent roles.

For the first time on Earth, two aliens arrive on a mysterious mission to spread their race, only to encounter supernatural forces and long-buried secrets. Their journey becomes strangely connected to two ambitious engineering students and a group of astronauts, uncovering a mystery that could change the fate of worlds.
Directed by SK Sunil Kumar, Makalasainya is Kannada movie featuring Gagana V and Mahalaxmi K in prominent roles.

During the Covid pandemic, Kanika, the owner of a chit finance company, survives a tragic accident with the help of Premchand, a kind-hearted young man who cares for her deeply. But when her uncle grows suspicious of their bond and plots against her, Prem risks everything to protect her, leading to an emotional tale of love and sacrifice.

When Inspector Debu and his wife adopt an abandoned boy named Babu, they raise him with equal love alongside their daughter. But the truth of his adoption slowly unravels his sense of belonging, pushing him into a painful search for identity. As society's prejudices close in, Babu drifts further from the family that loves him until his tragic disappearance leaves them shattered and confronting a painful truth that a person's identity is defined by their deeds, not their birth.

Set against the vibrant underarm cricket culture of Tulunadu, the film follows a passionate young cricketer torn between his love for the game and his romantic life. Blending humour, romance, and emotion, the story celebrates friendship, local sports culture, and the nostalgia of underarm cricket in Dakshina Kannada, Udupi, and Kasaragod.

t: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
d: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, it has enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.

Chandu and Anu share a deep love, but when a sudden lockdown traps Chandu with Anu's joint family, she shelters him with quiet courage. As the family gradually accepts their bond, tragedy strikes when Chandu succumbs to COVID-19, leaving behind a gentle reminder to cherish love while it lasts and live without causing pain to others.

After his sister is brutally killed over dowry demands, a young man is driven by grief and rage to seek revenge. As he wages a violent crusade against men who exploit and harass women, his fight turns into a relentless pursuit of justice.

Aarav and Chandni's passionate college romance is struck by adulthood far too soon, forcing the two young lovers to balance their ambitions with  responsibility and realize the evolved meaning of love.

Bodies begin to pile up in a hospital meant to save lives, forcing a doctor with a troubled past to confront buried secrets when a woman from his past returns. As the investigation deepens, each revelation becomes more dangerous than the last.

Teesari Begam is an emotional social drama following Pooja Dixit, a young woman deceived into marrying Babban Khan - only to discover he already has two wives. Renamed "Nagma" and trapped in a toxic household, Pooja's world unravels further when her father dies of heartbreak. With unlikely allies in her co-wives Tabassum and Shabana, she fights to reclaim her life with courage and dignity.

Two friends, Ramanna and Vishakanta, fall apart due to unforeseen circumstances, turning their bond into hatred. Despite this, their sons remain inseparable childhood friends. However, jealousy and conflict soon strain their friendship. Who caused the rift, and why? As tensions rise, the broken friendship of Ramanna and Vishakanta puts their children at risk, leaving their fate uncertain.
September 21 is a thought-provoking film that sheds light on the often-overlooked struggles of caregivers dealing with Alzheimer's.

t: Antoraal - The Hidden Truth of Society
d: An emotional murder mystery that explores the hidden truths of society through a series of mysterious events connecting multiple lives. As suspense deepens, relationships are tested and long-buried secrets begin to surface.

A lodge room boy, pushed to the edge by humiliation and injustice, attempts to steal a stash of black money but ends up trapped inside the building, turning his revenge into a high-stakes fight for survival.

Shubham Mangal Dhamal is a hilarious rollercoaster of laughter that seamlessly blends comedy with a charming romantic storyline. Packed with fresh, innovative takes on contemporary social issues, it offers wholesome entertainment for the entire family to enjoy together.

Rahul, a successful ad agency owner, falls in love with Rashmi, but his trusted employee Sharma becomes dangerously obsessed with her. As jealousy, manipulation, and murder tear their lives apart, Rashmi uncovers the disturbing truth that Rahuls possessive love was the real force behind the chaos, revealing him as the true Asura.

The movie "Ugra Mardhini" revolves around the evil forces plaguing society. Mardhini, the newly appointed ACP, jumps into action - young, tough, and unrelenting in her fight for justice. When a clash with local rowdy Soori sparks a bitter rivalry, he makes the fatal mistake of trying to kill her. What follows is Mardhini's explosive comeback as she systematically dismantles Soori and his gang once and for all.

Govind, a family therapist who swears by communication, finds his own marriage crumbling when his wife Kamala files for divorce along with the wives of his three closest friends. As the four men navigate heartbreak, buried secrets, and hard truths, Govind must practice what he preaches to win back the woman he loves most.

A quiet tea estate mansion hides unsettling secrets beneath its silence. As strange events slowly unfold, buried truths begin to surface, turning an ordinary place into the center of a chilling mystery.

Neha's life unravels through love, fear, and hidden truths. What begins as a peaceful journey turns dark as she enters a new world shaped by Karthik's intense presence. As secrets surface and tensions rise, Neha is caught between love, control, and survival in an increasingly unsettling reality.

Two village boys, Ram and Shyam, chase their dreams of a medical scholarship and a bicycle by entering a spinning top tournament. With determination, odd jobs, and guidance from mentors, they overcome challenges to win and bring pride to their village.
Gawaar Dulha is a Bhojpuri comedy film featuring Dinesh Lal Yadav.

Two individuals, shaped by painful pasts, find their lives unexpectedly intersecting again. As chance encounters draw them closer, their guarded worlds begin to unravel, forcing them to confront old wounds and rediscover what connection truly means.
Jungle Jaluchhe is a Sambalpuri movie directed by Saroj Kumar Bhuyan.

A socially driven drama inspired by the life of child singer Ashok Darji, tracing his journey from a street boy to a rising talent through music and determination. Alongside his struggles and success, the film highlights the importance of education, the dedication of teachers, and the responsibilities shared by parents and students.

Directed by Lal Babu Pandit, Raja Jaani is a Bhojpuri movie featuring Khesari Lal Yadav and Prity Biswas in prominent roles.

A humble middle-class family skilled in martial arts finds their lives thrown into danger after crossing paths with a ruthless gang. Forced into a deadly conflict, they must stand together and fight against overwhelming odds in a battle filled with action, twists, and emotion.

When the hunt for power meets the price of survival, the Ivory cartel war ignites a brutal saga - a gripping tale of dominance, revenge, and endurance in a world where mercy dies first, and only the wildest will survive

A young man haunted by questions about heroism and identity struggles through a life shaped by a mysterious curse tied to his past. As forgotten village beliefs and the return of a lost deity begin to influence his fate, he is drawn into a journey where myth, destiny, and reality collide.
The darkness is ready to HUNT.

On New Year's Eve, two reckless youngsters uproot five brass crosses from a church cemetery. What follows is a relentless haunting by five vengeful spirits, forcing the duo on a desperate journey to undo their sins before it's too late.

A humble middle-class family skilled in martial arts finds their lives thrown into danger after crossing paths with a ruthless gang. Forced into a deadly conflict, they must stand together and fight against overwhelming odds in a battle filled with action, twists, and emotion.

A secret investigative officer returns to his hometown for a murder case, only to find himself entangled in unexpected relationships and hidden truths. As the investigation deepens, past and present collide with surprising twists.
Determined to take control of her fate, a young woman organizes her own wedding procession after her boyfriends violent and egoistic policeman father forces him into another marriage.

Manmelo is a spiritual drama about a young woman who travels to Dwarka to immerse her grandfather's ashes, honoring his final wish. While seeking to understand the life and teachings of Krishna, she meets a mysterious young man who guides her through the sacred city and reveals the deeper meaning of faith, devotion, and truth. As their journey comes to an end, she discovers that the young man is none other than Dwarkadhish himself, who enlightens her about the eternal presence of God and the true essence of life.

t: GT vs RR - TATA IPL 2026 Qualifier 2
d: Witness a blockbuster Qualifier 2 clash as Gujarat Titans take on Rajasthan Royals in a high-pressure battle for the final spot in the IPL 2026 Final. With Sundays title showdown within touching distance, expect tactical battles, momentum-shifting moments, and relentless playoff intensity as Shubman Gills GT face off against Riyan Parags Rajasthan Royals in a winner-takes-all contest. Experience the electrifying atmosphere and live match action on the big screen at PVR INOX.

Jeena Dil Se is a youthful musical comedy filled with friendship, love, fun, emotions, and madness. The story follows a crazy gang of friends whose lives turn upside down after unexpected secrets and hilarious misunderstandings create nonstop chaos. Amid romance, friendship, music, and comedy, they discover that life is best lived happily, fearlessly, and dil se.

Kevin and Soozi, college lovers, embark on a romantic trip to her ancestral home. But beneath the silence of the estate lies a horrifying secret: Soozi's family is part of a dark tantric cult that sacrifices O-negative individuals for spiritual ascension. Kevin, also O-negative, realises he was chosen, not loved. Captured and drained of blood, he must fight to escape a house built on deception, ritual murder, and ancient terror.
After breaking the mysterious One Wish Willow to win his crushs heart, a hopeless romantic gets exactly what he asked for, only to discover that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

A young couple retreats to a remote farmhouse for a peaceful escape, but the night turns tragic when the man dies under mysterious circumstances. Soon after, he appears to return, but something feels deeply wrong. As unsettling signs grow, the woman relies on her instincts to uncover a terrifying truth, an ancient evil has taken his place, forcing her into a battle between love, deception, and survival.
A couple's road trip turns into a nightmare after a fatal accident unleashes a mysterious entity that follows them relentlessly  no matter how far they run.

Arivu, a sincere TNPSC aspirant determined to support his family and fulfill his mother's dream, finds his life shattered when the bike she gifted him is repossessed due to financial struggles. In his desperate attempt to reclaim it, he is pulled into a dangerous world that forces him to confront fear, survival, and the harsh realities of life, transforming his journey into one of resilience and self-discovery.
In a zamindar household, a watchful aunt becomes the quiet witness to a mystery that slowly exposes injustice.
A talented piano tuner's meticulous skills for tuning pianos lead him to discover an unexpected aptitude for cracking safes, turning his life upside down.

The story follows a young school student who discovers that his grandfather possesses mysterious superpowers. As the secret risks attracting an alien threat, the child is drawn into a high-stakes adventure where imagination meets danger.

Set in Hyderabad, the story is a postmodern crime thriller/mystery that follows the events surrounding the disappearance of Mareechika. The story takes a mysterious turn when it's revealed that Sanju and his best friend Venkat Laxmi (Anupama Parameswaran) killed Mareechika for their own selfish reasons, and now they have to face the consequences of it.

What happens when the "God of Cricket" and the Lord of the Universe reside under the same roof? Krishna Aur Chitthi is a soul-stirring family drama that explores the thin line between fandom and faith, proving that when an intention is pure, every prayer, whether addressed to Vaikuntha or Wankhede, reaches the same destination.

A group of young friends must outsmart a powerful school bully, turning to an imaginative grandfather whose inspiring stories guide them. As their journey takes them through challenges and adventures, they discover the strength of friendship, courage, and determination.

A woman quits her job to return to her family, plagued by the deaths of male family members. Finding the remaining women apathetic, she resolves to empower them towards independence and self-reliance.

In a village, a Gowda rents out houses to poor people and cheats them by seizing their property. A boy comes from the city to confront the Gowda and witnesses firsthand the hardships endured by the villagers.
A famous mentalist predicts four future deaths on live TV and kills himself. Now, as each date nears, the world waits in fear. Are they coincidences, or is someone carrying out his deadly revenge?

Even in a society that prides itself on literacy, the shocking cruelties born from superstition can haunt the human conscience. Kiratha brings to the screen the true event that shocked Kerala, unravelling its dark mysteries.

A triangular love story that explores romance, relationships, and emotional conflicts through the lens of family values and personal sacrifice. As emotions intensify and difficult choices arise, the characters are forced to confront the true meaning of love, companionship, and maturity.

Pankaj, a young man torn between his dreams and societal expectations. As he navigates academic pressure and career uncertainty, he struggles with failure, self-doubt, and identity, reflecting the emotional challenges faced by todays youth.
A family drama packed with action, romance, comedy, emotions, and themes of superstition, following characters whose lives unfold through conflict, relationships, and entertaining twists.
The Indian Lenin Babu Jagdeo is a Hindi movie, directed by Prem Kumar Vidharthi.

Set against the backdrop of an ordinary morning, the film follows a self-assured woman whose world is turned upside down by a single, life-altering encounter. Faced with a stranger's overwhelming suffering, her confidence gives way to something far more profound. A compelling story of patience, empathy, and the unexpected battles we face every day.

Aarohi and Rohit, childhood best friends from different social backgrounds, share a deep bond that slowly turns into love. But burdened by class differences and personal sacrifices, Rohit suppresses his feelings, leading to misunderstandings that pull them apart. As life takes painful turns and tragedy strikes, their paths cross again years later, forcing them to confront a love and friendship that time could never truly erase.

From his humble beginnings as Lakshman Narayan Sharma to becoming the revered Neem Karoli Baba, the film explores the spiritual journey of a saint whose teachings of compassion, faith, and unconditional love inspired generations of devotees and seekers.
Oke Oka Lokam is a Telugu Movie directed by  Y Vishnu Narayana.

A family conflict spirals into a deadly mystery when hidden secrets and rising tensions lead to murder. As the investigation unfolds, two determined police officers navigate a web of suspense, betrayal, and shocking revelations in their pursuit of the truth

t: Kuch Alfaaz by Nitinn R. Miranni
d: Kuch Alfaaz is an intimate, soulful performance property curated by Nitinn R. Mitanni, where poetry, music, storytelling, and lived emotions come together in their most honest form. With sold-out shows across India and around the globe, it has consistently struck a deep emotional chord with audiences, creating immersive experiences where words are felt, stories are lived, and emotions resonate through every performance.

Experience the excitement of the TATA IPL Finals 2026 live on the big screen as cricket fans come together for an electrifying match night filled with thrilling moments, intense competition, and the unmatched energy of the grand finale.
In 1980s rural Andhra Pradesh, a spirited villager unites his community through sports to defend their pride against a powerful rival.

What starts as a murder case soon spirals into a deeper mystery when a ghost exposes secrets that refuse to stay buried. Caught in the middle are four thieves and the police, leading to a thrilling mix of scares, laughs, and surprises.

An ordinary woman struggling to hold her family together while coping with her husband's alcoholism unexpectedly becomes entangled in a comical quest for revenge. As a kind-hearted man tries to help mend her daughter's broken heart, a series of humorous and emotional events challenge societal norms, family bonds, and the meaning of second chances.

Set in Mysuru (2001-2011), Mango Pachcha follows a fearless young man who defies all odds to reclaim his territory and become a local legend. A never-before-told tale of ambition, grit, and the spirit of Mysuru.

A devoted mother brings her young son to Sabarimala for the first time - and loses him in the crowds. Years later, when the case is finally reopened, the search for answers uncovers more than anyone expected.

Set against the untamed wilderness, Sahariya follows a fearless young man whose journey through a harsh and unpredictable landscape tests his courage, resilience, and will to survive. As he faces mounting dangers and life-altering challenges, he must rely on his strength and determination to carve his own path in a world where only the strongest endure.

A heartfelt musical drama that follows a talented young individual striving to pursue their passion while navigating the complexities of relationships and family expectations. Through music, emotions, and meaningful connections, the story explores the bonds that shape lives and inspire personal growth.

Set in a rural community shaped by tradition, the story follows a family navigating the challenges of arranging their daughter's marriage while protecting their honor and relationships. As wedding plans unfold, unexpected obstacles, rivalries, and emotional sacrifices test the family's resilience, leading to a dramatic and heartfelt journey filled with surprises.

A mysterious dead body discovered in Pavan's house turns life upside down for everyone in the building. As secrets unfold, Alexander begins investigating the case and uncovers a web of love, betrayal, lust, and murder connected to Niharika, Amit, and Roshan. What starts as a simple mystery slowly reveals shocking truths hidden behind relationships and human desires.

t: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
d: When Jass leaves his marriage over conflicting priorities, a new romance abroad is upended by shocking revelations, forcing him to confront love, loyalty, and the true meaning of commitment.

The story follows Samar, an ageing and now barely working artist whose fame is fading. His life unravels further when his former fling, Gayatri, accuses him of rape after their relationship ends. Even as he tries to move on with his new relationship, he is arrested and drawn into a deeply flawed law enforcement system.

Mollywood Times follows the journey of Vineeth Madhavan, a teenager hailing from Kuttikkanam who aspires to direct films. This coming-of-age comedy serves as an antithesis to the umpteen love letters written to cinema since the beginning of time.

A dark comedy centered around a chaotic family whose tangled relationships and unpredictable situations lead to emotionally charged and absurd moments, blending humor with underlying tension and drama.

Following a devastating car crash, identical twin sisters survive only to discover their entire reality might be a lie  starting with their mother's identity. It was all a setup designed to extract their wealth.

t: He-Man and The Masters of The Universe
d: A young man on Earth discovers a fabulous secret legacy as the prince of an alien planet, and must recover a magic sword and return home to protect his kingdom.

A peaceful village spirals into panic with a young woman's arrival and a haunting tied to Keshav's grandmother's death. This unleashes fear, rumors, and comic chaos. Blending social horror with a vibrant community story, the film transforms the village life into a wildly entertaining spectacle of mystery, madness, and mayhem.

A young woman finds herself at the center of a dangerous conspiracy after becoming the only witness to a shocking crime. Forced to stay one step ahead of those willing to do anything to silence her, she is drawn into a relentless fight for survival where trust is scarce and every move could be her last.
Jeev Guntla is a Marathi movie directed by Nitin Bansod. The movie features Jaywant Bhalekar and Nisha Parulekar in the lead roles.

In a remote and mysterious village untouched by time, Prathap arrives in search of a better future, only to find himself caught in a growing clash between modern development and the village's deeply guarded traditions. As secrets unravel, his journey challenges his beliefs, purpose, and destiny.

Set against a rustic rural backdrop, the film explores the dynamics, struggles, and essence of village life. The story centres on a sharp-witted young village youth named Seena (played by Vinay Rajkumar), popularly nicknamed "Sixth Sense" Seena for his keen intuition and clever nature. The narrative blends romance, action, and family drama as it follows Seena's journey through local conflicts and community life.
A story of courage, humanity, sacrifice, and unity, where the common man stood between life and death

If you found out we werent alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you?

This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people.

We are coming close to Disclosure Day.

The murder of a pregnant woman during a suspected black magic ritual prompts a determined officer to reopen a long-buried case. As people linked to the crime begin dying under mysterious circumstances, the investigation uncovers a chilling web of superstition, corruption, and dark secrets that refuse to stay buried.
Beneath a villages fear of a forbidden place lies a hidden truth, revealed when a desperate escape brings everything into question.
Set against the backdrop of a Tamil Muslim household, the film traces a timeless romance that unfolds across decades, connecting the past and present.

Raju and Radha are in love and plan to marry, but their lives take a tragic turn when she is chased by a group of men and dies while hiding from them. Returning as a spirit, Radha seeks revenge against those responsible for her death.

Set against Indias 1990 economic crisis, Governor follows Raman, a reluctant bureaucrat unexpectedly appointed as the Governor of the RBI when the nation stands on the brink of bankruptcy. As inflation rises, fuel runs low, and panic spreads, Raman must navigate political pressure and a collapsing system to prevent the country from falling apart.
Inspired by the idea of divine justice, the story follows a fearless woman who takes it upon herself to punish cruel men driven by lust and brutality, becoming a relentless force against evil.

A sheltered doctor's life takes an unexpected turn when mysterious love calls lead him to a ghostly encounter  and deeper into his father's long-buried past. As secrets surface, he sets out to give his father the reunion he always deserved. A heartwarming mix of comedy, romance, and suspense.

Shivanna, a government employee, is devastated when his son Ajay repeatedly fails to secure a government job and a suitable marriage. After Shivanna is presumed dead, Ajay receives a compassionate appointment and finally settles down. But when it is discovered that Shivanna is actually alive, a web of deception, blackmail, and difficult choices unfolds, leading to unexpected consequences that change the lives of everyone involved.

A rebellious motorcycle journey to Pondicherry brings two unlikely women together, one searching for her lost mother, the other chasing a wedding secret. Along the way, chaos and laughter forge an unbreakable sisterhood that awakens freedom, self-worth and a deeper connection with the world around them.

Ragini, a landlord's daughter, runs away from home and meets Raja, a poor farmer, on the bus. She hates him. He keeps saving her. She falls in love. Then finds out her father paid him to follow her.
Betrayed and heartbroken what will Ragini do?

In a hillside town ruled by power and influence, one incident sets off a chain of events that changes many lives forever. A family is torn apart, truths are buried, and silence becomes a weapon. Years later, as the past resurfaces, hidden forces begin to tremble. When one man returns to face what was taken from him, the fight is no longer personal; it becomes a reckoning that will decide the fate of the town itself.

Janabai Rathod, a woman from the Banjara community, loses her land to a government project but is denied fair compensation due to corruption and political influence. As she struggles from local offices to Mantralaya seeking justice, the film exposes the harsh realities of bureaucracy, power, and the fight of a common woman against a broken system.

A legendary Carnatic singer's world begins to slip away as Alzheimer's takes hold. As his memories fade, long-buried family secrets resurface and a fractured bond with his son is forced into the open. In the end, it is music  the one language that remains  that becomes their last bridge to love, forgiveness, and redemption.
After the success of 1920: Horrors of the Heart, the triumvirate  Mahesh Bhatt, Anand Pandit and Vikram Bhatt reunites for Haunted 3D: Echoes of the Past.

A family finds itself caught in a series of household mishaps, misunderstandings, and escalating chaos as problems spiral out of control. Even as situations worsen, the family continues trying to convince themselves that everything is somehow under control ("Badhu Alright Che").

Set in the heartland of Madhya Pradesh, the story follows a tribal woman who fiercely fights to protect her daughter from powerful criminals. With support from a newly posted woman sub-inspector, she takes on corruption and injustice, turning her struggle into a powerful stand for dignity and justice.

Struggling to make ends meet, a couple living on the KarnatakaTamil Nadu border finds their lives increasingly burdened by the cost of caring for an ailing elderly parent. When the wife learns of Thalaikkoothal, a controversial traditional practice associated with ending the suffering of the terminally ill, she is forced to confront a difficult moral dilemma that tests the family's values, compassion, and conscience

The protagonist left home at a young age and now works in Mumbai as an Anti-Terrorism Squad (ATS) agent, without his family's knowledge. The crux of the story is how he uses unconventional methods to track down those involved in terrorism and the drug mafia, while also fighting to save his struggling family.

When a man is accused of murdering his wife and young son, a determined young advocate takes on the case to uncover the truth. As she delves deeper into the investigation, hidden secrets, unexpected suspects, and layers of deception emerge, drawing her into a dangerous web of lies, betrayal, and mystery where nothing is as it seems.

t: Hum Angrezon Ke Zamane Ke Jailor Hai
d: A family conflict spirals into a deadly mystery when hidden secrets and rising tensions lead to murder. As the investigation unfolds, two determined police officers navigate a web of suspense, betrayal, and shocking revelations in their pursuit of the truth.

Two old friends, a rock star and an NRI, swap lives for fun, but the magical twist forces them to confront deep personal challenges, testing their bond and changing their perspectives on life and friendship.
Nine squares. Two hands. One hunted mind. In Chhaki Suna, an investigator turns a child`s game into his sharpest weapon, until the board begins to play against him.
After a therapist's patient disappears into a dimension beyond reality, she must venture into the unknown to save him.
Get ready for an intense and powerful cinematic experience!

A simple village boy refuses to sell his land when a powerful company offers big money, even as his own family gives in. As he stands alone, his fight turns from a personal struggle into a larger battle to protect his roots and expose the truth behind the project.
Two friends find themselves caught up in mayhem involving killers, monsters and supernatural creatures once again
Diary is an Odia movie directed by Susant Mani. The movie features Ardhendu Sundar Sahu, Jashmin Rath, Kuna Tripathy, and others.

Bharat, a truck driver finds out that his wife, Sati, is having an illicit relationship with Rajesh, a Medical Shop owner.. He files a case in the Family court, seeking for divorce.. Although the court grants him divorce, the Law comes in favor of Sati ,with its surprising clauses entitling her right to alimony despite having committed adultery.. The film comments on how certain laws affect life adversely.

t: BTS World Tour 'Arirang' in Busan: Re-broadcast
d: Concert film capturing BTS's World Tour 'Arirang' performance in Busan.

t: BTS World Tour 'Arirang' in Busan: Live Viewing
d: Concert film capturing BTS's World Tour 'Arirang' performance in Busan.

t: PVR INOX Live on Stage: Pride Special with Rani Kohenur (Hindi)
d: PVR INOX Live on Stage presents a special Pride Month celebration with Sushant Divgikr, popularly known as Rani KoHEnur. Blending music, storytelling, humor, and emotion, Sushant brings a powerful and joyous live performance to the stage. A portion of the proceeds from the evening will support underprivileged members of the queer community.

Ghabadkund is the first Marathi cinematic universe - a gripping blend of suspense and action-adventure. In a mysterious village, a string of unexplained events pulls an outsider into a hidden world of secrets tied to the legend of Ghabadkund.

Gourab, a journalist raised in an orphanage, dreams of becoming the perfect father more than a successful reporter. But when a dangerous child trafficking racket terrorizes Kolkata, he is forced to balance his duties as a husband, father, and journalist while risking everything to protect innocent children and uncover the truth.
When his daughter is abducted by ruthless kidnappers, a father will stop at nothing to bring her home.

A professor attends a biotech conference that turns into a nightmare when a rapidly mutating virus is unleashed. As the infection spreads and people begin to transform, the facility is sealed off, trapping everyone inside in a fight for survival.

A gripping courtroom drama following a transgender woman's fight for justice after a heinous crime. As the legal battle unfolds, prejudice, power, and systemic bias come under scrutiny  putting society itself on trial. A powerful story of courage, dignity, and the relentless pursuit of justice.
Karthik along with his friends go to a farm house for research work. They encounter various issues. Why did Karthik change after listening to the ghosts? What research is being done by Karthik.

When a young girl mysteriously disappears from a picnic spot, her family and local authorities are drawn into a tense search for answers. As the investigation unfolds, hidden truths and long-buried secrets begin to surface, transforming the case into an emotional exploration of fear, faith, and the unseen forces that shape human lives.

A 34-year-old man desperate to get married finally meets a woman who seems perfect for him. But as their families move forward with the match, an unusual condition tied to horoscopes turns the journey into a fun and unpredictable ride filled with family drama and emotions.

Selvi, a widowed mother, devotes her life to raising her two sons in a conservative village. Years later, her unfulfilled life comes back into focus, challenging deep-rooted traditions. As family and society strongly oppose change, Selvi must choose between societal expectations and her own happiness.

In a traditional household, a woman with a hidden past struggles to find acceptance. When danger from her former life resurfaces, she must protect the very family that doubts her without revealing the truth.

Trimurthulu, an honest and fearless constable, is known for standing up against injustice no matter the cost. When a chance discovery pulls him into a long-buried mystery, he must confront powerful forces determined to keep the truth hidden. Blending action, suspense, comedy, and emotion, the story follows his unwavering fight for justice against all odds.

An educated young man moves from his village to the city in search of a better future, joined by others chasing the same dream. Their hopes are shattered when a corrupt policeman traps them in a false case, turning society against them. As their lives spiral, they must decide whether to remain victims of injustice or fight back to reclaim their dignity.
A son discovers the legend his father once was and sets out to bring him back.

The story follows the journey of a young boy, Kesar, alongside a wandering saint-like figure known as a Fakir, representing a 40-day deep inner transformation. The film depicts a platonic teenage love story embedded in the theme of separation.
Kalagahatta is a Kannada movie directed by K Prakash Ambale. The movie features Abhi Das, Kushi PS, Gahana Gowda, Shobharaj and others in the pivotal roles.
Abhimaan is an emotionally layered drama about memory, legacy, and the cost of love, set against the haunting world of music and cinema.

When a string of murders reveals killers with no memory of their crimes, officer Krishnan Srinivasan Ganguly uncovers a chilling conspiracy. A shadowy organization is weaponizing the human mind itself.

Navagunjara is a psychological thriller about control, chaos, and fractured identities
Angikaaram is a Tamil movie starring Kotapadi J Rajesh, Sindhoori Vishwanath, Viji Venkatesh and Mansoor Ali Khan in prominent roles. It is directed by Thenpathiyan.

When a series of gruesome murders shatter the peace of a remote Gujarat village, a terrified tribal community turns to Abhaysinh, a reputed poultry farmer believed to possess a rare mystical gift passed down through generations. But as he delves deeper, haunting hallucinations begin to surface, drawing him toward a chilling connection between the killings, the village's long-buried secrets, and the darkest corners of his own past.

A young man convicted of murder awaits execution, while a conflicted judge, an aging hangman, and a morally torn jailer confront the weight of justice, guilt, and humanity in the final hours before dawn.

When seven curious school kids stumble upon a hidden room, they discover a group of ghost children trapped within their school. The ghosts reveal they were wronged and are seeking justice. The living kids team up to uncover the truth, facing challenges and dangers along the way. Will they be able to help the ghost kids find peace and bring the culprits to justice?

Framed as a river between two banks, the story follows a young woman balancing her home life and the elderly care center where she works, connected by her daily bus ride. As she forms a quiet bond with a fellow passenger, the lives of the aging residents reveal themes of loneliness, friendship, and the growing distance between generations.
An experience that hits every emotion like a storm.

An intense Action Suspense Thriller exploring the terrifying possibilities of AI and its potential to take over the future. The story follows Keshav, a brilliant young man working on a powerful AI project. But as unexpected events turn his life upside down, he finds himself trapped in a dangerous battle of technology, survival, and truth. Will his invention lead to success  or become the beginning of chaos?

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.
Fate throws a couple into an unexpected situation involving an ex-girlfriend.
Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

This is the rambunctious, ridiculous, and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world, and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created

An orphaned boy with a spirited heart and hidden struggles grows up dreaming of love and belonging, but when fate reunites him unknowingly with his estranged parents and lost love, he must navigate illness, identity, and redemption to rewrite his story.
Nagabandham - The Secret Treasure is a multilingual movie written and directed by Abhishek Nama.
The first letter of the Greek alphabet and our program's motto: The First, The Fastest, The Strongest. Every city is an urban jungle, and in that jungle, the one who will always rule is... Alpha!

In the neon-lit streets of Kolkata, a woman searching for redemption crosses paths with a mysterious bar singer whose past remains hidden. Over the course of a restless day, their lives intertwine with strangers carrying their own conflicts and secrets, until a buried truth changes everything.
Srinivasa Mangapuram is a Telugu film starring Jaya Krishna Ghattamaneni and Rasha Thadani. It is written and directed by Ajay Bhupathi.
An extraordinary odyssey that traverses the realms of deities, mortals, and the afterlife.

In Kaliyug, the powerful asura Aham traps devotees and divine beings inside a mysterious mercury world, believing no force can defeat him. To rescue them, Mahaprabhu Jagannath, along with Balaram and Garud, journeys across realms and confronts Aham with wisdom instead of destruction. The story ultimately celebrates the eternal truth that pure devotion can never be defeated, and the divine always protects true faith.

A music composer and a chess grandmaster choose to live together despite societys expectations, but their lives take an unexpected turn when their families meet and hidden truths begin to surface. Spanning three generations, the story explores love, emotions, and changing family relationships.

In the village of Shivpur, a feared dacoit spreads terror alongside Bhima, a towering doll whose sinister presence seems to guide his actions. When a determined police officer arrives to stop him, their pursuit turns into a psychological battle where reality and obsession begin to blur. As dark forces take hold, the line between hunter and hunted becomes dangerously unclear.
Moana, a village chieftains daughter goes on a mission to return the heart of the island goddess, Te Fiti but she must first seek the help of Maui, a demigod who is missing.

Idhayam Murali is a Tamil movie starring Atharvaa Murali, Preity Mukhundhan, Kayadu Lohar, Natarajan Subramaniam, S. Thaman and Niharika NM in prominent roles. It is written and directed by Aakash Baskaran.

Two brothers, Fateh and Rajveer, have watched their village decay for two decades under the grip of a corrupt Sarpanch who treats power as a personal privilege. When Fateh decides he's seen enough, he does the one thing no one expects - he runs against them. What follows is not just an election battle, but a fight for the soul of a community, testing how much one man is willing to risk when he refuses to look the other way.
Evil Dead Burn is an upcoming American supernatural horror film serving as the third standalone entry, after Evil Dead and Evil Dead Rise, and the sixth installment in the Evil Dead film series.

Officer-in-Charge Debanjan Dutta of the Kolkata Police and his team face mounting danger while investigating a gruesome crime that shakes their neighborhood. As twists derail the probe, a ruthless gang spreads chaos across the city. With tensions rising and violence erupting, the hunt intensifies.

A new adventure, the same madness-only bigger than ever. The Dhamaal boys are back and ready to chase the "Treasure of Life," facing crazy challenges along the way. What starts as a treasure hunt quickly turns into a rollercoaster of hilarious misadventures.

GDN is an inspiring drama drawn from a remarkable chapter in the life of G. D. Naidu legendary inventor, industrial visionary, and one of India's greatest innovators. Rather than a full biopic, the film zeroes in on extraordinary true events that tested his resilience and unwavering belief in progress.

Set against a rapidly changing India, the story follows Naidu's relentless pursuit of innovation and the fierce opposition he faces from powerful authorities determined to suppress his vision. What unfolds is a gripping battle between a pioneering genius and the forces standing in his way.

Packed with dramatic twists, powerful emotions, and riveting real-life incidents, GDN is ultimately a story of courage, conviction, and the price paid by those who dare to dream beyond their time.

Christopher Nolan's next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX film technology. The film brings Homer's foundational saga to IMAX film screens for the first time and opens in cinemas everywhere on July 17, 2026.

Set in 1980s Britain, Harnek - a turbaned Sikh immigrant - loses his close ones to a brutal racial attack but transforms his grief into courage. Rising from humble immigrant to community leader, he proves that one man's turban can become the crown of a community.

The India Story dives deep into the high-stakes world of pesticide company scandals. It offers a compelling, dramatic look at the controversial issues and powerful interests involved in corporate malfeasance that affects the nation.

In the booming world of Indian ed-tech, an earnest teacher and an ambitious entrepreneur become co-founders to chase a dream of affordable education - until ambition blurs their ethics and Greed takes over.

Swapnasundari is a romantic drama about a young man navigating the uncertainties of an arranged marriage. Torn between family expectations and his own ideals of love, he devises a unique way to find his perfect partner. But when reality blurs with his dreams, unexpected twists challenge his belief in love and destiny.
Uttar Da Puttar is directed by Ravinder Siwatch.

Navya, the only daughter of powerful businessman Devi Prasad, is set for a grand wedding that soon goes off track due to unexpected twists. As secrets unfold and egos clash, the celebration turns into a modern-day swayamvar.

A widowed woman married to an old man - sparking an emotional journey that challenges society's norms and redefines humanity, compassion, and connection. Will this unusual bond change their lives forever?
The fourth installment in the MCU Spider-Man franchise.

From the vibrant soil of Punjab comes a heist like no other, one that will steal your heart before it steals anything else. The Great Punjab Robbery is a quirky, thrilling, and emotional rollercoaster rooted in Punjab, yet relevant to the world.
Lahore, 1947 is a Hindi-language period action drama directed by Rajkumar Santoshi and produced by Aamir Khan. The movie features Sunny Deol in the lead role.
Get ready to relive the nostalgia and embrace the next chapter in Shivam`s journey in Awarapan 2.

Recently dumped Owen and hopeful romantic Allie might be the only two singles in the city looking for more than just a quick encounter. They both feel a spark when they meet, but a series of missteps and unexpected detours complicate their night, keeping them apart. As they each race toward and away from one another across the city, they just might discover that the one thing they want most is closer than they think.
Love with a difference, family with a purpose
I'm Game is a Malayalam film directed by Nahas Hidhayath, with Dulquer Salmaan in the lead role.
After his billionaire industrialist boss is murdered in front of him, Cole Reed is set up to take the fall for the crime, leaving him on the run as he works to uncover an international conspiracy.
"The Paradise" is a Period Action-Drama film that is setup in a slum of Secunderabad.
The horror series returns to its supernatural roots. A new protagonist faces mysterious apparitions that go far beyond classic haunting phenomena. Evil finds new ways to enter reality.

After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.
Some fires don't destroy... they reveal!
Get ready for Vvan - Force of the Forrest a big-screen adventure unlike any other!

A story inspired by the idea of dharma and loyalty, it follows the deep bond between a man and his dog, who love each other like brothers. When fate tests their connection, they are pushed to extreme lengths, fighting for each other against all odds.
Bank robbers are posting their heists on social media, causing police to chase them.
Ab bhaukaal bhi bada hoga, aur parda bhi.
Udta Teer is a Hindi-language movie directed by Akash A Kaushik. The movie features Ayushmann Khurrana and Sara Ali Khan in the lead roles.

The man who became a legend for his people.
The legend who became a nightmare for evil.

Practical Magic 2 returns to a world steeped in moonlit mischief and powerful ancestral magic, as the Owens sisters must confront the dark curse that threatens to unravel their family once and for all in a must-see cinematic event of fun, magic and mayhem.
Inspired by real events, Bolagolam follows a villages emotional fight to reclaim their childrens lost playground, exploring dreams, loss, and the power of community spirit.

Follows a hapless courier tasked with delivering a package to a remote hospital. He soon finds himself caught in the middle of an outbreak and must fight through hordes of mutated creatures to survive.

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families. Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but-hapless weredog Raww and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face the dreaded Manananggal, the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever.

Lowen Ashleigh gets hired by Jeremy Crawford to ghostwrite novels for his bestselling author wife Verity, who's unable to finish after an accident. Lowen uncovers Verity's disturbing truths while residing at the Crawfords' home to work.
Drishyam 3 on Drishyam Day. Aakhri hissa baaki hai.
A powerful retelling of the Valmiki Ramayana, following Lord Ramas journey through love, exile, and war, as he navigates the eternal conflict between duty and desire.
Jis dard mein aaraam hai ISHK usi ka naam hai.

After years of distance, silence, and unresolved differences, two souls reunite for a powerful new beginning. Filled with deep emotion, intense romance, and high-octane action, this is a story of love that refuses to die and a comeback that was always meant to happen.

Clayface unravels one mans horrifying descent from a rising Hollywood star to a revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of ones identity and humanity, corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition

Meet the cat in the hat you don`t know! In the wonderfully whimsical tradition of Dr. Seuss, The Cat in the Hat comes to the big screen in his animated theatrical feature film debut, an all-new, epic adventure with an edge, where mischief, magic and mayhem reign supreme. Doing what he does best, the cat--voiced by Bill Hader--spreads joy to kids in his hilarious, signature and singularly irreverent way, transporting them and audiences on a fantastical journey through a world they`ve never seen before.

t: The Hunger Games: Sunrise on the Reaping
d: Explores Panem 24 years before Katniss' saga, starting on the morning of the reaping for the 50th Hunger Games, where a young Haymitch Abernathy participates.

Carla returns to her hometown to reconnect with her estranged mother, only to discover a terrifying secret: three women are slaves to a supernatural curse. She realizes she may be the only one who can break the curse, but to do so, she must confront her familys dark past.
Yeh Prem Mol Liya is a Hindi-language movie directed by Sooraj R. Barjatya. The movie features Ayushmann Khurrana and Sharvari Wagh in the pivotal roles.
A nail-biting action comedy that follows three naive yet honest cops on the trail of a wanted criminal. As their pursuit unfolds, chaos, humour, and unexpected twists test their ability to succeed.
Are you ready for the epic conclusion?
KING is Ready to ROAR on 24.12.2026 in Cinemas.

What begins as a joyous wedding blessing becomes a deeply personal prayer as unforeseen trials test a couples bond. Their journey transforms into a soulful tale of love, separation, and mutual respect as they wait with hope to welcome each other back into a life made whole.
The third and final installment in the Jumanji franchise, it is the direct sequel to Jumanji: The Next Level, the second film in the series.
Frustrated by the peer pressure, bullying and dictates of culturally obsessed father, the immigrant's son Rob-the protagonist struggles and finds his identity in the Western world.

Rubam is a Tamil movie starring Parvathy Nair in a prominent role. It is a horror thriller directed by Thamarai Selvan.

If you are a representative of the production house, please share the details of the film with synopsis@bookmyshow.com

Pass Na Pass delves into intense emotions, life-altering choices, and deeply human relationships. Driven by powerful characters, the film explores the struggles, decisions, and consequences that shape real lives.

In a village where 22 families live in rare unity, peace is shattered when a new highway project drives up land prices, sparking greed and conflict among relatives. As relationships fracture, one man stands by his values, and time reveals the true cost of broken bonds and lost brotherhood.
Set in the early 70s, Kaali unwittingly confronts underworld thugs, which in turn leads to a series of life-changing events. Will destiny be in his favour?

In a world where everything can be insured, a company dares to insure love. An app predicts heartbreak and controls relationships through calculated risk. The voice behind it believes love is just data until he feels it himself.

When the system flags his own relationship as a failure, it begins pulling them apart. He discovers the app doesn't just predict love, it manipulates it. Now, he must choose between the system the whole world believes in, set in 2040 and the heart and the purest form of love he can't silence.

Woh Ikkis Ka Tha, Ikkis Ka Hi Rahega!

Dinesh Vijan and Maddock Films present #Ikkis, an untold true story of India's youngest Param Vir Chakra awardee - Second Lieutenant Arun Khetarpal directed by Sriram Raghavan.

Yeh jungle toh safe hai, par yeh log? Bilkul nahi!

Welcome to the Jungle is a Hindi movie starring Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Arshad Warsi, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Jacqueline Fernandez, Disha Patani, Paresh Rawal, Johnny Lever, Rajpal Yadav, Tusshar Kapoor and Shreyas Talpade in prominent roles. It is directed by Ahmed Khan.

Mario, Luigi, and Princess Peach journey across galaxies to rescue Rosalina after Bowser Jr. kidnaps her to revive Bowser. As they face chaotic, action-packed challenges in space, the story blends family themes with high-energy adventure, though it leans more on spectacle than a tightly focused plot.
Rao Bahadur is a psychological drama set against the backdrop of a fading aristocracy - Made in Telugu, for the world. Remember, Doubt is a Demon.

Arjun, a financially struggling UK cab driver, accepts a high-paying delivery job in a desperate bid to reunite his family. But when the parcel vanishes at a remote destination, he and a hitchhiker named Liza are taken captive by a mysterious family. Arjun soon uncovers a far darker truth: they work for Europe's most powerful drug lord, creating a horrific new narcotic sourced from their victims.

Trapped in a brutal operation, Arjun is forced into a fight for survival against a ruthless crime syndicate, where escape may come at an unimaginable cost.

After a tragic mistake sends Kenna to prison, she returns to her hometown in Wyoming years later, hoping to rebuild her life and reconnect with her daughter, Diem, whom she has never known. When Diem's grandparents refuse her attempts, Kenna finds unexpected compassion and a growing bond with Ledger, a former NFL player and local bar owner, forcing her to confront the past while fighting for a second chance.

A man feels overwhelmed by the women in his household, including his outspoken girlfriend. One night during Kali Puja, he mysteriously gains the ability to hear women's inner thoughts. What starts as chaos gradually unveils their hidden struggles and vulnerabilities.

With the help of a psychologist, he learns to navigate this new gift, becoming more empathetic and self-aware on a humorous yet insightful journey of growth.

Madhava and Geetha are in love while they are studying in the village. However, as they grow in life and shift to different cities for higher education, Geetha moves on from Madhav, leaving him heartbroken. Soon, Ithi comes into Madhava's life and helps him come out of this situation. Gradually, they fall in love.

Two brilliant students, Vicky and Rocky, see their lives change when a classmate tricks Vicky into a dangerous drug addiction. Forced to become a drug seller, Vicky's story shows how quickly a bright student's life can fall apart.

Finally, with the help of Rocky, Vicky's parents, and a brave police officer, he quits drugs and helps dismantle the drug racket.

In a peaceful village, farmer Shankar's life is shattered when the ruthless leader Akasahab and her brothers scheme to seize his land. Enraged, Shankar confronts them, but Akasahab orders her brothers to kill him. Despite his brave fight, Shankar is killed, leaving his family devastated.

Driven by grief and anger, his family and the villagers rise against Akasahab, sparking a fierce cycle of conflict and revenge within the community.

Once inseparable fighters, Ryu and Ken are drawn out of their fractured lives when a covert force pulls them into the next World Warrior Tournament.

What appears to be a contest of strength soon reveals a far more dangerous agenda, pushing them into a relentless battle not only against ruthless opponents, but against each other, and the unresolved shadows of their shared past.

Hop into the fun and fuzzy animal world with Disney and Pixar's Hoppers!

When scientists discover a way to hop human consciousness into animal minds, a student named Mabel jumps at the chance to uncover the wonders of the animal world and joins forces with them to save their beloved forest.

This is more than a concert film. It is EPiC: Elvis Presley in Concert. A one-of-a-kind cinematic experience from Academy Award-nominated Baz Luhrmann.

Elvis sings and tells his story like never before in a new cinematic experience from visionary filmmaker Baz Luhrmann.

t: Aga Aga Sunbai! Kay Mhantay Sasubai?
d:
When fate ties newly married Manasvi to her spirited mother-in-law Smita, the two become an unlikely duo brought together not by choice, but by circumstance.

Heartfelt, wickedly funny, and deeply moving, it's their journey of discovering what happens when one woman becomes another's unwavering support. A rollercoaster of laughter, tears, and chaos, it celebrates the beautiful mess of finding family in the most unexpected place

A Chhattisgarhi farmer and his wife set out on a sacred pilgrimage to the twelve Jyotirlingas, seeking relief from the hardships crushing their family. As they journey from shrine to shrine, each visit reveals the divine origin of the Jyotirlinga through powerful flashbacks, while their struggles begin to ease under Lord Shiva's grace.

Guided by soul-stirring reflections on the spiritual significance of each shrine, their journey culminates in faith renewed and a life transformed.

When a thief interrupts a woman's suicide attempt, he is pulled into a dangerous game of deception and forced into committing a murder.

As shocking truths unravel, he discovers that the woman and her lover are the real masterminds behind the crimes. But just when escape seems certain, the trap is turned inside out-who is really in control, and who will pay the final price?
When Raja takes charge of his father's Nawab Cafe, something he never truly valued, hidden challenges emerge, forcing him to step up and protect his family's legacy.

What fate awaits a stone-hearted gangster, a bloodthirsty womaniser, when true love claims him, helpless and unguarded- a gang war that shakes the entire underworld and crime syndicate to their very roots.

A forbidden love, the tale of an unrequited passion.

Set in a world increasingly disconnected from self-awareness, Trijya follows Avdhut Kale, an artistically inclined villager struggling to find meaning while working as a reporter in Pune.

Caught between professional compromises and mounting social expectations, he drifts further from his true self. His return to the countryside becomes a quiet journey of introspection, spiritual seeking, and rediscovery.

Sukhamano Sukhmann, when someone asks, "How are you?", we all say "fine" without much thought from either side. Neither party really means it. But what if we actually did?

Theo is a lonely boy struggling to find friends or family, until one magical night changes everything. He begins meeting his family members and searching for love, only for reality to hit once again. A fun film spiced with magical realism that makes our day a little more interesting.
In a world where justice falters, a powerful guardian awakens. A superhuman rises in a rotten world to set things right in this high-octane fantasy entertainer.

Two decades after the original phenomenon, high fashion returns to the sleek offices of Runway Magazine. In this eagerly awaited sequel to The Devil Wears Prada, iconic characters navigate a shifting industry in New York City, balancing timeless style with the cutthroat world of modern digital ambition.

In Toy Story 5, the toys face a new kind of challenge as childrens attention shifts from traditional playthings to modern technology. When Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the gang find themselves competing with smart devices and digital distractions, they must confront what it truly means to be a toy in a rapidly changing world.

As old friendships are tested and a new purpose is discovered, the toys learn that adapting doesnt mean losing who you are, it means finding new ways to belong.

Born into a poor family, a young boy studies in a nearby city, driven by his father's dream. After his father dies in a tragic incident, the boy returns to his village and is forced to work under the ruthless landlord Kaalegowda, who controls the villagers through land documents and fear.

As the boy grows, a mystic named Kaalajnani reveals his divine purpose. Realising his destiny, the boy rises to free his people and bring dignity and hope back to the village.

Set in Vellimala, Idukki,  where the story unfolds against a backdrop of innocent, pure-hearted humans who are intertwined with the land and animals. The ultimate victory belongs to God, not demons, the fallen.

t: PVR INOX Live On Stage With Dhruv Sangari (Live Screening)
d:
PVR INOX LIVE ON STAGE is PVR INOX's premium live entertainment platform that reimagines cinemas as intimate venues for curated live performances beyond movies. Designed to deliver immersive, theatre-grade experiences with world-class sound, seating, and hospitality, the platform brings audiences closer to live art in a shared, elevated setting. For its inaugural showcase, PVR INOX LIVE ON STAGE presents Dhruv Sangari, a rare musician-scholar and master of Qawwali.

Trained at the dargah of Nizamuddin Auliya and under legendary maestros, his music draws from timeless poets and mystics across Urdu, Hindi, Punjabi, Farsi, and Arabic traditions. Known as the Prince of Qawwali, Dhruv's performances are soulful, meditative, and deeply immersive. This is a live performance, not a movie screening, brought to you by PVR INOX.

Ramaai is an inspiring biographical drama that brings to light the untold struggles and sacrifices of Ramabai Bhimrao Ambedkar, a Dalit woman who endured immense hardship for the upliftment of Bahujan society and the success of her husband, Dr. B. R. Ambedkar.

Set in Chhattisgarh, the film honors a forgotten mother whose courage, resilience, and selfless devotion shaped history and continue to inspire generations.

After a bus accident, Karthik, Nakshatra, and three others awaken in a dense, unfamiliar forest where unsettling events suggest an unseen force is controlling their fate. As they struggle to escape, they discover their ordeal is part of JB's secret experiment, pushing the limits of human consciousness.

t: Ready or Not 2: Here I Come
d:
Sisterhood. Vengeance. Power - the hunt is on. Ready or not? They are back for round two.

Moments after surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace reaches the next level of the nightmarish game, this time with her estranged sister, Faith, by her side. She has one chance to survive, keep her sister alive, and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Carnage erupts, with heads severed, limbs crushed, and blood spilt.

In Mardaani 3, Rani Mukerji returns to reprise her unanimously loved character of ACP Shivani Shivaji Roy, a daredevil cop, in YRF's blockbuster franchise.

Shivani risks everything in a race against time to save 93 young missing girls of our country, again highlighting a heinous crime happening against girls in this highly-anticipated threequel of India's only hit female-led franchise.

An anthology exploring the many shades of love, from attraction and intimacy to obsession and unconditional devotion. Told through five distinct stories, each linked to a vowel, the narrative journeys through love's tender, dangerous, and transformative emotions.

t: Focus Concert-Live on Piano by Krishna
d:
Theme: Bollywood Piano Night

Focus Concerts is a seated, immersive live music experience designed for deep listening and emotional connection. Each evening features a single instrumentreimagining timeless melodies through exceptional musicianship, cinematic lighting, and a carefully curated atmosphere.

Stripped of distractions and built around the power of sound, Focus Concerts invites you to slow down, tune in, and experience music the way it was meant to be heard.

Artist: Krishna is a pianist, composer and filmmaker from Udaipur, India. An alumnus of The National Institute of Design, he is affiliated with the candlelight concerts and performs with them across the country.

Shiva is intelligent. Smart college boy, Pooja, a pretty young girl from a rich family, studies at the same college. Pooja falls in love with Shiva because of his kindness and gentility. Pooja decides to meet her divorcee mother living in Kashi, and then Pooja goes to Kashi with Shiva to meet her mother.

Unfortunately, Pooja met with an accident and was hospitalized in a brain-dead condition. Police take Shiva into custody. Pooja's father, Manipal, and uncle, Sunil, rush to Kashi in search of Pooja; then all four go in search of Pooja all around Kashi and find her in a hospital at last in a brain-dead condition.

What happens next? Is she recovered from the brain-dead condition? Is she joined with Shiva? It is the twisted climax of the story.

Set against a rural-urban backdrop, the film follows a man who believes working from home is the ultimate solution to success and comfort. But as his professional life moves indoors, unexpected challenges arise in his family, relationships, and personal beliefs. What starts as convenience soon turns into conflict-between ambition and responsibility, technology and tradition, self-growth and social roots.

Blending humour, emotion, and meaningful conversations around agriculture, food habits, and changing lifestyles, Mr. Work From Home asks a simple but powerful question: Can progress truly happen without staying connected to our roots?

A heart-touching story of a middle-class father who goes through countless struggles to fulfil his child's simple dream.

Filled with light-hearted comedy, emotional moments, and relatable family situations.

Madhan, a 23-year-old introvert, struggles to connect with women. At a spa, he meets Rathi, a charming and mysterious woman longing to escape her harsh reality. Hoping to overcome his fears, he asks her for a one-day date.
Their day together brings warmth and hope, but Rathi's troubled past soon catches up. When she finally fights back, everything changes.

A final twist leaves Madhan questioning the truth and who Rathi really is.

An innocent, traditional middle-class family secretly gets involved in strange and unexpected crimes.

When something unplanned happens, their normal life turns into complete chaos. Blending dark comedy with unsettling realism, the film explores the crazy and hilarious journey of Sreeram's family.

The story revolves around the themes of love, music, and rivalry. It follows a group of friends whose lives are intertwined through their shared passion for dance and music. While the film celebrates the joy of lifelong friendships, it also explores the challenges that test those bonds.

Ultimately, it is a journey about nurturing relationships, the pressures of growing up, and the friction of competitive ambitions.

In the quiet village of Salbardi, a string of mysterious accidental deaths sparks fear and suspicion. Police officer Manorama investigates amid superstition, political pressure, and resistance from villagers.

As dark secrets about a mansion and hidden power games emerge, she battles mental strain to uncover the truth and deliver justice.

t: India vs New Zealand: Finals: T20 WC 2026
d:
The grand finale of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 sees the powerhouse Indian national cricket team take on the resilient New Zealand national cricket team in a high-stakes clash for the ultimate T20 crown.

With two of the worlds most consistent sides battling for glory, fans can expect a thrilling showdown where every ball could decide who lifts the World Cup trophy.
