Love, friendship, and destiny collide in Sakhe Ga Saajani. When two hearts bound by deep emotions are tested by circumstances and life's unexpected turns, they must confront their past and choose between love and sacrifice. Set against a backdrop of relationships, dreams, and difficult choices, this heartfelt story explores how far one can go for the people they love.

Apu and Durga drift through a surreal world shaped by unfulfilled dreams and fractured identities, mirrored by the illusory lives of Shankar and Neeta. As reality and illusion blur, the story traces the quiet erosion of the human soul. Through Durgas alter ego, a haunting cry emerges, reflecting the pain, exploitation, and dislocation of a woman struggling to reclaim her sense of self in an unforgiving world.

A 40-year-old man with a nervous blinking habit marries a much younger woman who struggles with stammering, hoping to build a better life abroad. After moving overseas and starting a family, they discover years later that their child was accidentally exchanged. As they come to terms with the truth, their personal struggles and bond are tested in an emotional search for their real child.

Arun Raut, a Mumbai encounter specialist haunted by accidentally killing an innocent man, moves to a quiet village with his pregnant wife to escape his guilt. His fragile peace shatters when he meets Riddhi, the victim's daughter, who unknowingly enters his life and grows close to his family.

Consumed by paranoia and fear of revenge, Arun spirals into emotional turmoil as he struggles to hide the truth, question Riddhi's intentions, and confront his own conscience, leading him toward redemption and closure.

Set against the backdrop of communal unrest in a village, the story follows a tragic killing that shakes the community to its core. As tensions rise, the narrative explores the aftermath of violence and its deep impact on relationships, society, and the fragile fabric of harmony.

Selvi, a widowed mother, devotes her life to raising her two sons in a conservative village. Years later, unfulfilled life comes back into focus, challenging deep-rooted traditions. As family and society strongly oppose change, Selvi must choose between societal expectations and her own happiness
Munna, an ordinary boy in an ordinary world, sees a beauty that feels beyond his reach. While he struggles to become worthy of her, she is quietly learning to leave.

Three orphaned boys find their lives upended after a life-altering incident that lands them in prison. Following a daring escape, one of them experiences a divine vision of Lord Shri Krishna, inspiring him to embrace patience, wisdom, and intelligence.

Guided by these values, he chooses strategy over strength to confront injustice and bring the true culprits to justice.

When Shiva, an arrogant, drunkard cop, enters Rakkasapura, a series of unnatural manhunts begins. A village consumed by superstition brands him the demon in uniform. As fear tightens its grip and secrets bleed out, the hunt turns personal, smudging the line between hunter and evil.

In Rakkasapura, belief buries truth, and every step Shiva takes drags him closer to destruction.

A miraculous twist of fate binds two souls to a single body, with a woman emerging by day and a man by night. As they struggle to coexist, they must navigate love, identity, and a secret that threatens to upend their lives.

The theme of the movie revolves around the divine power residing within the Puri Jagannath Temple, the magnitude of that power, and how the protagonist thwarts the antagonists who attempt to seize it for their own gain.

On one side lies the wonder of science, and on the other, the mysterious secret of reincarnation. Interwoven with love and comedy, this film answers the questions raised when the wheel of time turns.

An edge-of-the-seat suspense thriller that will make you laugh and tremble till the very end.
A family struggling to escape its past must return to it one last time  when young Jeeva is kidnapped, setting them on a life-changing mission to save him.

t: Jujutsu Kaisen: Hidden Inventory / Premature Death
d:
Once friends, Gojo and Geto must protect Riko Amanai, who is marked as the Star Plasma Vessel's sacrifice.

Hunted by cultists and curse users, the powerful sorcerers face a mission that will test their limits and shape their futures.

Set against the socio-political landscape of the 1980s and 1990s, this gripping drama weaves together themes of ambition, survival, violence, and retribution. As choices made in desperation set powerful forces in motion, the story unfolds into a compelling journey where karma relentlessly pursues those trying to outrun their past.

Roshni Kapoor is the reigning superstar of the Indian film industry - glamorous, famous, and untouchable. That changes when she meets Raj, a simple, down-to-earth man whose innocence captures her heart. They fall deeply in love.

But their romance takes a dark turn when Raj uncovers a dangerous secret: Roshni is entangled with a powerful Dubai-based underworld don. Shattered and now in mortal danger, Raj faces an impossible choice - walk away and survive, or risk everything to save the woman he loves.

Two men share a house and a past that no longer fits them. As city life pulls Polash forward and age holds his father Pannalal in place, an unexpected return forces them to confront their differences and the quiet truths they have avoided.

Eighty reported sexual assaults a day, every day. One every twenty minutes and these are just the reported ones. Where does this come from? What does it leave behind?

An investigative thriller that unfolds through a powerful courtroom drama

In the chaos of Mumbai, a Deaf woman leads a double life as a contract killer  but when a hit goes wrong and ghosts from her past resurface, she must confront buried trauma, deadly betrayals, and the truth about her own identity in a desperate fight for survival.

Nilave traces the journey of Arjun, a lonely and emotionally anxious young man searching for companionship. In a world of fleeting connections, he discovers a magical love and goes to extraordinary lengths to make it eternal.

Manu, a devoted fan of his idol and a respected figure in his village, dedicates himself to helping others through his charitable work. He falls in love with Malar and marries her, but their happiness is threatened when powerful family opposition leads to a deadly plot against them. The story follows their struggle to protect their love and build a life together despite the dangers and challenges they face.

Dhwanit is a bright and curious child whose life changes when he receives a mobile phone for his birthday. What begins as a harmless gift soon turns into an all-day habit, quietly affecting his world and those around him.

It highlights the importance of mindful mobile use and raises awareness for both parents and children about balancing technology and real life.

After uncovering a deadly conspiracy linked to JP Sundaram, Daniel, a popular Malayali YouTuber known for exposing the truth, is forced to go on the run. 

Framed and hunted across borders, he fights back from exile only to uncover a far more dangerous nexus of power, technology, and crime.

Sathya, wary of arranged matches, agrees to a blind date set up by his sister and meets Monisha, only to discover they once shared the same school as senior and junior.

As they bond over memories, old crushes, and unspoken feelings, their journey reconnects them with the past and unexpectedly draws them closer, paving the way for new love.

Rayudu is a powerful and influential man, feared even by the government. He runs several illegal businesses, including political dealings, criminal activities, and real estate encroachments. His daughter is his whole world, and he also has a lover, Bebamma, in his village.

Meanwhile, young boys who have just come of age begin dying mysteriously, not only in their village but in the surrounding areas as well.
When villagers come together to solve their water shortage, they uncover shocking truths that reveal a much larger crisis.

NRI Dulhan is a heartwarming family entertainer filled with humor, emotion, and romance. The story follows a lively NRI girl who returns to India with her uncle to fulfill her late father's final wish - finding the right groom.

Having always looked down on Indian culture and preferred life abroad, her perspective begins to change as she meets three very different men and experiences love, laughter, and life lessons.

Through her journey, she rediscovers the warmth of relationships and the true beauty of Indian culture and values.

Baapya is a warm, rooted comedy-drama set in coastal Konkan that explores how an ordinary family and their close-knit town are forced to confront change, identity, and long-buried emotions when an unexpected return from the past disrupts their carefully settled lives.

Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up alone on a spaceship, light-years from Earth. As his memory returns, he uncovers a mission to stop a mysterious substance killing the Sun and save Earth. An unexpected friendship may be the key.

Based on the novel Project Hail Mary by Andy Weir, author of The Martian.

Bharathi is a bright seventh-grade girl from a small village, raised by her mother in the absence of a father. Inspired by her teacher's dream of uplifting their community, she makes it her mission to educate the villagers in their native Kannada.

Her journey is a testament to resilience as she overcomes obstacles to bring change through education, highlighting social responsibility and a deep love for one's mother tongue.

We once lived in times when homes echoed with the laughter and energy of many children. Today, we find ourselves settling for a single child, often to meet societal expectations.

While the love we feel doesn`t diminish with fewer children, we often overlook how this shift impacts the household and its emotional environment.

Through Chowkidar, we share the story of the most vital pillars of a family:

The Father. The Mother. The Child.

Broke friends borrow money to record an album. When the lender demands repayment, they hatch a desperate plan to kidnap a girl for ransom.

Within days, the hero marries her instead, and a wild twist of fate somehow turns him into a millionaire.

Kajal travels to a village to open a charitable hospital, where Ishwar grows close to her. After she returns to the city, she suddenly goes missing. Ishwar begins searching for her and joins a large hospital as a ward boy, hoping to find answers. There, he witnesses shocking medical scams and the exploitation of helpless patients.

Months later, he finally finds Kajal in a heartbreaking condition inside the same corrupt system. Faced with the truth, Ishwar takes on the powerful hospital network and starts a determined fight for justice.

Bernard, a lonely saxophonist, lives with his wife Natasha while friends frequently visit their home. As suspicion and paranoia rooted in his troubled past grow, he begins to doubt her loyalty, leading to a shocking act that he later hints at during tense conversations with their guests.

Set against the backdrop of religious persecution in 1960s East Pakistan, the film follows ex-freedom fighter Nimai, who flees to Tripura with his family after his daughter goes missing.

As they rebuild their lives among an indigenous community, love, identity, and rising ethnic tensions collide, leading to heartbreak, regret, and another painful displacement in Nimai's search for belonging and safety.

This tale of fiction derives almost entirely from stories of real people during the Partition of India.

The past is always present. And decades later, when all incidents of woe have been spoken of, what remains is that early feeling of love - too personal to ever share.

A grand retelling of Krishna's journey, told on a breathtaking scale.

A visual spectacle made for the big screen.

A story of love, devotion and wonder.

Paran is a heartfelt family drama about Dharmanath, who sees his children as the essence of his life and dreams of growing old surrounded by their love.

Set between the peaceful hills of Dhankuta and the bustling city of Kathmandu, it explores love, legacy, and the true meaning of family.

Set against the vibrant backdrop of Rajasthan, Hamari Betiya is a women-centric social drama that highlights the strength, struggles, and aspirations of women fighting against societal barriers. Through emotional journeys and inspiring resilience, the film celebrates women empowerment, self-respect, and the courage to shape one's own destiny.

"The story revolves around a father who has been depressed by his son's condition, as the son has been in a coma for 20 years following an accident. The suffering becomes unbearable, leading the father to take the wrong path.

While it explores the deep emotional bond between them, the story also weaves in suspense, thrill, and action."

Based on a heartbreaking true story, the film follows the desperate efforts of emergency responders trying to rescue a six-year-old girl trapped inside a vehicle amid the conflict in Gaza. As they race against time to reach her, her calls for help become a powerful testament to courage, hope, and the human cost of war.

Bairottu is a peaceful village where people of all religions live together in unity, celebrating festivals like Dussehra and Diwali. During a Diwali celebration, a small mistake leads to chaos, and two people are mysteriously killed.

The story is a suspense thriller that unreveals how and why these deaths occurred.

A young man returns to his village as modern change begins to disrupt its fragile balance. With the river standing as a silent witness to loss and memory, he embarks on a journey to rediscover his identity, sense of belonging, and responsibility to his roots.

Sereng follows Maghi Munda, a young tribal girl who endures immense hardship after the brutal loss of her parents.

Her journey becomes a powerful testament to resilience and the fight to reclaim identity against societal odds.

When a feared factory general manager is found murdered, the investigation exposes a web of buried resentment, trauma, and hidden agendas. As suspicion falls on multiple suspects, the case becomes less about identifying the killer and more about uncovering the reasons so many wanted him dead.

t: State of Ramadhani: Dharyu Dhani Nu Thay
d: A heartfelt family drama that explores the balance between faith and reason through the lives of a practical man and his deeply spiritual wife. As their contrasting beliefs are tested by life's challenges, they embark on an emotional journey that examines love, devotion, and the strength that holds a family together.
Bound by love, protected by lies, and separated by fate, a mother and son must  confront the secrets of their past in a poignant search for truth and redemption.
Directed by Avinash Arun, the film features Rajkummar Rao, Wamiqa Gabbi and Jaideep Ahlawat in prominent roles.

Pinjar is an evocative meditation on the captivity of bodies, spirits, choices, and silence. Through the lives of five individuals, and a caged wild bird that haunts them all, the film explores how people become trapped by poverty, patriarchy, grief, migration, and social convention.

The bird, stolen from the forest and imprisoned in a cage, becomes a powerful metaphor for human confinement. As Tarak, Jhimli, Paromita, Shefali, and Iqbal struggle with their own invisible cages, Pinjar becomes a quiet yet urgent plea for compassion, dignity, and liberation

After raising his daughter Nandini alone following his wife's death, Sanjay Sajwan shares an inseparable bond with her. When he learns that he is about to become a grandfather, a sudden tragedy strikes. As Nandini welcomes her baby boy into the world, she begins to believe that her father's love and presence have found their way back to her.

Twin sisters Ramya and Saranya find their lives shattered when a brutal murder exposes the dark crimes of a powerful group. After a deadly attack leaves Ramya fighting for survival, Saranya embarks on a path of vengeance. But when the investigation falls into the hands of her lover, a determined police officer, a tense conflict unfolds between justice, duty, and personal loyalty.

Seven unemployed friends move into Raniwada, a deserted mansion with a dark past. When they discover a mysterious coin called Parees and use it in planchette sessions to make easy money, they unknowingly awaken forces tied to an ancient curse. As spirits, occultists, and hidden secrets close in on them, the friends must confront a chilling truth about reincarnation, greed, and destiny. Bhootam Bhayam is a horror-comedy that blends friendship, supernatural mystery, and the dangerous lure of instant wealth.

In a traditional household, a woman with a hidden past struggles to find acceptance. When danger from her former life resurfaces, she must protect the very family that doubts her without revealing the truth.
As Spike is inducted into Jimmy Crystal`s gang on the mainland, Dr. Kelson makes a discovery that could alter the world.

Moda Kavida Vaatavarana is a youthful romantic thriller centered around two couples who arrive at a scenic resort, each carrying their own emotional baggage and untold stories. As relationships are tested and unexpected connections emerge, a series of mysterious events unfold, leading to suspense, romance, humor, and surprising twists that change their lives forever

A wannabe rapper from the outskirts of Mumbai, India, and an affluent influencer elope to a coastal town, only to find themselves trapped in the pool of a derelict resort fighting for survival against the wrath of a ferocious crocodile.

Across three Indian states, three young women defy family and tradition for love, only to slip into unseen cages of control and silence. What begins as romance and rebellion mutates into manipulation and loss of freedom, until the women strike back, turning captivity into a battlefield for survival.

In a post-apocalyptic future after the event known as the "Quiet Rapture," a convict pilots a small submarine called the Iron Lung across a vast ocean of blood on a desolate moon, searching for the missing stars and planets of the universe.

In a quiet riverside town where tradition flows as deeply as the river itself, a revered scholar dedicates his life to reviving Brajaawalee, a fading classical Assamese language rooted in compassion and collective belonging.

When his long-estranged son returns home with a truth that challenges generations of belief, the scholar is forced to confront the fragile line between preserving tradition and embracing love.

Haunted by recurring nightmares of abandoned houses and restless spirits, a young man is drawn to a forgotten village connected to his family's dark past. As he unravels hidden secrets and buried memories, he must confront terrifying supernatural forces and a truth that could change his life forever.

As a respected traditionalist prepares for his daughter's marriage, he is forced to confront his own beliefs when his son falls in love across caste boundaries. As family conflicts, tradition, and personal convictions collide, long-buried truths and the consequences of past actions come to the surface, setting the stage for a powerful tale of justice and reckoning.

As chaos unfolds, Ryder and the pups must team up with new dino friends to protect the city and restore balance. With bigger rescues and dino-sized challenges, the team proves once again that no job is too big and no pup is too small.

A young woman, who once sacrificed her own love and happiness for the joy of her parents, wears a smile like everyone else, hiding her true emotions behind it.But when the storm of love sweeps into her life, that innocent smile conceals countless secrets. As we follow the mysteries hidden behind her laughter, the story unfolds into the tender, emotional journey of a lonely, innocent pregnant womanher inner world, her struggles, and her quiet resilience.

Celebrations turn into a bloody night for the guests when they learn that Mahek, who is celebrating her success in her career and her relationship by marking her wedding anniversary with her partner, Rajeev, has been murdered.

In Digger we trust.

DIGGER. A comedy of catastrophic proportions.

Vizag youngster Kiran lives a normal life until one small mistake turns his entire world upside down.

A single slip of the tongue in front of four unexpected people pulls him into a dangerous circle of crime, betrayal, and survival.

Vengeance follows a young woman with a mysterious past that slowly comes to light. Driven by an unrelenting purpose, she transforms into someone capable of crossing any boundary to fulfil her mission.

Each obstacle she faces only sharpens her resolve, pulling her deeper into a ruthless path.

Set in the lively town of Gaurapuram, the charming and unpredictable Raju crosses paths with the spirited Charulatha, sparking a fun-filled chain of events.

Against the backdrop of a grand wedding, Anaganaga Oka Raju unfolds as a colorful family festival entertainer packed with humor, heart and surprises.

t: India vs Netherlands  ICC Mens T20 World Cup 2026
d:
Witness the Men in Blue conclude their group stage campaign at the worlds largest stadium as India takes on the spirited Netherlands!

Join the home crowd for a high-energy cinematic experience as India looks to seal their dominance heading into the Super Eights.
Refusing to believe her story about monsters, the sole survivor of an exploration gone horribly wrong is forced to follow the authorities back into the caves where terror awaits.

From a struggling NRI in Australia to a fearless Punjab Police officer - Kalandar's journey is nothing short of extraordinary.

Fuelled by crime, corruption, redemption, and revenge, this is the story of one man who dares to take on a deadly liquor mafia - and in doing so, changes everything.

Eight men ditch their responsibilities for a drunken road trip into the mountains  but deep in the wilderness, paranormal forces begin unraveling their reality, testing bonds and pushing each to their breaking point.

Punha Ekda Sade Made Teen reunites the eccentric brothers Ratan, Madan, and Chandan years after the original film as they continue running their garage under their strict "no women, no marriage" rule.

When new romantic entanglements and the return of Kamini disrupt their routine, the trio are pulled into fresh chaos, blending nostalgia with modern comedic twists.

Ka Kha Ga Gha tells the inspiring story of Manjri, a bright 12-year-old girl with big dreams. However, her aspirations to study hard and build a better future are threatened when she is forced into child marriage.

Will Manjri find a way to escape the claws of tradition and pursue her educational dreams, or will she succumb to societal pressures?

A devoted single mother shares an unbreakable bond with her young daughter, but their peaceful lives are disrupted when a mysterious presence begins to influence their world. As fear and uncertainty grow, she must draw upon her inner strength to protect her child, leading to a gripping tale of courage, resilience, and a mother's fight against darkness.

Dishti Bomma is a horror thriller built around the idea that no one can escape the consequences of their actions. As dark secrets and past misdeeds come back to haunt those responsible, the story unfolds as a chilling tale of guilt, retribution, and the inevitability of justice.

An "inadvertent" social media post by a lonely yet zestful grandmother about her upcoming "marriage" jeopardizes her granddaughter's wedding, triggering a whirlwind of conflicts and long-buried secrets. As chaos unfolds, the prospective grandson-in-law, Tony Kalra, takes it upon himself to reunite her deeply dysfunctional family.

Jindgi Haji Baki Che Dost... is an uplifting drama about resilience, self-discovery, and the courage to embrace life at every stage. As new challenges emerge and old emotions resurface, the story celebrates the indomitable human spirit, proving that dreams, freedom, and the desire to live know no age or boundaries truly.

In a small Kerala town, a group of school kids navigate friendship, pressure, and growing responsibilities while their parents struggle to understand them. When one mistake changes everything, both children and adults are forced to rediscover trust, empathy, and what it truly means to grow up together.

Set in rural Odisha, Guruji Namaskar follows a dedicated school teacher who goes beyond the classroom to help children overcome hardship and return to their studies. Through compassion, perseverance, and a deep commitment to education, he inspires positive change in the lives of his students and the community around him.
From friends to lovers to CHAOS, the perfect cocktail is back.

A hardworking mason dreams of securing a better future for his son. When the young man falls for a doctor who has lost faith in love, he goes to great lengths to win her heart. But as ambition, sacrifice, and family bonds collide, a life-changing tragedy reveals the true meaning of love and devotion.

A journey back to one's roots.

A story of sacrifice, dreams, and responsibility.

Mission C1000 follows Ram, a brave young man who rises to protect a groundbreaking scientific formula targeted by a dangerous terrorist group.

Blending patriotism, science, and action, the film celebrates resilience, national pride, and youth empowerment.

Manithan Deivamagalam is a rural family drama where a humble man, played by Selvaraghavan, rises as a guardian figure amid a village conflict over land and faith.

Rooted in true events, it explores sacrifice, spirituality, and the deep bond between people and their land.

When a cold-blooded killer, Victor Mahadev, and his ruthless gang hunt two boys into a dense forest, a wildlife photographer, Venba Subbaiya, is accidentally pulled into their deadly game. Trapped deep in the wilderness, survival becomes the only law as a brutal battle unfolds over who will live to see the next dawn.

Veer and his friends visit a spooky bungalow, where they encounter the ghost of Rani, whose tragic past of manipulation and death unleashes terror. As her spirit begins to haunt them, they are drawn into a deadly fight for survival.

Physiotherapist Maya has long traded love for solitude after a past betrayal. Her walls are shaken by a cynical patient, Mahesh, and his spirited son, Siddharth.

Torn between Siddharth's vibrant hope and Mahesh's shared pain, Maya must confront her inner conflict. Will she risk her heart again?

Relive the chaos of the Shibuya Incident and witness the beginning of the deadly Culling Game in this special edition event. Legends will fall. New players will rise.

The story revolves around the incidents happening both in and out of that home throughout the night. The story majorly explains the misuse of social media, love, and protection of women.
The story traces six stages in a man's life, from childhood to old age, revealing the roles, struggles, and responsibilities he carries through each phase of his journey.

Lidia survives childhood sexual abuse and a life controlled by forced swimming, eventually escaping to rebuild herself through love, writing, and motherhood.

By confronting her past and transforming pain into art, she moves forward as a novelist who teaches resilience and healing to the next generation.

Leading a covert strike force, Ahiran wages a shadow war to stop narco-terrorism and reclaim law and order.
Greedy sons, initially awaiting their paralysed mother's death, frantically try to keep her alive after discovering she holds a valuable treasure.

A young Foley artist, haunted since childhood by a mysterious voice and visions of a figure in Duryodhana's form, grows up under the care of his mother and close relationships. His life takes a dark turn when he is accused of his father's murder, and the investigation begins to unravel hidden truths about his past.

But when the truth behind their lies begins to surface, their fragile bond is put to the ultimate test.

Sanju, a carefree boy from Nagpur, moves to Mumbai for a job and stays with his mother's friend, Viswanath. He befriends Anu, Viswanath's daughter, and slowly falls for her. But just as he realizes his love, her marriage is fixed with someone else.

Now Viswanath is torn between being a father and keeping his promise as a friend.

This true story is a reminder that animals and nature are sentient, and that the Earth is a shared planet. The film is a tribute to the gift that animals and nature offer humanity, a celebration of the magic they bring into our lives if we are willing to open our hearts.

The story follows Vicky, a brilliant but volatile scholar who ignites a national firestorm when he publicly accuses his legendary mentor, Professor Gopal Nadkarni, of institutional bias. The catalyst? The sudden rejection of Vicky's controversial thesis on the RSS. What begins as a faculty dispute is quickly hijacked by a sensationalist news anchor and an ambitious political activist, turning a private disagreement into a televised "intellectual trial" watched by millions.

As the cameras roll, the debate descends into a psychological chess match. Vicky doesn't just argue history - he hunts for a weakness, confronting Nadkarni on explosive flashpoints from the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency.

One day a teacher named Selvam comes to teach children but ends up misbehaving with Azhagu. What follows next is a series of unfortunate incidents that lead to the death of Selvam. Will the police be able to find the killer?

CSK (Chirumamilla Seetha Krishnan), an athletics coach from Perambur, has loved Magic Gonzalez, an Anglo-Indian neighbour, since their school days. After years of rejection over cultural differences, his devotion finally wins her over. But CSK hesitates himself, fearing her lifestyle will clash with his conservative Telugu family until Magic promises to adapt.

Winning over their families proves harder. Magic's father approves only if they wed in a Christian ceremony, while CSK's mother fiercely objects. When CSK's father discovers Magic's father is the old rival who caused his partial hearing loss, a confrontation erupts and CSK unintentionally slaps Magic's father, driving the couple apart.

A family panchayat becomes the turning point. Relatives speak up for values over caste, and CSK's mother realising she alone is holding on to tradition tentatively gives her blessing.
CSK races to reconcile with Magic before she leaves for Australia. They reunite at 'Wonderland,' where he first confessed his love through a poem, and rediscover each other older, wiser, and unconditionally in love.
